title: Austrian GP: Hamilton looks to spoil Antonelli, Russell battle in Qualifying LIVE!
OSD Venkatramireddy | విద్యార్థులు బోధన సామర్థ్యం, ఆత్మవిశ్వాసంతో ఇంటర్వ్యూకి వెళ్లాలి : ఓఎస్డీ ప్రొఫెసర్‌ వెంకట్రామిరెడ్డి
description: OSD Venkatramireddy |  విద్యార్థులు బోధన సామర్థ్యం, ఆత్మవిశ్వాసంతో ఇంటర్వ్యూకి వెళ్లాలని కేయూ ఓఎస్డీ ప్రొఫెసర్‌ వెంకట్రామిరెడ్డి అన్నారు.
content:
హనుమకొండ చౌరస్తా : విద్యార్థులు బోధన సామర్థ్యం, ఆత్మవిశ్వాసంతో ఇంటర్వ్యూకి వెళ్లాలని కేయూ ఓఎస్డీ ప్రొఫెసర్‌ వెంకట్రామిరెడ్డి (OSD Venkatramireddy ) అన్నారు. కేయూ ప్లేస్మెంట్‌ సెల్‌ ఆధ్వర్యంలో రెజోనెన్స్​‍ ఎడ్యుకేషనల్‌ ఇన్‌స్టిట్యూషన్స్​‍లో జూనియర్‌ లెక్చరర్ల నియామక డ్రైవ్‌ను సెమినార్‌ హాల్‌లో నిర్వహించారు.
దేశంలోనే ప్రముఖ విద్యాసంస్థలలో ఒకటైన రాజస్థాన్‌లోని కోటకు చెందిన రెజోనెన్స్​‍ ఎడ్యుకేషనల్‌ ఇన్‌ స్టిట్యూషన్స్​‍ ఆధ్వర్యంలో జూనియర్‌ లెక్చరర్ల నియామక (క్యాంపస్ డ్రైవ్‌) కార్యక్రమం నిర్వహించారు. ఈ డ్రైవ్‌లో మ్యాథమెటిక్స్​​‍, ఫిజిక్స్​​‍, కెమిస్ట్రీ విభాగాలకు చెందిన మొత్తం 60 మంది ఫైనలియర్‌ విద్యార్థులు పాల్గొన్నారు. తొలుత నిర్వహించిన రాత పరీక్షలో అర్హత సాధించిన విద్యార్థులకు డెమో తరగతులు నిర్వహించి వారి బోధనా నైపుణ్యాలను పరిశీలించారు.
అనంతరం సంస్థ హెచ్‌ఆర్‌ ప్రతినిధులు తుది ఇంటర్వ్యూలు నిర్వహించి మొత్తం 32 మంది విద్యార్థులను జూనియర్‌ లెక్చరర్లుగా ఎంపిక చేశారు. వీరికి నెలకు రూ.30 వేలు ఇస్తామని సంస్థ తెలంగాణ ఇన్‌చార్జి మధుసూదన్‌రెడ్డి ప్రకటించారు. కార్యక్రమానికి ముఖ్యఅతిథిగా హాజరైన కేయూ ఓఎస్డీ వెంకటరామిరెడ్డి మాట్లాడుతూ విద్యార్థులు తమ విద్యతో పాటు కమ్యూనికేషన్‌ నైపుణ్యాలు, బోధనా సామర్థ్యం, ఆత్మవిశ్వాసాన్ని పెంపొందించుకోవాలని సూచించారు. కార్యక్రమంలో మ్యాథమెటిక్స్​​‍ విభాగం హెచ్‌వోడీ భార్గవిశర్మ, ఫిజిక్స్​​‍ హెచ్‌వోడీ పద్మజ, రెజోనెన్స్​‍ సంస్థ హెచ్‌ఆర్‌ ప్రదీప్‌కుమార్‌ పాల్గొన్నారు.

title: “चीन श्रृंखला” कैसे बन रही है वैश्विक आपूर्ति श्रृंखला की नई ताकत?
description:
Smart Packaging Innovation Center: फ्रांस की लॉरियल ने अपना पहला स्मार्ट पैकेजिंग इनोवेशन सेंटर लॉन्च किया, जर्मनी की सीमेंस हेल्थिनियर्स ने चीन में निर्मित अपना पहला हाई-एंड सीटी स्कैनर पेश किया, जबकि अमेरिका की मेडट्रॉनिक ने अपने एआई-संचालित संपूर्ण स्वास्थ्य सेवा समाधानों का प्रदर्शन किया। 22 से 26 जून तक आयोजित चौथे चीन अंतर्राष्ट्रीय आपूर्ति.
The post “चीन श्रृंखला” कैसे बन रही है वैश्विक आपूर्ति श्रृंखला की नई ताकत? appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
content:
Smart Packaging Innovation Center: फ्रांस की लॉरियल ने अपना पहला स्मार्ट पैकेजिंग इनोवेशन सेंटर लॉन्च किया, जर्मनी की सीमेंस हेल्थिनियर्स ने चीन में निर्मित अपना पहला हाई-एंड सीटी स्कैनर पेश किया, जबकि अमेरिका की मेडट्रॉनिक ने अपने एआई-संचालित संपूर्ण स्वास्थ्य सेवा समाधानों का प्रदर्शन किया। 22 से 26 जून तक आयोजित चौथे चीन अंतर्राष्ट्रीय आपूर्ति श्रृंखला एक्सपो (CISCE) में यह साफ़ दिखाई दिया कि डिजिटल प्रौद्योगिकियां पूरी औद्योगिक श्रृंखला को नई ताकत दे रही हैं। साथ ही, इन वैश्विक नवाचारों के पीछे “चीन श्रृंखला” का मजबूत समर्थन भी अहम भूमिका निभा रहा है।
एक्सपो में अतिथि देश के प्रतिनिधि और ऑस्ट्रेलियाई व्यापार एवं निवेश आयोग में ग्रेटर चाइना के महाप्रबंधक डोमिनिक ट्रिनिडेड ने कहा कि चीन के प्रौद्योगिकी उद्योग का तेज़ विकास उल्लेखनीय है। उनके अनुसार, CISCE दुनिया भर की कंपनियों और उनके चीनी साझेदारों को एक पेशेवर मंच उपलब्ध कराता है, इसलिए इसका आयोजन बेहद उपयुक्त समय पर हो रहा है।
आपूर्ति श्रृंखला सहयोग पर केंद्रित दुनिया की पहली राष्ट्रीय स्तर की प्रदर्शनी के रूप में इस वर्ष के CISCE में 85 देशों और क्षेत्रों की 1,200 से अधिक कंपनियों ने भाग लिया, जो अब तक का नया रिकॉर्ड है। इनमें विदेशी प्रदर्शकों की हिस्सेदारी 36.5 प्रतिशत रही, जबकि फॉर्च्यून ग्लोबल 500 कंपनियों और उद्योग जगत की अग्रणी कंपनियों की भागीदारी 65 प्रतिशत से अधिक रही। इस बार की एक खास उपलब्धि यह भी रही कि 115 चीनी और विदेशी कंपनियों तथा संस्थानों ने अगले संस्करण के लिए पहले ही अपनी जगह बुक करा ली है। यह पिछले वर्ष की तुलना में 12.7 प्रतिशत अधिक है। इससे स्पष्ट होता है कि CISCE का “चेन” पर ध्यान और भी अधिक केंद्रित है।
इस वर्ष जारी “वैश्विक आपूर्ति श्रृंखला संवर्धन रिपोर्ट” के अनुसार, वर्ष 2018 से 2025 के बीच वैश्विक आपूर्ति श्रृंखला संवर्धन सूचकांक, कनेक्टिविटी सूचकांक, नवाचार सूचकांक और लचीलापन सूचकांक, सभी में वृद्धि दर्ज की गई है। रिपोर्ट के मुताबिक, चीन लगातार वैश्विक आपूर्ति श्रृंखला सहयोग के नए अवसर पैदा कर रहा है। इस वर्ष एक्सपो में रिकॉर्ड भागीदारी और इसके सकारात्मक नतीजे एक बार फिर साबित करते हैं कि जितनी अधिक वैश्विक चुनौतियां बढ़ती हैं, उतना ही अधिक देशों के बीच सहयोग की आवश्यकता होती है। वैश्विक औद्योगिक विकास में “चीन श्रृंखला” की भूमिका लगातार महत्वपूर्ण होती जा रही है।
एक लिपस्टिक से लेकर कार तक, आज हर उत्पाद एक-दूसरे से जुड़ी औद्योगिक श्रृंखलाओं का हिस्सा है। विशाल घरेलू बाज़ार, मजबूत औद्योगिक ढांचा और लगातार बढ़ती नवाचार क्षमता के दम पर “चीन श्रृंखला” दुनिया के लिए नए अवसर पैदा कर रही है। खास तौर पर कृत्रिम बुद्धिमत्ता जैसी नई प्रौद्योगिकियों के तेज़ विकास के साथ चीन नवाचार और उद्योग के बीच बेहतर तालमेल स्थापित करने पर ज़ोर दे रहा है। यही वजह है कि वह वैश्विक आपूर्ति श्रृंखला के आधुनिकीकरण में एक महत्वपूर्ण शक्ति बनकर उभरा है।
वैश्विक स्तर पर बढ़ते संरक्षणवाद और लगातार जारी भू-राजनीतिक तनाव के बीच “चीन श्रृंखला” ने वैश्विक आपूर्ति श्रृंखला की स्थिरता बनाए रखने में महत्वपूर्ण योगदान दिया है। निकारागुआ के राष्ट्रपति के सलाहकार लॉरेआनो ओर्तेगा मुरिलो का कहना है कि “चीन श्रृंखला” ने दोनों देशों के बीच विभिन्न क्षेत्रों में सहयोग को और गहरा किया है। उन्होंने कहा, “यही मुख्य कारण है कि हम विशेष रूप से इस प्रदर्शनी में भाग लेने के लिए यहां आए हैं।” वहीं, सर्बिया की विदेश व्यापार और आर्थिक सहयोग मंत्री जगोडा लाज़ारेविच का मानना है कि चीन की सुव्यवस्थित औद्योगिक योजना ने उसे वैश्विक आपूर्ति श्रृंखला के निर्माण में अग्रणी भूमिका निभाने में सक्षम बनाया है। उनके अनुसार, CISCE मुक्त व्यापार को बढ़ावा देने, औद्योगिक श्रृंखला की लचीलता मजबूत करने और वैश्विक व्यापार की स्थिरता बनाए रखने की साझा इच्छा का प्रतीक है।
आज “चीन श्रृंखला” केवल व्यापार का माध्यम नहीं, बल्कि भविष्य को जोड़ने का एक महत्वपूर्ण विकल्प बन चुकी है। यही वजह है कि दुनिया की कई बहुराष्ट्रीय कंपनियां हर साल इस एक्सपो में भाग लेने को प्राथमिकता देती हैं। चौथा चीन अंतर्राष्ट्रीय आपूर्ति श्रृंखला एक्सपो भले ही समाप्त हो गया हो, लेकिन वैश्विक औद्योगिक सहयोग की नई कहानी अभी जारी है। आने वाले समय में नवोन्मेषी और बुद्धिमान “चीन श्रृंखला” वैश्विक आपूर्ति श्रृंखला व्यवस्था के साथ और गहराई से जुड़ेगी, जिससे दुनिया को अधिक स्थिरता, निश्चितता और साझा विकास का अवसर मिलेगा।
(साभार- चाइना मीडिया ग्रुप, पेइचिंग) 
The post “चीन श्रृंखला” कैसे बन रही है वैश्विक आपूर्ति श्रृंखला की नई ताकत? appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.

title: ବ୍ରାଉନସୁଗାର ଜବତ: ମହିଳାଙ୍କ ସମେତ ୪ ଜଣଙ୍କୁ ବାନ୍ଧିଲା ପୋଲିସ
description:
ବଞ୍ଚୋ/ହାଟଡିହୀ/ଛେନାପଦୀ,୨୭ା୬(ପ୍ରଦୋଷ ବିଶ୍ୱାଳ/ଶୁଭକାନ୍ତ ନାୟକ/ନିରାକାର ପରିଡ଼ା): କେନ୍ଦୁଝର ଜିଲା ନନ୍ଦିପଦା ପୋଲିସ ଏବଂ ଆନନ୍ଦପୁର ଏସ୍‌ଡିପିଓ ଚଢ଼ାଉ କରି ୧୨ ଗ୍ରାମ ବ୍ରାଉନସୁଗାର ଜବତ କରିବା ସହ ଏଥିରେ ସମ୍ପୃକ୍ତ ୪ ଜଣଙ୍କୁ ଶନିବାର ଗିରଫ କରିଛି। ଗିରଫ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଜଣେ ମହିଳା ଅଛନ୍ତି। ଗିରଫ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିମାନେ ନନ୍ଦିପଦା ଥାନା ହାଟଡିହୀ ଗ୍ରାମର ଭାଗିରଥୀ ପଣ୍ଡା (୩୦ ବର୍ଷ), ଜଳକଳଙ୍ଗ ଗ୍ରାମର ଜଗନ୍ନାଥ ମଲ୍ଲିକ (୨୭ ବର୍ଷ), ଆନନ୍ଦପୁର ଥାନା ଫକୀରପୁର ଗ୍ରାମର ଜ୍ୟୋତି ରଞ୍ଜନ ଜେନା ଓରଫ […]
The post ବ୍ରାଉନସୁଗାର ଜବତ: ମହିଳାଙ୍କ ସମେତ ୪ ଜଣଙ୍କୁ ବାନ୍ଧିଲା ପୋଲିସ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ବଞ୍ଚୋ/ହାଟଡିହୀ/ଛେନାପଦୀ,୨୭ା୬(ପ୍ରଦୋଷ ବିଶ୍ୱାଳ/ଶୁଭକାନ୍ତ ନାୟକ/ନିରାକାର ପରିଡ଼ା): କେନ୍ଦୁଝର ଜିଲା ନନ୍ଦିପଦା ପୋଲିସ ଏବଂ ଆନନ୍ଦପୁର ଏସ୍‌ଡିପିଓ ଚଢ଼ାଉ କରି ୧୨ ଗ୍ରାମ ବ୍ରାଉନସୁଗାର ଜବତ କରିବା ସହ ଏଥିରେ ସମ୍ପୃକ୍ତ ୪ ଜଣଙ୍କୁ ଶନିବାର ଗିରଫ କରିଛି। ଗିରଫ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଜଣେ ମହିଳା ଅଛନ୍ତି। ଗିରଫ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିମାନେ ନନ୍ଦିପଦା ଥାନା ହାଟଡିହୀ ଗ୍ରାମର ଭାଗିରଥୀ ପଣ୍ଡା (୩୦ ବର୍ଷ), ଜଳକଳଙ୍ଗ ଗ୍ରାମର ଜଗନ୍ନାଥ ମଲ୍ଲିକ (୨୭ ବର୍ଷ), ଆନନ୍ଦପୁର ଥାନା ଫକୀରପୁର ଗ୍ରାମର ଜ୍ୟୋତି ରଞ୍ଜନ ଜେନା ଓରଫ ଦୀପ୍ତି ରଞ୍ଜନ (୨୭ ବର୍ଷ) ଏବଂ ବାଲେଶ୍ୱର ଜିଲା ଖଇରା ଥାନା କୁପାରୀ ଗ୍ରାମର ମିନତୀଲତା ମୁଖୀ (୬୧ ବର୍ଷ) ଅଟନ୍ତି। ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତମାନଙ୍କୁ ଗିରଫ କରାଯାଇ ଶନିବାର କୋର୍ଟ ଚାଲାଣ କରାଯାଇଥିବା ତଦନ୍ତକାରୀ ଅଧିକାରୀ ପ୍ରବୋଧ ଚନ୍ଦ୍ର ମହାନ୍ତି କହିଛନ୍ତି।
ସୂଚନାଯୋଗ୍ୟ, କୌଣସି ସୂତ୍ରରୁ ଖବର ପାଇ ପୋଲିସ ଚଢ଼ାଉ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିଥିଲା। ଏହି ଘଟଣାରେ ପୋଲିସ କେସ୍‌ ନଂ ୨୭୪/୨୦୨୬ ପଞ୍ଜୀକରଣ କରିଛି। ବ୍ରାଉନସୁଗାର କେଉଁଠୁ ଏଠାକୁ ଆସୁଛି ଏବଂ ଆଉ କେଉଁ ମାନେ ଏଥିରେ ସମ୍ପୃକ୍ତ ଅଛନ୍ତି, ସେ ନେଇ ତଦନ୍ତ ଚାଲିଥିବା ଥାନାଧିକାରୀ ଧର୍ମେନ୍ଦ୍ର ଶାନ୍ତି ଏବଂ ଏସ୍‌ଡିପିଓ କମଳ କୁମାର ପଣ୍ଡା କହିଛନ୍ତି।
ସେମାନଙ୍କଠାରୁ ଗୋଟେ ବାଇକ୍‌, ଗୋଟେ ମୋବାଇଲ ଏବଂ ୧ ହଜାର ୧୫୦ ଟଙ୍କା ଜବତ କରାଯାଇଛି। ନିନିଲତାର ଜ୍ୱାଇଁ ଜଳକଳଙ୍ଗ ଗ୍ରାମର ରାଜୁ ମୁଖୀ ଏବଂ ତାଙ୍କ ସମର୍ଥକ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତଙ୍କୁ ଖସାଇବାକୁ ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରୁଥିବା ବେଳେ ପୋଲିସ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତମାନଙ୍କୁ ଧରିବାରେ ସକ୍ଷମ ହୋଇଥିବା କହିଛି।

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

title: ഓപ്പറേഷൻ തൂഫാൻ, വീട് വളഞ്ഞ് ഡാൻസാഫ് ടീം; കഴക്കൂട്ടത്ത് ഏഴ് ഗ്രാം എംഡിഎംഎയുമായി സ്ഥിരം ലഹരി കച്ചവടക്കാരൻ പിടിയിൽ
description: തിരുവനന്തപുരം കഴക്കൂട്ടത്ത് ഏഴ് ഗ്രാം എംഡിഎംഎയുമായി സ്ഥിരം ലഹരി കച്ചവടക്കാരനായ ഷാരോൺ ജേക്കബ് എന്ന യുവാവിനെ സിറ്റി ഡാൻസാഫ് ടീം പിടികൂടി. മുൻപ് ലഹരി കേസിൽ ജാമ്യത്തിലിറങ്ങിയ ഇയാൾ, ഓപ്പറേഷൻ തൂഫാന്‍റെ ഭാഗമായുള്ള നിരീക്ഷണത്തിനിടെയാണ് വീണ്ടും അറസ്റ്റിലായത്.
content: <p>തിരുവനന്തപുരം: തിരുവനന്തപുരം കഴക്കൂട്ടത്ത് ഏഴ് ഗ്രാം എംഡിഎംഎയുമായി സ്ഥിരം ലഹരി കച്ചവടക്കാരൻ പിടിയിൽ. തുമ്പ ആറാട്ടുവഴി സ്വദേശി ഷാരോൺ ജേക്കബ് (29) ആണ് സിറ്റി ഡാൻസാഫ് ടീമിന്‍റെ പിടിയിലായത്. ഇയാളുടെ വീട്ടിൽ നിന്ന് ഏഴ് ഗ്രാം എംഡിഎയും ലഹരി ഉപയോഗിക്കുന്നതിനുള്ള ഇൻസുലിൻ സിറിഞ്ചുകളും കഞ്ചാവ് വലിക്കുന്നതിനുള്ള പ്രത്യേക ഉപകരണവും 4000 രൂപയും കണ്ടെടുത്തു. കഴിഞ്ഞ ഡിസംബറിൽ എംഡിഎയും ഗോൾഡൻ ഷാമ്പെയിനും അടക്കം ഇയാൾ പിടിയിലായിരുന്നു</p><p>കേസിൽ ജാമ്യത്തിൽ ഇറങ്ങിയ ശേഷം വീണ്ടും ലഹരി കച്ചവടം ആരംഭിക്കുകയായിരുന്നു. ഓപ്പറേഷൻ തൂഫാന്‍റെ ഭാഗമായി സ്ഥിരം കച്ചവടക്കാരെ നിരീക്ഷിച്ചു വരുന്നതിനിടെ ഷാരോൺ വീട്ടിലെത്തിയതായി വിവരം ലഭിച്ച ഡാൻസാഫ് സംഘം വീട് വളഞ്ഞാണ് ഇയാളെ പിടികൂടിയത്. നിരവധി ലഹരി - അടിപിടി കേസുകളിൽ പ്രതിയാണ് ഷാരോൺ. സ്ഥിരം ലഹരി കച്ചവടക്കാരൻ ആയ ഇയാൾ കൂടുതൽ ലഹരി വസ്തുക്കൾ ശേഖരിച്ചിട്ടുള്ളതായി വിവരം ലഭിച്ച പൊലീസ് വിശദമായി പരിശോധന നടത്തിവരികയാണ്. പ്രതിയെ കഴക്കൂട്ടം പൊലീസിന് കൈമാറി.</p>

title: అమరావతిలో అడుగుపెట్టే అర్హత వైసీపీ నేతలకు లేదు: అనిత
description: Vangalapudi Anitha: గుంటూరు జిల్లా ఉండవల్లిలో వైఎస్సార్ కాంగ్రెస్ పార్టీ (YCP) ముఖ్య నేతలు పేర్ని నాని, అంబటి రాంబాబు, దేవినేని అవినాష్ పర్యటన సందర్భంగా చోటుచేసుకున్న...
content:
Vangalapudi Anitha: గుంటూరు జిల్లా ఉండవల్లిలో వైఎస్సార్ కాంగ్రెస్ పార్టీ (YCP) ముఖ్య నేతలు పేర్ని నాని, అంబటి రాంబాబు, దేవినేని అవినాష్ పర్యటన సందర్భంగా చోటుచేసుకున్న రాళ్లదాడి ఘటనపై ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్ హోంమంత్రి వంగలపూడి అనిత అత్యంత తీవ్రంగా స్పందించారు. అసలు అమరావతి ప్రాంతంలో అడుగుపెట్టే కనీస నైతిక అర్హత కూడా వైసీపీ నాయకులకు లేదని ఆమె ఘాటుగా విమర్శించారు.







Read also: K Bhagyaraj Death: భాగ్యరాజ్ మృతిపై జగన్ సంతాపం



పరామర్శకు వచ్చారా.. రౌడీయిజం చేయడానికా?



వైసీపీ నాయకులు అమరావతికి వచ్చింది రైతులను ఓదార్చడానికి కాదని, అక్కడ మళ్లీ గొడవలు సృష్టించి రౌడీయిజం చేయడానికేనని హోంమంత్రి మండిపడ్డారు. ఉండవల్లి పర్యటనకు వచ్చిన వైసీపీ నేతల వెంట ఎంతమంది రౌడీషీటర్లు ఉన్నారో పోలీసుల వద్ద పూర్తి సమాచారం మరియు పక్కా జాబితా ఉందని ఆమె వెల్లడించారు. గతంలో తెలుగుదేశం పార్టీ (TDP) కేంద్ర కార్యాలయంపై భౌతిక దాడులకు తెగబడిన నిందితులు కూడా ఈ పర్యటనలో వైసీపీ నేతల వెంటే ఉన్నారని, ఇందుకు సంబంధించిన దృశ్యాలు (Visuals) స్పష్టంగా రికార్డయ్యాయని అనిత పేర్కొన్నారు. వైసీపీ నేతలకు వ్యతిరేకంగా అక్కడ నల్లజెండాలతో నిరసన తెలిపిన వారిలో 90 శాతం మంది రాజధాని కోసం తమ సొంత భూములను త్యాగం చేసిన అసలైన రైతులేనని ఆమె స్పష్టం చేశారు.



Vangalapudi Anitha: మూడు రాజధానుల డ్రామాలతో ఐదేళ్ల నరకం



గతంలో అసెంబ్లీ సాక్షిగా అమరావతి రాజధానికి అంగీకరించిన వైఎస్ జగన్మోహన్ రెడ్డి, ఆ తర్వాత అధికారంలోకి రాగానే మూడు రాజధానుల పేరుతో డ్రామాలు ఆడి ఐదేళ్లపాటు అమరావతి రైతులను నరకయాతనకు గురిచేశారని హోంమంత్రి ధ్వజమెత్తారు. రాజధానిని సర్వనాశనం చేసిన వైసీపీ నేతలు ఇప్పుడు ఏ ముఖం పెట్టుకుని రైతుల ముందుకు వస్తున్నారని ప్రశ్నించారు. అమరావతి గనుక అనుకున్నట్లుగా పూర్తయితే రాష్ట్రంలో వైసీపీకి రాజకీయ మనుగడ ఉండదనే భయంతోనే ఆ పార్టీ నేతలు ఇలాంటి కుట్రలు, దాడులు చేస్తున్నారని విమర్శించారు.



2027 నాటికి అమరావతి పూర్తి చేయడమే టార్గెట్



ప్రస్తుత టీడీపీ-జనసేన-బీజేపీ కూటమి ప్రభుత్వం రాజధాని నిర్మాణంపై ప్రత్యేక శ్రద్ధ పెట్టిందని వంగలపూడి అనిత తెలిపారు. ప్రభుత్వం అహర్నిశలు శ్రమిస్తోందని, 2027 నాటికి అమరావతి రాజధాని నిర్మాణాన్ని పూర్తి చేయడమే లక్ష్యంగా (Target) పెట్టుకుని పనులు వేగవంతం చేస్తున్నామని ఆమె స్పష్టం చేశారు.

title: Anger issues: Cowboys punt team must fix underperforming ways
description: Bryan Anger might not be blame for the Cowboys' slipping coverage issues, but he may need to face the brunt of the consequences.
content: The Dallas Cowboys have one of the most accomplished and well-paid punters in the NFL in Bryan Anger. The 37-year-old special teamer is a two-time Pro Bowler, and the oldest expected starting punter in the league. The former third-round pick of the Jacksonville Jaguars has enjoyed quite the career, also playing in Tampa Bay and Houston during his 14 accrued seasons.But with age, accolades and compensation come a certain degree of expectations, and for whatever reason, Anger and the Cowboys’ coverage team has failed to live up. It’s a situation previous broached by Cowboys Wire’s Terence Watson and a situation that deserves continued attention as the Cowboys head to Oxnard next month.Special teams is a group effort and that’s especially true in matters of punt coverage. Punters don’t simply receive snaps and boom the ball as far as humanly possible. They must play within the limitations of their coverage team. Before the phrase “outkicking his coverage” became associated with the arena of finding a mate, it held a quite literal meaning. Punters must weigh the perimeters of the situation and calculate how far they can send a ball to land it just ahead of his trusted gunners. Too much room gives the returner an advantage. Too little room and he leaves meat on the bone. It has to be just right.The conclusion of the 2025 NFL campaign saw Dallas rank just 14th in net yards per successful punt attempt (includes regular and postseason stats). It’s not terrible, but hardly what one would expect from one of the highest-paid punters in the NFL. Anger might not be to blame for such average performance, but if this is as good as the unit is then maybe this would be a good time to get younger and cheaper at the punter position.It would behoove the Cowboys to kick (punt?) some tires this summer in Oxnard. Whether it’s identifying prospects to groom for next season when Anger’s contract expires or whether it’s to consider this year as a preemptive replacement, a little research could do a team good.Dallas stands to shed $3,100,000 if they release Anger before the season. They aren’t desperate for money and should by no means make a move if it represents a clear step back in talent. But if the expectations are to be average again in 2026, perhaps there is a more cost-friendly alternative the Cowboys can start developing.You can follow Reid on X @ReidDHanson and be sure to follow Cowboys Wire on Facebook to join in on the conversation with fellow fans!This article originally appeared on Cowboys Wire: Anger issues: Cowboys punt team must fix underperforming ways

ഓസീസിനെ വെറുതെ തോല്‍പിച്ചാൽ പോരാ, വനിതാ ടി20 ലോകകപ്പ് സെമിയിലെത്താൻ ഇന്ത്യക്ക് മുന്നിലുള്ള വഴികൾ
description: വനിതാ ടി20 ലോകകപ്പിൽ മൂന്ന് ജയം നേടിയിട്ടും ഇന്ത്യയുടെ സെമി പ്രവേശം ഉറപ്പായിട്ടില്ല. ഗ്രൂപ്പിലെ അവസാന മത്സരങ്ങളായ ഇന്ത്യ-ഓസ്‌ട്രേലിയ, ദക്ഷിണാഫ്രിക്ക-ബംഗ്ലാദേശ് പോരാട്ടങ്ങളുടെ ഫലത്തെയും നെറ്റ് റൺറേറ്റിനെയും ആശ്രയിച്ചിരിക്കും ഇന്ത്യയുടെ സെമി സാധ്യത.
content: <p>വനിതാ ടി20 ലോകകപ്പിൽ മൂന്ന് ജയം നേടിയിട്ടും ഇന്ത്യയുടെ സെമി പ്രവേശം ഉറപ്പായിട്ടില്ല. ഗ്രൂപ്പിലെ അവസാന മത്സരങ്ങളായ ഇന്ത്യ-ഓസ്‌ട്രേലിയ, ദക്ഷിണാഫ്രിക്ക-ബംഗ്ലാദേശ് പോരാട്ടങ്ങളുടെ ഫലത്തെയും നെറ്റ് റൺറേറ്റിനെയും ആശ്രയിച്ചിരിക്കും ഇന്ത്യയുടെ സെമി സാധ്യത.</p><img><p>വനിതാ ടി20 ലോകകപ്പിൽ ഗ്രൂപ്പ് ഘട്ടത്തിലെ നാല് മത്സരങ്ങളിൽ മൂന്നിലും ജയിച്ചിട്ടും ഇന്ത്യൻ ടീമിന്‍റെ സെമി ഫൈനൽ പ്രവേശം ഇപ്പോഴും തുലാസിലാണ്. ഞായറാഴ്ച ലോർഡ്സിൽ നടക്കുന്ന ഗ്രൂപ്പ് എ-യിലെ അവസാന ഗ്രൂപ്പ് മത്സരങ്ങളാവും ഹർമൻപ്രീത് കൗറിന്‍റെയും സംഘത്തിന്‍റെയും വിധി നിശ്ചയിക്കുക.</p><img><p>ഗ്രൂപ്പിൽ നിന്ന് പാകിസ്ഥാനും നെതർലൻഡ്സും ഇതിനകം പുറത്തായിക്കഴിഞ്ഞു. ബംഗ്ലാദേശിന് സാങ്കേതികമായി മാത്രമാണ് സാധ്യത നിലനില്‍ക്കുന്നത്. ഇതോടെ ഓസ്‌ട്രേലിയ, ഇന്ത്യ, ദക്ഷിണാഫ്രിക്ക എന്നീ മൂന്ന് വമ്പന്മാർ തമ്മിലാണ് ഇപ്പോൾ സെമിയിലെ രണ്ട് സ്ഥാനങ്ങൾക്കായി കടുത്ത പോരാട്ടം നടക്കുന്നത്.</p><img><p>നാല് മത്സരങ്ങളും ജയിച്ച് +4.724 നെറ്റ് റൺറേറ്റുള്ള ഓസ്‌ട്രേലിയ സെമി ഉറപ്പിച്ചു കഴിഞ്ഞു. നിലവിൽ +2.268 നെറ്റ് റൺറേറ്റുമായി ഇന്ത്യ രണ്ടാമതാണ്. ഞായറാഴ്ച നടക്കുന്ന രണ്ട് നിർണായക മത്സരങ്ങളെ ആശ്രയിച്ചിരിക്കും ഇന്ത്യയുടെ സെമി സാധ്യതകൾ. ഗ്രൂപ്പിലെ അവസാന മത്സരത്തിൽ ഇന്ത്യ ശക്തരായ ഓസ്‌ട്രേലിയയെ നേരിടുമ്പോൾ, ദക്ഷിണാഫ്രിക്ക ബംഗ്ലാദേശിനെ നേരിടും.</p><img><p>ഓസ്‌ട്രേലിയയോട് ഇന്ത്യ തോറ്റാൽ, സെമിയിലെത്താൻ ഇന്ത്യക്ക് ബംഗ്ലാദേശിന്‍റെ സഹായം വേണ്ടിവരും. ഇന്ത്യ-ഓസ്ട്രേലിയ മത്സരത്തിന് തൊട്ടുമുമ്പ് നടക്കുന്ന മത്സരത്തിൽ ബംഗ്ലാദേശ് ദക്ഷിണാഫ്രിക്കയെ അട്ടിമറിക്കണം. ബംഗ്ലാദേശ് ജയിച്ചാൽ ഇന്ത്യക്കും ദക്ഷിണാഫ്രിക്കയ്ക്കും 6 പോയിന്റ് വീതമാകും. അങ്ങനെ വന്നാൽ മികച്ച നെറ്റ് റൺറേറ്റ് ഉള്ള ടീം ഓസ്‌ട്രേലിയയ്ക്കൊപ്പം സെമിയിലെത്തും.</p><img><p>നാളെ നടക്കുന്ന ആദ്യ മത്സരത്തില്‍ ദക്ഷിണാഫ്രിക്ക ബംഗ്ലാദേശിനെ തോൽപ്പിച്ചാൽ ഇന്ത്യയുടെ സെമി സാധ്യതകള്‍ തീര്‍ത്തും മങ്ങും.</p><img><p>ഇന്ത്യ ഓസീസിനെ തോൽപ്പിക്കുകയും ബംഗ്ലാദേശ് ദക്ഷിണാഫ്രിക്കയെ പരാജയപ്പെടുത്തുകയും ചെയ്താൽ ഇന്ത്യ 8 പോയിന്‍റോടെ നേരിട്ട് സെമിയിലെത്തും. എന്നാൽ, ഇന്ത്യയും ദക്ഷിണാഫ്രിക്കയും തങ്ങളുടെ മത്സരങ്ങൾ ജയിച്ചാൽ ഇരുവർക്കും 8 പോയിന്‍റ് വീതമാകും.</p><img><p>ഇന്ത്യക്കും ദക്ഷിണാഫ്രിക്കകും ഒരേ പോയിന്‍റ് വന്നാൽ നെറ്റ് റണ്‍റേറ്റാകും സെമിയിലെത്തുന്ന ടീമിനെ തീരുമാനിക്കുക. നിലവില്‍ ഇന്ത്യക്ക് +2.268 നെറ്റ് റണ്‍റേറ്റുണ്ട്. ദക്ഷിണാഫ്രിക്കയുടെ നെറ്റ് റണ്‍റേറ്റ് +0.734 ആണ്. അതുകൊണ്ട് തന്നെ അവസാന മത്സരത്തില്‍ ഓസീസിനെതിരെ ഇന്ത്യക്ക് വെറുതെ ജയിച്ചാല്‍ മാത്രം പോരാ, മികച്ച മാര്‍ജിനിലുള്ള ജയം അനിവാര്യമാണ്. ബംഗ്ലാദേശിനെതിരെ ദക്ഷിണാഫ്രിക്ക നേരിയ ജയമാണ് നേടുന്നതെങ്കില്‍ ഇന്ത്യക്ക് ഓസീസിനെ വീഴ്ത്തിയാലും സെമിയിലെത്താനാവും.</p><img><p>ഇന്ത്യ-ഓസ്‌ട്രേലിയ മത്സരം മഴ കാരണം ഉപേക്ഷിച്ചാൽ ഇന്ത്യക്ക് ഒരു പോയിന്‍റ് മാത്രമാണ് ലഭിക്കുക (ആകെ 7 പോയിന്‍റ). ഈ സാഹചര്യത്തിൽ ദക്ഷിണാഫ്രിക്ക ബംഗ്ലാദേശിനോട് തോറ്റാൽ മാത്രമേ ഇന്ത്യക്ക് സാധ്യതയുള്ളൂ. ദക്ഷിണാഫ്രിക്ക ജയിച്ചാൽ അവർ 8 പോയിന്‍റോടെ സെമിയിലെത്തുകയും ഇന്ത്യ പുറത്താകുകയും ചെയ്യും.</p><img><p>ചുരുക്കത്തിൽ, ലോർഡ്സിൽ ഇന്ന് നടക്കുന്ന 'സൂപ്പർ സൺഡേ' പോരാട്ടത്തിൽ ഓസ്‌ട്രേലിയക്കെതിരെ അദ്ഭുതങ്ങൾ കാണിക്കുകയോ, അല്ലെങ്കിൽ ദക്ഷിണാഫ്രിക്ക ബംഗ്ലാദേശിനോട് തോൽക്കുകയോ ചെയ്താൽ മാത്രമേ ഇന്ത്യക്ക് സെമി ഫൈനൽ ടിക്കറ്റ് ഉറപ്പിക്കാനാകൂ.</p>

Maharashtra TET 2026: देश मेंNEET के बाद अब महाराष्ट्र TET पेपर कैसे हो गया लीक?
description: Maharashtra TET 2026: सरकार का कहना है कि पूरी जांच होने के बाद ही नई परीक्षा तिथि घोषित की जाएगी। भिवंडी पुलिस ने इस मामले में कई लोगों को हिरासत में लिया है।
content:
Maharashtra TET 2026: देश अभी NEET पेपर लीक विवाद की गूंज से पूरी तरह बाहर भी नहीं निकला था कि अब महाराष्ट्र से एक और चौंकाने वाली खबर सामने आई है। खबर कथित पेपर लीक को लेकर है। महाराष्ट्र शिक्षक पात्रता परीक्षा यानी TET को परीक्षा से ठीक पहले स्थगित कर दिया गया है। कारण? पेपर लीक की आशंका। इस घटनाक्रम ने एक बार फिर देश की परीक्षा प्रणाली, उसकी सुरक्षा व्यवस्था और लाखों अभ्यर्थियों के भविष्य को लेकर गंभीर सवाल खड़े कर दिए हैं। आखिर क्या हुआ महाराष्ट्र में? तो पूरा मामला 27 जून की सुबह का बताया जा रहा है। महाराष्ट्र के ठाणे जिले के भिवंडी इलाके में पुलिस को एक गुप्त सूचना मिली। सूचना थी कि कुछ लोगों के पास शिक्षक पात्रता परीक्षा यानी TET के प्रश्नपत्र से जुड़ी गोपनीय जानकारी मौजूद है। जानकारी मिलते ही भिवंडी पुलिस ने तत्काल कार्रवाई करते हुए संदिग्ध स्थान पर छापा मारा। छापेमारी के दौरान पुलिस को कुछ दस्तावेज और प्रश्नों की सूची मिली।मामले की गंभीरता को देखते हुए महाराष्ट्र राज्य परीक्षा परिषद के अधिकारियों को मौके पर बुलाया गया।
सरकार ने परीक्षा क्यों टाली?
महाराष्ट्र शिक्षा विभाग ने स्थिति की गंभीरता को देखते हुए तुरंत बड़ा फैसला लिया। रविवार को होने वाली TET परीक्षा को स्थगित कर दिया गया। शिक्षा विभाग ने कहा कि परीक्षा की निष्पक्षता और पारदर्शिता सर्वोच्च प्राथमिकता है। अगर प्रश्नपत्र की गोपनीयता पर सवाल उठ रहे हैं तो ऐसी स्थिति में परीक्षा आयोजित करना लाखों छात्रों के साथ अन्याय होगा।  सरकार का कहना है कि पूरी जांच होने के बाद ही नई परीक्षा तिथि घोषित की जाएगी। भिवंडी पुलिस ने इस मामले में कई लोगों को हिरासत में लिया है। उनसे पूछताछ की जा रही है। जांच एजेंसियां यह पता लगाने की कोशिश कर रही हैं कि प्रश्नपत्र तक पहुंच कैसे हुई? क्या यह किसी संगठित गिरोह का काम है? क्या परीक्षा प्रणाली के भीतर से किसी ने मदद की? या फिर यह केवल सीमित स्तर का डेटा लीक है? फिलहाल इन सवालों के जवाब जांच पूरी होने के बाद ही सामने आएंगे।

title: ଅଜଣା ଗାଡ଼ି ଧକ୍କାରେ ଜଣେ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଙ୍କ ମୃତ୍ୟୁ : ପୋଲିସର ତଦନ୍ତ ଜାରି
description:
ଛତ୍ରପୁର,୨୭।୬ ଦିଲ୍ଲୀପ ସାମଲ : ଚମାଖଣ୍ଡି ଥାନା ଅଧୀନ କାଳିଆବାଲି ଛକ ନିକଟସ୍ଥ ରାସ୍ତାରେ ଏକ ଅଜଣା ଗାଡ଼ି ଧକ୍କାରେ ଜଣେ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଙ୍କର ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ଘଟିଛି। ମୃତକ ହେଲେ କାଳିଆବାଲି ଗ୍ରାମର ଏସ୍. ଦାଲେୟା ରେଡ୍ଡୀ (୪୮) ବୋଲି ଜଣାପଡ଼ିଛି। ସୂଚନା ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ବିଳମ୍ବିତ ରାତିରେ ଏସ୍. ଦାଲେୟା ରେଡ୍ଡୀ ନିଜ ଗ୍ରାମକୁ ଫେରୁଥିବା ବେଳେ କାଳିଆବାଲି ଛକ ନିକଟରେ ଏକ ଅଜଣା ଗାଡ଼ି ତାଙ୍କୁ ଧକ୍କା ଦେଇ ଘଟଣାସ୍ଥଳରୁ ଫେରାର ହୋଇଯାଇଥିଲା। ଫଳରେ ତାଙ୍କର […]
The post ଅଜଣା ଗାଡ଼ି ଧକ୍କାରେ ଜଣେ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଙ୍କ ମୃତ୍ୟୁ : ପୋଲିସର ତଦନ୍ତ ଜାରି appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଛତ୍ରପୁର,୨୭।୬ ଦିଲ୍ଲୀପ ସାମଲ : ଚମାଖଣ୍ଡି ଥାନା ଅଧୀନ କାଳିଆବାଲି ଛକ ନିକଟସ୍ଥ ରାସ୍ତାରେ ଏକ ଅଜଣା ଗାଡ଼ି ଧକ୍କାରେ ଜଣେ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଙ୍କର ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ଘଟିଛି। ମୃତକ ହେଲେ କାଳିଆବାଲି ଗ୍ରାମର ଏସ୍. ଦାଲେୟା ରେଡ୍ଡୀ (୪୮) ବୋଲି ଜଣାପଡ଼ିଛି।
ସୂଚନା ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ବିଳମ୍ବିତ ରାତିରେ ଏସ୍. ଦାଲେୟା ରେଡ୍ଡୀ ନିଜ ଗ୍ରାମକୁ ଫେରୁଥିବା ବେଳେ କାଳିଆବାଲି ଛକ ନିକଟରେ ଏକ ଅଜଣା ଗାଡ଼ି ତାଙ୍କୁ ଧକ୍କା ଦେଇ ଘଟଣାସ୍ଥଳରୁ ଫେରାର ହୋଇଯାଇଥିଲା। ଫଳରେ ତାଙ୍କର ଘଟଣାସ୍ଥଳରେ ହିଁ ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ଘଟିଥିଲା।
ଖବର ପାଇ ଚମାଖଣ୍ଡି ଥାନା ପୋଲିସ ଓ ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ଗ୍ରାମବାସୀ ଘଟଣାସ୍ଥଳରେ ପହଞ୍ଚିଥିଲେ। ତେବେ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା ଘଟାଇଥିବା ଗାଡ଼ିର କୌଣସି ସନ୍ଧାନ ମିଳିନଥିଲା। ପୋଲିସ ମୃତଦେହକୁ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କରି କେସ୍ ନଂ–୨୨୬/୨୦୨୬ରେ ଏକ ଅପମୃତ୍ୟୁ ମାମଲା ରୁଜୁ କରିଛି। ପରେ ମୃତଦେହ ବ୍ୟବଛେଦ ପାଇଁ ଛତ୍ରପୁର ଉପଖଣ୍ଡ ଚିକିତ୍ସାଳୟକୁ ପଠାଯାଇଥିଲା। ଘଟଣାକୁ ନେଇ ପୋଲିସର ତଦନ୍ତ ଜାରି ରହିଛି।
ଏସ୍. ଦାଲେୟା ରେଡ୍ଡୀଙ୍କ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣାଜନତ ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ଖବର ପାଇ ଛତ୍ରପୁର ବିଧାୟକ କୃଷ୍ଣ ଚନ୍ଦ୍ର ନାୟକ ଛତ୍ରପୁର ଉପଖଣ୍ଡ ଚିକିତ୍ସାଳୟରେ ପହଞ୍ଚି ମୃତକଙ୍କ ଶେଷ ଦର୍ଶନ କରିବା ସହ ପରିବାରବର୍ଗଙ୍କୁ ସମବେଦନା ଜଣାଇଥିଲେ।
ସେହିପରି ଶ୍ରୀରାମଚନ୍ଦ୍ରପୁର ପଞ୍ଚାୟତର ସରପଞ୍ଚ ଏସ୍. ସଞ୍ଜୀବ ରେଡ୍ଡୀ ମୃତକଙ୍କ ପରିବାରକୁ ସରକାରଙ୍କ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଆବଶ୍ୟକ ସହାୟତା ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିବାକୁ ପ୍ରଶାସନ ନିକଟରେ ଅନୁରୋଧ କରିଛନ୍ତି।

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

The post ଅଜଣା ଗାଡ଼ି ଧକ୍କାରେ ଜଣେ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଙ୍କ ମୃତ୍ୟୁ : ପୋଲିସର ତଦନ୍ତ ଜାରି appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: ఎంజీయూ లా కాలేజీ పార్ట్ టైం అధ్యాపకుల ఎంపికకు దరఖాస్తుల ఆహ్వానం
description: న‌ల్ల‌గొండ‌లోని మహాత్మాగాంధీ విశ్వవిద్యాలయంలో నూతనంగా ఏర్పాటు అయిన లా కళాశాల ఈ విద్యా సంవత్సరం నుండి తరగతులు ప్రారంభం కానున్న దృష్ట్యా అధ్యాపకుల ఎంపికకు రిజిస్ట్రార్ ఆచార్య కొప్పుల అంజిరెడ్డి నోటిఫికేషన్ జారీ చేశారు. పార్ట్ టైం అధ్యాపకులు..
content: రామ‌గిరి, జూన్ 27 : న‌ల్ల‌గొండ‌లోని మహాత్మాగాంధీ విశ్వవిద్యాలయంలో నూతనంగా ఏర్పాటు అయిన లా కళాశాల ఈ విద్యా సంవత్సరం నుండి తరగతులు ప్రారంభం కానున్న దృష్ట్యా అధ్యాపకుల ఎంపికకు రిజిస్ట్రార్ ఆచార్య కొప్పుల అంజిరెడ్డి నోటిఫికేషన్ జారీ చేశారు. పార్ట్ టైం అధ్యాపకులు ఎల్.ఎల్.బి, ఎల్ ఎల్ ఎం విభాగాలలో, ఫ్యామిలీ లా, కానిస్టిట్యూష‌న్ లా, లా ఆఫ్ కాంట్రాక్ట్, లా ఆఫ్ టార్ట్, లా ఆఫ్ ఎన్విరాన్‌మెంట్‌, ఇంటలెక్చువల్ ప్రాపర్టీ లా స్పెషలైజేషన్‌లో ఎంపికలు జరగనున్నాయి. ఎల్ ఎల్ ఎం లో కనీసం 60 శాతం మార్కులతో పాటు బార్ కౌన్సిల్ ఆఫ్ ఇండియా గుర్తింపు కలిగిన విశ్వవిద్యాలయాల నుండి సంబంధిత సబ్జెక్ట్‌లో పీహెచ్‌డీ అలాగే బోధన అనుభవంతో కూడిన అర్హత కలిగిన అభ్యర్థులు తమ దరఖాస్తులను జూలై 10న 4 గంటల లోపు రిజిస్ట్రార్ కార్యాలయంలో సమర్పించవలసిందిగా తెలిపారు.

title: കലാച്ചി-സിൻ കോപ്പിയടി വിവാദം; നിയമനടപടിക്കൊരുങ്ങി കെ ആർ മീര, ഹരിത സാവിത്രിക്ക് വക്കീൽ നോട്ടീസ് അയച്ചു
description: കോപ്പിയടി വിവാദത്തിൽ ഹരിത സാവിത്രിക്ക് കെ ആർ മീര വക്കീൽ നോട്ടീസ് അയച്ചു. ഫേസ്ബുക്ക് പോസ്റ്റിലൂടെ കെ ആർ മീര തന്നെയാണ് ഈ വിവരം പുറത്തുവിട്ടത്. ഹരിത ഉയർത്തിയ ആരോപണങ്ങളും ആക്ഷേപങ്ങളും സമൂഹത്തിൽ അവമതിപ്പ് ഉണ്ടാക്കിയെന്നാണ് കെ ആർ മീരയുടെ ആരോപണം.
content: <p><strong>തിരുവനന്തപുരം:</strong> കലാച്ചി- സിൻ കോപ്പിയടി വിവാദത്തിൽ നിയമനടപടിക്കൊരുങ്ങി എഴുത്തുകാരി കെ ആർ മീര. ഹരിത സാവിത്രിക്ക് കെ ആർ മീര വക്കീൽ നോട്ടീസ് അയച്ചു. ഫേസ്ബുക്ക് പോസ്റ്റിലൂടെ കെ ആർ മീര തന്നെയാണ് ഈ വിവരം പുറത്തുവിട്ടത്. ഹരിത ഉയർത്തിയ ആരോപണങ്ങളും ആക്ഷേപങ്ങളും സമൂഹത്തിൽ അവമതിപ്പ് ഉണ്ടാക്കിയെന്നാണ് കെ ആർ മീരയുടെ ആരോപണം.</p><p>സിന്നിന്‍റെ എഴുത്തുകാരി ഹരിത ഒരു ഫേസ്ബുക്ക് പോസ്റ്റ് ഇട്ടതിന് പിന്നാലെയാണ് കോപ്പിയടി വിവാദം ചൂടുപിടിച്ചത്. കാമുകനെ തേടി വിദേശത്തെ സംഘർഷ മേഖലയിലെത്തുന്ന യുവതിയുടെ കഥയാണ് നോവലുകളുടെ ഇതിവൃത്തം. കസാക്കിസ്ഥാനിലെ കലാച്ചിയിലെ കഥ കെ ആർ മീര പറയുമ്പോൾ, കൂർദിനിലെ കഥയാണ് ഹരിത എഴുതിയത്. 2022 ലാണ് സിൻ പുറത്തിറങ്ങിയത്. 2023 ൽ പുസ്തകത്തിന് കേരള സാഹിത്യ അക്കാദമി അവാർഡ് കിട്ടി. 2025 ലാണ് കെ ആർ മീരയുടെ കലാച്ചി പുറത്തിറങ്ങിയത്. 2025 ലാണ് കലാച്ചി ഇറങ്ങിയതെങ്കിലും 2020 ൽ തന്നെ പുസ്തകത്തിന്‍റെ ആദ്യഭാഗങ്ങൾ ഒരു ഓൺലൈൻ മാധ്യമത്തിൽ പ്രസിദ്ധീകരിച്ചെന്നാണ് കെ ആർ മീരയുടെ വാദം. എന്നാൽ ഇതിനെയും ഹരിത സാവിത്രി തള്ളുന്നു.</p><h2>കെ ആർ മീരയുടെ ഫേസ്ബുക്ക് പോസ്റ്റ്</h2><p>എന്റെ പ്രിയ വായനക്കാരുടെയും എന്നെ സ്നേഹിക്കുന്നവരുടെയും പൊതു സമൂഹത്തിന്റെയും അറിവിലേക്ക് :</p><p>എന്റെ 'കലാച്ചി' എന്ന നോവലിനെയും 'കലാച്ചി'യുടെ രചയിതാവ് എന്ന നിലയിൽ എന്നെയും സംബന്ധിച്ച്, സമൂഹ മാധ്യമങ്ങളിലും പൊതു മണ്ഡലത്തിലും ശ്രീമതി ഹരിത സാവിത്രി ഉയർത്തിയ ആരോപണങ്ങളും ആക്ഷേപങ്ങളും പൊതുസമൂഹത്തിന്റെയും വായനക്കാരുടെയും മുമ്പിൽ എന്നെ അപകീർത്തിപ്പെടുത്തണം എന്ന ദുരുദ്ദേശ്യത്തോടെ മാത്രമാണ് എന്ന് എനിക്ക് ബോധ്യപ്പെട്ടിട്ടുണ്ട്.</p><p>ശ്രീമതി ഹരിത സാവിത്രി ഉയർത്തിയ ആരോപണങ്ങളും ആക്ഷേപങ്ങളും സമൂഹമധ്യത്തിൽ എന്നെപ്പറ്റി അവമതിപ്പ് സൃഷ്ടിച്ചതായും എനിക്കു ബോധ്യമുണ്ട്. ഈ സാഹചര്യത്തിൽ, ഇതുസംബന്ധിച്ചുള്ള നിയമ നടപടികൾക്കു മുന്നോടിയായി അഡ്വ. എൻ.കെ ഉണ്ണികൃഷ്ണൻ മുഖേന ഹരിത സാവിത്രിക്ക് ഒരു ലീഗൽ നോട്ടീസ് അയച്ചുകഴിഞ്ഞു. നോട്ടീസിൽ ഞാൻ ആവശ്യപ്പെട്ട വിധത്തിലുള്ള നടപടികൾ, നോട്ടീസിൽ രേഖപ്പെടുത്തിയ തീയതിക്കകം</p><p>ശ്രീമതി ഹരിത സാവിത്രി കൈക്കൊള്ളാത്തപക്ഷം നീതിക്കായി കോടതിയെ സമീപിക്കുകമാത്രമേ എനിക്കു മാർഗമുള്ളൂ. ലീഗൽ നോട്ടീസിനുള്ള ഹരിത സാവിത്രിയുടെ മറുപടി ലഭിച്ചശേഷം ബാക്കി വിവരങ്ങൾ അറിയിക്കാം.</p><p>സ്നേഹത്തോടെ,</p><p>കെ ആർ മീര</p><p></p>

title: Christian Pulisic refuses to break silence as Mauricio Pochettino rages at media
description: Christian Pulisic returned to the USMNT lineup but could not help the United States beat Turkey, as Mauricio Pochettino expressed confusion at the gloomy reaction from the press
content: Christian Pulisic failed to field questions from journalists following the loss to Turkey -Credit:FREDERIC J. BROWN, AFP via Getty ImagesDuring his nearly 40-minute World Cup comeback, Christian Pulisic delivered one of the standout individual performances on the field. The American skipper came on with the score tied at two against Turkey, but he couldn't guide his team to victory. A late strike from Kaan Ayhan, created by a brilliant piece of magic from Arda Guler, proved decisive in Turkey's 3-2 victory. Pulisic's mere appearance on the pitch following battles with a persistent calf problem picked up in training — aggravated during the USMNT's opening 4-1 victory over Paraguay — energized the crowd at Los Angeles Stadium. He threatened on several occasions, particularly with a fine left-footed effort from distance. Australian soccer fans' anti-Donald Trump chant could spark World Cup controversyBoston set for post-World Cup baby boom as partying Scotland fans 'restore faith in men'World Cup participants aren't required to engage with media in the mixed zone following matches. Pulisic, seemingly frustrated by the loss, bypassed the assembled journalists and made his way directly to the team bus as public relations staff blocked reporters. The AC Milan attacker registered three attempts, struck the woodwork, and recorded 0.62 xG.He completed all 12 of his passes, logged 10 successful, and drew three fouls from the aggressive Turkish backline. Pulisic has scored just once in his World Cup career, though it was a crucial goal: the lone tally in a 1-0 triumph over Iran at the 2022 competition that sealed the team's progression to the knockout stage.Pochettino rotated nine players from last Friday's 2-0 victory over Australia, keeping only makeshift captain Weston McKennie — possibly solely because of Christian Roldan's unavailability — and Ricardo Pepi, filling in for Pulisic. The four players carrying yellow cards — Chris Richards, Tyler Adams, Antonee Robinson, and Folarin Balogun — were left out of the squad.Another booking would have triggered their suspension for next Wednesday's Round of 32 clash against Bosnia and Herzegovina. Pochettino acknowledged feeling "confused" by the seemingly downbeat mood among reporters following the outcome, noting that his squad had achieved its pre-World Cup objectives."I'm happy. Maybe I'm not showing because your questions are a little bit weird," he said in his press conference. "I'm confused, maybe the vibes are like we go home tonight and Turkiye stays [in the World Cup], no?"Pochettino then highlighted the squad's achievements, switching between Spanish and English. "At the moment, no one congratulated us for finishing first in our group," he said to reporters. "I congratulate the players, the staff, and the fans on finishing first in a very difficult group. "We ended up being No. 1, and we managed all the pressure and the expectations quite well. We had other priorities. We wanted to win. We did want the victory, but there are other things we needed to balance out, and that's how I made the decisions."

title: 194 ఏళ్ల ‘జొనాథన్’ కలిసిన ప్రధాని మోదీ
description: Narendra Modi: భారత ప్రధాని నరేంద్ర మోదీ తన సెషెల్స్ పర్యటనలో ఒక అరుదైన అతిథిని కలుసుకున్నారు. భూమిపై జీవిస్తున్న అత్యంత పెద్ద వయసు గల భూచర...
content:
Narendra Modi: భారత ప్రధాని నరేంద్ర మోదీ తన సెషెల్స్ పర్యటనలో ఒక అరుదైన అతిథిని కలుసుకున్నారు. భూమిపై జీవిస్తున్న అత్యంత పెద్ద వయసు గల భూచర జీవిగా గిన్నిస్ వరల్డ్ రికార్డుల్లోకెక్కిన ‘జోనాథన్’ అనే తాబేలును ఆయన సందర్శించారు. సెషెల్స్ జాతీయ దినోత్సవ వేడుకలకు ముఖ్య అతిథిగా విచ్చేసిన ప్రధాని మోదీ.. అక్కడి నేషనల్ బొటానికల్ గార్డెన్స్‌కు వెళ్లిన సమయంలో ఈ అద్భుత జీవిని ఆసక్తిగా తిలకించారు.







Read also: Venezuela earthquake : వెనిజులా విలవిల







194 ఏళ్ల వయసు.. పర్యాటకులకు ప్రధాన ఆకర్షణ



అల్డాబ్రా జాతికి చెందిన జోనాథన్ అనే ఈ భారీ తాబేలు వయస్సు దాదాపు 194 సంవత్సరాలు. ఇది 1832వ సంవత్సరంలో జన్మించి ఉంటుందని శాస్త్రవేత్తల అంచనా. వృద్ధాప్యం కారణంగా ప్రస్తుతం దీనికి కంటిచూపు మందగించింది. వాసన చూసే సామర్థ్యం కూడా కొద్దిగా తగ్గింది. అయినప్పటికీ, జోనాథన్ ఇప్పటికీ పూర్తి ఆరోగ్యంతో సంచరిస్తూ సెషెల్స్ వచ్చే సందర్శకులను విశేషంగా ఆకట్టుకుంటోంది. ఈ పర్యటన జ్ఞాపకార్థం ప్రధాని మోదీ పర్యావరణ పరిరక్షణ సందేశాన్ని ఇస్తూ ఆ బొటానికల్ గార్డెన్స్‌లో ఒక మొక్కను కూడా నాటారు.



Narendra Modi: భారత్ – సెషెల్స్ 50 ఏళ్ల దౌత్య బంధం



భారతదేశం, సెషెల్స్ దేశాల మధ్య దౌత్యపరమైన బంధం ఏర్పడి 50 వసంతాలు పూర్తయిన తరుణంలో ప్రధాని మోదీ ఈ పర్యటన చేపట్టడం గమనార్హం. ఇరు దేశాల మధ్య సముద్ర తీర భద్రత, బ్లూ ఎకానమీ (సముద్ర ఆధారిత ఆర్థిక వనరులు), వాతావరణ మార్పుల నిరోధం వంటి కీలక రంగాలలో ద్వైపాక్షిక సహకారాన్ని మరింత పటిష్టం చేసుకోవడమే ఈ పర్యటన ప్రధాన ఎజెండా. అంతర్జాతీయ చర్చల నడుమ ప్రధాని మోదీ మరియు జోనాథన్ తాబేలుకు సంబంధించిన ఈ భేటీ ఫోటోలు, వీడియోలు ప్రస్తుతం సోషల్ మీడియాలో నెటిజన్లను విపరీతంగా ఆకట్టుకుంటూ వైరల్‌గా మారాయి.

title: WIW vs IREW | టాస్ గెలిచిన ఐర్లాండ్.. విండీస్ సెమీస్ చేరేనా..!
description: WIW vs IREW : మహిళల టీ20 ప్రపంచకప్‌ చివరి లీగ్ మ్యాచ్‌లో ఐర్లాండ్‌ను ఢీకొడుతోంది వెస్టిండీస్. గ్రూప్ బీ నుంచి సెమీస్ రేసులో నిలిచిన విండీస్ విజయంతో బెర్తు పట్టేయాలనుకుంటోంది.
content:
WIW vs IREW : మహిళల టీ20 ప్రపంచకప్‌ చివరి లీగ్ మ్యాచ్‌లో ఐర్లాండ్‌ను ఢీకొడుతోంది వెస్టిండీస్. గ్రూప్ బీ నుంచి సెమీస్ రేసులో నిలిచిన విండీస్ విజయంతో బెర్తు పట్టేయాలనుకుంటోంది. టాస్ గెలిచిన ఐరిష్‌ కెప్టె్న్ గబీ లెవిస్ బౌలింగ్ ఎంచుకుంది. భారీ స్కోర్ బాదేసి ప్రత్యర్థిని తక్కువకే ఆలౌట్ చేయడంపై విండీస్ దృష్టి సారించనుంది.
హ్యాట్రిక్ విజయాలతో సెమీస్‌కు చేరువైన వెస్టిండీస్‌కు ఇంగ్లండ్ షాకిచ్చింది.  38 పరుగుల తేడాతో ఇంగ్లండ్ చేతిలో ఓటమితో రెండో స్థానంలో కొనసాగుతున్న కరీబియన్ జట్టుకు ఐర్లాండ్‌ను ఓటించడం చాలా ముఖ్యం. ఈ మ్యాచ్ గెలిస్తే 8 పాయింట్లతో నాకౌట్‌కు దూసుకెళ్తుంది.
ఐర్లాండ్ తుది జట్టు : అమీ హంటర్‌(వికెట్ కీపర్), గబీ లెవిస్‌(కెప్టెన్), ఒర్లా ప్రెండెర్గాస్ట్, రెబెక్కా స్టాక్‌వెల్, లీహ్ పౌల్, అలిసే టెక్టర్, లూయిస్ లిటిల్, అర్లెనె కెల్లీ, ఐమీ మగురీ, కార ముర్రే, జనే మగురీ.
వెస్టిండీస్ తుది జట్టు : హీలీ మాథ్యూస్‌(కెప్టెన్), క్వియానా జోసెఫ్, షెమైనే క్యాంప్‌బెల్‌(వికెట్ కీపర్), స్టాఫానీ టేలర్, డియాండ్ర డాటిన్, చినెల్లె హెన్రీ, జహజర క్లాక్స్‌టన్, జన్నిల్లీ గ్లాస్గో, అలియా అలీనా, అఫీ ఫ్లెచర్, అష్మిని మునిసర్.

title: Mattapan Shooting: 1 Dead, 4 Injured in Overnight Shooting in Boston's Neighborhood
description: Investigators have not yet determined what led to the shooting, and no arrests have been announced. Police have also not said whether they believe one or multiple shooters were involved.
content: One person was killed and four others were injured in a late-night shooting in Boston's Mattapan neighborhood, prompting an active police investigation.According to the Boston Police Department, officers responded to reports of gunfire around 1:45 a.m. Saturday in the area of 1460 Blue Hill Avenue. When they arrived, they found five people suffering from gunshot wounds.Emergency medical personnel transported all five victims to nearby hospitals. Police later confirmed that one of the victims died from injuries sustained in the shooting. Authorities said all five victims appear to be adult males.The conditions of the four surviving victims have not been released.Investigators have not yet determined what led to the shooting, and no arrests have been announced. Police have also not said whether they believe one or multiple shooters were involved.The area was secured as detectives and forensic teams processed the crime scene early Saturday morning.Boston police described the case as an active and ongoing investigation and said additional details will be released as they become available.Authorities are asking anyone with information about the shooting to contact the Boston Police Department as the investigation continues.

title: वाशिम में उद्धव ठाकरे का भाजपा और दलबदलुओं पर हमला, बोले- जनता विश्वासघात माफ नहीं करेगी
description: Uddhav Thackeray In Washim : वाशिम में आयोजित शिवसेना (यूबीटी) कार्यकर्ता सम्मेलन में उद्धव ठाकरे ने भाजपा और दलबदल करने वाले नेताओं पर तीखा हमला बोला।
content:
Washim Shiv Sena UBT: सत्ता की लालच में जनता का विश्वास तोड़ने वाले नेताओं को जनता कभी माफ नहीं करेगी, यह विचार शिवसेना प्रमुख उद्धव ठाकरे ने वाशिम के अकोला नाका स्थित जैन भवन में आयोजित भव्य कार्यकर्ता सम्मेलन में प्रकट किए।
उन्होंने दलबदल करने वाले जनप्रतिनिधियों और भाजपा पर शब्दों का तीव्र हमला किया। सठाकरे ने वाशिमयवतमाल लोकसभा क्षेत्र की जनता से क्षमा मांगते हुए कहा, मैं यहां सबसे पहले जनता से माफी मांगने आया हूं। आपने जिस सांसद को विश्वास के साथ चुनकर संसद भेजा था, उसने जनता के भरोसे को तोड़ते हुए सत्ता का साथ दिया।
उद्धव ठाकरे ने वाशिम में मांगी जनता से माफी
यह केवल पार्टी ही नहीं, बल्कि मतदाताओं के साथ भी विश्वासघात है। उन्होंने कहा कि यदि केवल विकास कार्यों के लिए सत्ता के सामने झुकना ही रास्ता होता, तो कई वरिष्ठ नेताओं ने भी ऐसा किया होता, लेकिन उन्होंने कभी अपने सिद्धांतों और विचारधारा से समझौता नहीं किया। आज कुछ लोग केवल पद और सत्ता के लिए विचार धारा छोड़ रहे हैं।
शिवसेना का हिंदुत्व लोगों को जोड़ने वाला है। अब भाजपा मुक्त राम की आवश्यकता है। उन्होंने कहा, गद्दार चले गए, नमक हराम चले गए, लेकिन निष्ठावान शिवसैनिक आज भी हमारे साथ खड़े हैं। राज्य सरकार को घेरते हुए कहा कि उनका संकल्प केवल कर्जमाफी नहीं, बल्कि किसानों को पूरी तरह कर्ज मुक्त करना है।
भाजपा और दलबदलुओं पर साधा निशाना
वाशिम और यवतमाल जैसे जिलों में बड़ी संख्या में किसानों ने आत्महत्या की, लेकिन सरकार संवेदनहीन बनी रही। राम मंदिर के मुद्दे पर उन्होंने कहा कि लोकसभा चुनाव में भाजपा ने अबकी बार 400 पार का नारा दिया था, जबकि उन्होंने वाशिम में अबकी बार भाजपा तड़ीपार का नारा दिया था।
गद्दारों को जनता सबक सिखाएगी: राऊत
राज्यसभा सांसद संजय राऊत ने कहा कि वे गद्दारों का दुख मनाने वाशिम आए हैं। उन्होंने आरोप लगाया कि राम मंदिर के नाम पर राजनीति करने वाले दलों के साथ गद्दार चले गए हैं और वे शिवसेना को समाप्त करना चाहते हैं।
ये भी पढ़े:  नागपुर कोर्ट अपडेट: मुआवजे के आदेश की अनदेखी पर फंसे NHAI अफसर, HC ने पूछा- क्यों न चलाएं अवमानना का केस? 
उन्होंने कहा कि ठाकरे नाम और निष्ठावान शिवसैनिकों की ताकत के सामने शिवसेना को खत्म करने के सभी प्रयास विफल रहे हैं। सांसद अरविंद सावंत ने कहा कि छत्रपति शिवाजी महाराज के शिव राज्याभिषेक दिवस जैसे पावन अवसर पर आयोजित यह सम्मेलन गद्दारों को सबक सिखाने का संकल्प लेने का अवसर है। कार्यक्रम में कव्हरे, बालाजी वानखेडे, गजानन देशमुख सहित बड़ी संख्या में पदाधिकारी और कार्यकर्ता उपस्थित रहे।

title: Emma Raducanu postpones pre-Wimbledon press conference as injury fears grow
description: Raducanu will leave a decision on whether to play in Monday’s first-round against Antonio Ruzic to the very last minute
content: Emma Raducanu postponed her pre-Wimbledon press conference after cutting a practice session short, increasing the fears that the British No 1 could be forced to this year’s tournament through injury.Raducanu has been managing a foot problem since reaching the Queen’s final this month and appeared at the All England Club on Saturday with her right ankle strapped in protective tape.The 23-year-old took part in a training session at the Aorangi training centre atmidday before playing a practice session on Court 3 with world No 20 Anna Kalinskaya at 1pm.Despite intially appearing in good spirits and moving freely, Raducanu appeared to wrap up the session around 10 minutes earlier than planned after playing, and losing, four games in a row, Raducanu’s scheduled press conference for later in the afternoon was then rearranged for tomorrow, with the time of her pre-tournament media appearance still to be confirmed. It appears Raducanu is giving herself as much time as possible to manage the injury, but time is running out ahead of her scheduled first-round match against Croatia’s Antonio Ruzic on Monday.Raducanu, who could again meet world No 1 Aryna Sabalenka in the third round in a repeat of last year, did not turn up for her scheduled practice session on Thursday having reportedly been seen wearing a protective boot the previous evening.Her team confirmed she is managing a niggle and she did not appear on the practice schedule for Friday, either. Raducanu returned to the court on Saturday but this latest development is another concern. Raducanu reached her third career final when she impressively battled to the final of Queen’s in front of her home fans in west London, losing the final to former Wimbledon semi-finalist Donna Vekic. Former US Open champion Raducanu made the fourth round of Wimbledon on her debut at the tournament in 2021, and equalled that result in 2024 before losing to Sabalenka in the third round last year. Raducanu, the 32nd seed at Wimbledon, is scheduled to open play on her favoured Court No 1 at 1pm on Monday, facing the world No 60 Ruzic from Croatia.

title: Matthew Stafford and Myles Garrett both nominated for ESPY awards
description: Each coming off an award-winning season, Matthew Stafford and Myles Garrett are both up for major honors at this year's ESPYS.
content: Matthew Stafford has built up quite the trophy collection during his 17-year NFL career thus far, winning Comeback Player of the Year in 2011, a Super Bowl in 2021 and league MVP last season.He has a chance to add a few more awards this summer, too, as does Myles Garrett after winning Defensive Player of the Year.ESPN announced nominees for this year’s ESPY Awards, which take place on July 15 at the David H. Koch Theater at Lincoln Center, and Stafford is up for two major awards. He’s been nominated for Best Athlete in men’s sports and Best NFL Player, which are two of the more prominent honors at the ESPYS.Garrett is also a nominee for Best NFL Player, so he'll be competing with Stafford for that honor.Here are the other nominees for those awards.Best Athlete, Men’s SportsJalen Brunson, New York KnicksLionel Messi, Inter Miami CFShohei Ohtani, Los Angeles DodgersMatthew Stafford, Los Angeles RamsBest NFL PlayerMyles Garrett, Cleveland BrownsDrake Maye, New England PatriotsJaxon Smith-Njigba, Seattle SeahawksMatthew Stafford, Los Angeles RamsThe Rams are connected to one other award, but not in a good way. Caleb Williams’ game-tying touchdown pass against the Rams in the divisional round is nominated for Best Play, as he sent the game to overtime with one of the most improbable touchdown passes in league history.Stafford has some stiff competition in both categories, particularly Best Athlete. Brunson just led the Knicks on a historic playoff run, Messi was electric for Inter Miami in the MLS this season and Ohtani is, well, Ohtani.In terms of Best NFL Player, it should come down to Garrett and Stafford. Stafford beat out Maye for MVP, and Smith-Njigba had a great season but Stafford led the league in touchdown passes and passing yards. Garrett, however, set the NFL’s all-time record with 23 sacks in one season, so he has a strong case, too.This article originally appeared on Rams Wire: Matthew Stafford and Myles Garrett both nominated for ESPY awards

title: USC countdown to kickoff: Recalling Trojans OL Booker Brown
description: Today, we go back to the early 1970s and recall the USC career of the late Booker Brown
content: Countdown to kickoff is back! USC will kick off its 2026 football season on August 29 when the Trojans host San Jose State at the Coliseum. In this series, we will be counting down the days until the season opener by highlighting a notable Trojan who wore each number.There are not a ton of recent options for the number 63, so today, we take it way back to the early 1970s and look at former USC All-American offensive lineman Booker Brown.Position: Offensive lineYears played at USC: 1972-1973Career highlights: After spending the first two years of his college career at the junior college level, Brown transferred to USC in 1972. Although he did not begin the season as a starter, injuries on the offensive line forced him into the starting lineup, where he thrived. The 1972 Trojans would go on to win the national championship, putting together one of the greatest seasons in college football history. As a senior the following year, Brown earned consensus first-team All-American honors.After USC: Although the Houston Oilers selected Brown in the sixth round of the 1974 NFL draft, he instead elected to sign with the Southern California Sun of the new World Football League (WFL), who took him in the third round of the league's draft. However, the WFL shut down after less than two years, leading Brown to move to the NFL in 1975. He spent three seasons with the San Diego Chargers, who had acquired his rights from Houston in a trade.In 1978, Brown was traded to the Tampa Bay Buccaneers, reuniting him with John McKay, his head coach from his time at USC. However, he never played in a regular season game for the team, as he missed the entire 1978 season due to an injury and was released prior to the start of the 1979 campaign.Brown passed away in 2022 at the age of 69.This article originally appeared on Trojans Wire: USC countdown to kickoff: Recalling Trojans OL Booker Brown

title: Pirates’ Konnor Griffin Out to Prove Himself in 2nd Half, Off to Good Start
description: PITTSBURGH — It had been nearly a month since the Pirates had Konnor Griffin in the lineup, but the star […] The post Pirates’ Konnor Griffin Out to Prove Himself in 2nd Half, Off to Good Start appeared first on Pittsburgh Baseball Now.
content: Photo provided by Eddie ProvidentPITTSBURGH — It had been nearly a month since the Pirates had Konnor Griffin in the lineup, but the star rookie wasted no time making an impact in his first game back off the injured list. The Pirates placed Griffin on the 10-day IL on May 31 with a right forearm strain but reinstated him prior to Friday night’s game against the Reds at PNC Park.After nearly four weeks out of action, Griffin was slotted into the top spot of the lineup and hit a leadoff homer to deep left field on the second pitch he saw from Reds left-handed starter Andrew Abbott. He became the fifth-youngest player in MLB history to hit a leadoff home run. “That was pretty cool,” he said. “Good to be back out there and feel one leave the bat like that. That was fun.”CAN CONFIRM. https://t.co/Va3Ecqc4oGpic.twitter.com/lvX8nNbZOd— Pittsburgh Pirates (@Pirates) June 26, 2026Griffin finished 2 for 4 with his solo home run and was also hit by a pitch in his first game back with the Pirates.“It’s good to have him back. He’s a difference maker,” said Paul Skenes, who started for the Pirates on Friday night. “It’s good to see him back on the field.”Griffin needed a brief one-game rehab assignment with Double-A Altoona beofre he was deemed ready to come back. Griffin, who was still the youngest player on the Curve’s roster at 20 years old, went 2 for 2 with a home run, a triple and three RBI while playing seven innings at short on Wednesday.“It feels good to be back out there,” Griffin said following Friday’s game. “I felt the adrenaline rush, the good nerves. It was good to be back out there in front of the fans.”Prior to his stint on the IL, Griffin compiled a .270/.327/.402 batting line with nine doubles, two triples, four home runs, 22 RBI and 14 stolen bases. While any time spent sidelined is hard on a player, the timing of Griffin’s injury was particularly unfortunate.As most rookies do, Griffin experienced growing pains during his first few weeks in the big leagues, but he started to find his groove on the day he turned 20. Over his last 32 games played dating back to April 24 before he was placed on the IL, Griffin had a strong .317/.370/.488 batting line to go along with seven doubles, a triple, four home runs, 14 RBI and 10 steals.In addition to his improving offense and baserunning prowess, Griffin provided steady defense at short with three defensive runs saved in his first 49 games.“I think you can feel the energy,” manager Don Kelly said before the game. “To have him back at short, just the way that (he plays) shortstop, the impact on the bases, the impact at the plate. To have him back in the lineup is a big plus for us.”With a chance to refresh, although not one by choice, Griffin is out to prove himself during the season’s second half, even more than he did during his first eight weeks in the big leagues. “I feel recovered. I’m looking to attack the second half as strong as I can,” he explained. “There were ups and downs in the first half for me and I feel like I’ve got a lot to prove. Just gonna take it day by day and go compete.”The post Pirates’ Konnor Griffin Out to Prove Himself in 2nd Half, Off to Good Start appeared first on Pittsburgh Baseball Now.

title: 10 Quick Trips To Take Near Mumbai Before School Reopens
description: Summer vacation is coming to an end soon, and now is the best time to have one last weekend getaway. If you are looking for a beach destination, a misty hill station, or even camping by a lake, Mumbai provides plenty of destinations in its proximity for an ideal trip.
content: Summer vacation is coming to an end soon, and now is the best time to have one last weekend getaway. If you are looking for a beach destination, a misty hill station, or even camping by a lake, Mumbai provides plenty of destinations in its proximity for an ideal trip.10 Quick Trips To Take Near Mumbai Before School ReopensAs the season ends, you might find yourself with an extremely busy schedule of homework and classes. However, before settling into the hustle and bustle of regular life, there may be nothing more rejuvenating than having a quick escape without requiring leave and a whole lot of plans. Here are some places near Mumbai that provide a perfect getaway before the school routines are back in action. (Credits: Pinterest)AlibaugAlibaug is a great place to unwind with the ocean waves before getting ready for a busy week ahead. The beautiful beaches, ferry transport from Mumbai, and laid-back seafront cafes will make you feel like you are enjoying your vacation in no time. The Kolaba fort and the Varsoli beach are other attractions that make it even more appealing. There are 2 main ways to go to Alibaug from Mumbai - by ferry (43 km, 45 to 50 minutes) or by driving (98 km2.5 to 3.5 hours). (Credits: Pinterest)KashidKashid Beach is a relatively clean and uncrowded place to have an impromptu beach holiday. The sandy shore, gentle water, and relaxing atmosphere of the beach will provide the best relaxation opportunity before hectic schedules start again. It is close to Mumbai and can be a great option when you want to avoid crowded weekend beaches. It is 130 kms away from Mumbai and will approximately take 3 hours to reach there. (Credits: Pinterest)LonavlaA perfect place to quickly escape Mumbai, and spend some time away from routine before heading back to school, Lonavla, has green valleys, waterfalls, and misty views all around it that provides immediate relaxation. Bhushi Dam and Tiger Point are some spots you should visit here for a break. It is 88.1 km from Mumbai and will approximately take 2 hours to reach there. (Credits: Pinterest)MatheranMatheran is an unusual hill station that has never been invaded by automobiles - making it the perfect destination to unwind in before returning to your hectic academic life. With its thick forests and mist-laden outlooks, Matheran gives you toy trains to ride on, walks to take, and evenings filled with breathtaking sunsets, all in complete absence of traffic and hustle. It is 80-95 km from Mumbai and will approximately take 2-3 hours to reach there. (Credits: Pinterest)KarjatKarjat is an exciting place that is easily reachable from Mumbai, hence making it suitable for last-minute weekend trips. The destination is endowed with many adventure activities like hiking trails, river side accommodation, and farming facilities. Its proximity and variety of activities make it perfect for families as well as students seeking a change before going back to school. It is 68 km from Mumbai and will approximately take 2 hours to reach there. (Credits: Pinterest)Pawna LakeThe Pawna Lake is a famous camping site where one can enjoy beautiful sunsets and fire pits. You can also camp at night and gaze at the amazing stars that are visible in the sky. The perfect place for an impromptu group or couples trip, it offers the visitor a refreshing break from the urban setting near Mumbai. It is 115 km from Mumbai and will approximately take 2 hours to reach there. (Credits: Pinterest)BhandardaraBhandardara is an idyllic lakeside destination, nestled amidst the Western Ghats range and perfect for a tranquil last-minute holiday destination before school starts. Complete with Arthur Lake, Randha Falls and stargazing camping sites, Bhandardara is different from the popular hill stations. The peaceful environment and beautiful scenery makes it a great place to relax. It is 186 km from Mumbai and will approximately take 4 hours to reach there. (Credits: Pinterest)IgatpuriIt is a tranquil hill station that is aptly suitable for a relaxing getaway before you get into your usual routine. With scenic vistas of Western Ghats and meditation schools like the Vipassana International Academy, Igatpuri ensures that one can take a moment out to relax and reflect. This can be an ideal place for those who want some peace and quiet before the school reopens. It is 148 km from Mumbai and will approximately take 3 hours to reach there. (Credits: Pinterest)KamshetKamshet is an adventurous destination located just outside of Mumbai that serves as an excellent get-away spot right before the hustle of school begins again. Being a paragliding paradise, Kamshet provides ample opportunities to explore wide open skies along with rural locations that can provide you with the most adventurous experience. It is conveniently located close to the city and therefore does not require much planning and effort to go there. It is 103 km from Mumbai and will approximately take 2 hours to reach there. (credits: Pinterest)MahabaleshwarThe place is very popular as a Hill Station destination for a last peaceful weekend before school resumes. This place will offer you all that you need in a Hill Station, such as, cool temperatures, strawberry farms, scenic views, and calm lakes. Mahabaleshwar is suitable for families and students because of places such as Venna Lake, Arthur’s Seat, and Mapro Garden. It is 225 km from Mumbai and will approximately take 5 hours to reach there. (Credits: Pinterest)

title: Why Washing Your Hair on Saturdays is Considered Spiritually Inauspicious
description: Washing one's hair on Saturdays is strongly discouraged in several households across India, and the reason behind it is a mix of Astrology, spirituality.
content: If you come from a spiritually rooted household, chances are you've grown up hearing certain days of the week cordoned off against very specific activities. Being strongly advised to say, not cut your hair or nails on a Tuesday makes for one strong example. The reasons often cited are Tuesdays being the day of both Mars as well as Lord Hanuman. A similar constellation of reasons exist for the equation between not washing your hair on a Saturday.Typically, Saturdays for most of today's working generation, is reserved for rest, recouperation and socialisation - and washing your hair seems like a very natural part of the day, especially if you plan on stepping out later. However, a mix of astrological and religious reasons dissuade one from indulging in the fairly harmless act on the penultimate day of the week. The Astrological ReasonAs per the principles of Vedic Astrology, Saturdays are attributed to the planet Saturn. This is the planet associated with karma, discipline, patience and tough lessons. The planet's energies in itself are considered to be slow and grounding with an emphasis of lesson, learning and introspection. All these themes essentially collapse into one broader one - that is to actively choose restraint and reflection over any form of indulgence. Several astrologers then, tend to consider activities like washing one's hair - which is essentially a grooming ritual - as something best avoided. This is because the act of washing one's hair on a Saturday is believed to 'wash away' any good favour you may have earned with respect to the planet. It is important to mention here that there is no specific religious text or excerpt that clearly cordons off Saturdays for washing your hair. However, over the decades, the practice to typically avoid it has come up as a common adherence, particularly based on astrologers' suggestions. This suggestion becomes even more potent if one is in the midst of personally significant transits like Shani Mahadasha or Sade Sati.The Religious ReasonNow beyond the planet, more particularly, there stands the fact that Saturdays - called 'Shanivaar' in Hindi - are also believed to be the day presided over by Shani Dev, or Lord Shani Himself. Shani Dev is believed to be the taskmaster of the cosmos, and a strict one at that. Saturday's then, have been historically devoted to the cosmic taskmaster, who is worshipped through fasting, prayers and acts of charity. Being a devotee of Shani Dev typically requires one to largely lead a simple life - avoiding overt grooming, indulgences and purchases on Saturdays then are largely discouraged by purists in this sense. This spiritual rationale also ties in with the fact that the hair is believed to carry your 'shakti' - grooming it then is considered to be a disrespect of the deity. Again, these aren't 'rules' mentioned in scriptures but have become a sort of default association with Saturdays over generations worth of adherence. Disclaimer: This article is based on popular beliefs. Times Now is not responsible for the accuracy or completeness of the information and facts provided here.

title: कृति सैनन के कथित बॉयफ्रेंड की दूसरी लड़की संग तस्वीरों ने मचाई हलचल, सोशल मीडिया पर उठे ब्रेकअप के सवाल
description: Kriti Sanon Kabir Bahia Relationship: रेडिट पर वायरल एक पोस्ट में कृति सैनन के कथित बॉयफ्रेंड कबीर बहिया को दूसरी लड़की के साथ देखने का दावा किया गया, जिसके बाद दोनों के ब्रेकअप की अटकलें तेज हो गईं।
content:
Kriti Sanon Kabir Bahia Breakup Rumours: बॉलीवुड अभिनेत्री कृति सैनन एक बार फिर अपनी निजी जिंदगी को लेकर सुर्खियों में हैं। इस बार चर्चा की वजह रेडिट पर वायरल हो रही एक पोस्ट है, जिसमें दावा किया गया है कि उनके कथित बॉयफ्रेंड और बिजनेसमैन कबीर बहिया को किसी दूसरी लड़की के साथ देखा गया। पोस्ट सामने आते ही सोशल मीडिया पर तरह-तरह की अटकलें शुरू हो गईं और कई यूजर्स ने कृति और कबीर के रिश्ते को लेकर सवाल उठाने शुरू कर दिए।
पिछले कुछ समय से कृति सैनन और कबीर बहिया के रिलेशनशिप की खबरें लगातार चर्चा में रही हैं। दोनों को कई बार साथ देखा गया और इस साल की शुरुआत में कबीर, कृति की बहन नूपुर सैनन की शादी में भी शामिल हुए थे। इन वजहों से दोनों के रिश्ते की खबरों को और हवा मिली। इसके बावजूद दोनों ने कभी सार्वजनिक रूप से अपने रिश्ते की पुष्टि नहीं की। ऐसे में सोशल मीडिया पर वायरल हो रहे दावों की स्वतंत्र रूप से पुष्टि नहीं की जा सकती।
सोशल मीडिया पर यूजर्स का रिएक्शन
रेडिट पोस्ट वायरल होने के बाद कई यूजर्स ने इस पर अपनी राय रखी। किसी ने लिखा कि क्या कृति सैनन को इस बारे में पता है? वहीं एक अन्य यूजर ने कहा कि मुझे शुरुआत से ही इस लड़के की वाइब्स अच्छी नहीं लगी थीं। कुछ लोगों ने यह भी लिखा कि इतनी जल्दी ब्रेकअप की खबरें क्यों आने लगीं। हालांकि, ये सभी प्रतिक्रियाएं सोशल मीडिया यूजर्स की व्यक्तिगत राय हैं और इन्हें तथ्य के तौर पर नहीं देखा जा सकता।
ये भी पढ़ें- ‘डॉन 3’ विवाद के बीच सुनील शेट्टी ने किया रणवीर सिंह का सपोर्ट, बोले- आप बैन करने वाले होते कौन हैं
वर्क फ्रंट पर कृति का फोकस
वर्क फ्रंट की बात करें तो कृति सैनन की हालिया रिलीज फिल्म &#8216;कॉकटेल 2&#8217; बॉक्स ऑफिस पर उम्मीद के मुताबिक प्रदर्शन नहीं कर सकी। रिपोर्ट्स के अनुसार, करीब 150 करोड़ रुपये के बजट में बनी इस फिल्म ने भारत में आठ दिनों में लगभग 74.75 करोड़ रुपये का कारोबार किया है। हाल ही में कृति ने रिश्तों और प्यार पर भी खुलकर अपनी राय रखी थी। उन्होंने कहा था कि आज की पीढ़ी कमिटमेंट से डरती है और रिश्तों में सिचुएशनशिप, बेंचिंग और घोस्टिंग जैसे नए ट्रेंड बढ़ गए हैं।

title: 'We're Humiliated And Insulted': MDMK Chief On Walking Out of DMK-Led Secular Alliance After 9 Years
description: The Marumalarchi Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (MDMK) has officially ended its nine-year alliance with the DMK, accusing the alliance of undermining its ideological commitments.
content: In a major setback to DMK, the Marumalarchi Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (MDMK) on Saturday formally ended its nine-year alliance with the MK Stalin-led party, saying the party would decide on its future electoral alliances at an appropriate time.The development came after a resolution was passed at the party's General Council meeting. According to the resolution, the MDMK said it had remained a part of the DMK-led Secular Progressive Alliance for the past nine years based on a resolution adopted by its High-Level Committee meeting held earlier today.Announcing its decision, MDMK said that it had joined and continued in the DMK-led Secular Progressive Alliance out of ideological commitment to prevent "communal political forces" from gaining ground in Tamil Nadu. Additionally, the party wanted to uphold the principles of the Dravidian movement.Detailing why the party has decided to part ways with DMK, MDMK Chief Vaiko while talking to Times Now said, "We have snapped our ties with DMK today. There are so many compelling reasons for this. The way in which seats were allotted, the way in which we were treated. We were humiliated and insulted. I can't reveal all the things. But we stomached it all and continued the alliance with DMK. We maintained the alliance spirit. I never uttered a single word against Stalin or the DMK government."Will MDMK Join TVK?Talking about the current Tamil Nadu government, Vaiko hailed Chief Minister Vijay and said, "He is running a transparent and corruption free government. Hats off to Mr Vijay. I extend my support to him.""One of our MLAs has joined the DMK. The other MLA says he'll maintain his closeness with MDMK. We have to wait and see. I'm a constituent of INDIA bloc. I will continue to be so," he added.Why MDMK Quit DMK-Led Alliance?According to the resolution, MDMK alleged that during the recently held Tamil Nadu Assembly elections 2026, there were attempts within the alliance to weaken the MDMK's independent political identity despite its 32-year political journey, however, the party still chose to remain in the alliance and contest the elections.Referring to the post-election political developments, the party alleged that the political negotiations that followed were contrary to the people's mandate. "It is an open secret that arrangements were made to install the AIADMK, which had won only 47 Assembly seats, in power by forging an alliance with Hindutva communal forces. As a result, the claims that the Secular Progressive Alliance was an alliance founded on ideology and principles were rendered meaningless," the resolution stated."Therefore, this General Council resolves that the Marumalarchi Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (MDMK) shall withdraw from the DMK-led Secular Progressive Alliance," the resolution said.Several former Secular Progressive Alliance allies, including the Congress, Indian Union Muslim League (IUML), Left parties and Viduthalai Chiruthaigal Katchi (VCK), withdrew from the alliance following defeat in the Tamil Nadu Assembly elections and extended support to the Vijay's TVK, enabling it to secure a majority and form the government.(With agency inputs)

title: Google Invites Kashmiri Podcaster RJ Umar Nisar to Its Exclusive YouTube Creators Collective
description:
Srinagar, June 27 : In a landmark moment for the creator ecosystem of Jammu and Kashmir, acclaimed podcaster, filmmaker, media entrepreneur, and digital storyteller RJ Umar Nisar was invited to attend the exclusive YouTube Creators Collective hosted by Google and YouTube. The invite only gathering brought together some of India's most influential creators, innovators, and digital storytellers, recognizing the growing impact of independent voices shaping the country's digital landscape.
Hailing from a small village in Tral, South Kashmir, RJ Umar Nisar's journey represents one of the most remarkable stories of contemporary Indian digital media. Beginning his career as a radio jockey at the age of 12, Umar transformed his passion for storytelling into a powerful multimedia platform that today reaches audiences across India and the world.
 Through Mashq Records and the Mashq Records Podcast, he has emerged as one of the most recognized independent podcasters from the region, breaking geographical and cultural barriers through meaningful conversations and authentic storytelling.
Widely regarded as a trailblazer for podcasting in Jammu and Kashmir and beyond, RJ Umar Nisar has played a pioneering role in popularizing long form conversations and digital storytelling in the region. His work has contributed significantly to building a podcast culture in Kashmir while connecting local narratives with national and international audiences.
Over the years, the Mashq Records Podcast has featured some of the most influential personalities from across sectors, including Chief Ministers, Members of Parliament, nationally acclaimed Bollywood filmmakers, artists, policymakers, social reformers, business leaders, and cultural icons. His conversations with prominent personalities have established the platform as one of the leading independent podcast destinations in the country.
With content crossing more than 350 million views globally across digital platforms, RJ Umar Nisar has built one of India's fastest growing independent podcast and storytelling ecosystems. This extraordinary reach, combined with his consistent impact in the digital space, has positioned him among the country's emerging top podcasters and digital storytellers.
Beyond audience numbers, Umar's work has earned widespread recognition at the national level. He is the recipient of multiple prestigious national awards and honors for his contributions to media, storytelling, youth engagement, and social impact, further strengthening his position as one of the leading voices emerging from Jammu and Kashmir.
The YouTube Creators Collective serves as a premier platform where creators discuss the future of digital storytelling, audience engagement, content innovation, and the evolving creator economy. RJ Umar Nisar's participation in this exclusive gathering marks another significant milestone in his journey from a small village in Kashmir to becoming a nationally recognized digital creator.
Speaking after attending the event, RJ Umar Nisar said:
"Coming from a small village in Kashmir and receiving an invitation from Google to attend the YouTube Creators Collective is a deeply emotional and humbling experience. When I started my journey as a young radio jockey, I never imagined that one day our stories from Kashmir would reach hundreds of millions of people globally. This recognition is not only a personal milestone, but a celebration of every dreamer, creator, and storyteller from Jammu and Kashmir. I believe authentic stories have the power to transcend borders, cultures, and geography. Our journey through Mashq Records and podcasting has always been about creating conversations that matter, and this recognition strengthens our commitment to taking the voices of Kashmir to the world."
As the creator economy continues to redefine the global media landscape, RJ Umar Nisar's presence at Google's YouTube Creators Collective stands as a testament to the growing influence of independent creators from Jammu and Kashmir. From pioneering podcasting in the region to building a globally viewed platform with over 350 million views, his journey continues to inspire a new generation of storytellers across India and beyond.

title: Baramulla Police deny reports of army casualties in Gulmarg, warn of legal action
description:
Srinagar, June 27: Baramulla Police on Saturday debunked rumours of Army casualties at Asha Post in Gulmarg area, and termed it “completely false and baseless”.
Police in a statement said that it has come to the notice of Police Baramulla that false and unsubstantiated information is being circulated alleging that Army personnel have sustained injuries at Asha Post.
It is hereby clarified that the said information is completely false, baseless and devoid of any factual basis. No Army personnel have sustained any injuries at Asha Post.
The dissemination of inaccurate and unverified information has the potential to cause unnecessary concern, create confusion among the public and adversely affect public order Citizens are advised to rely only on information issued through official channels, police said.
The spokesperson held that Baramulla Police is taking cognizance of the matter and any person found responsible for creating or disseminating false information with the intention of misleading the public or disturbing peace shall be dealt with strictly under the relevant provisions of law.
Police Baramulla remains committed to maintaining public peace, ensuring transparency and disseminating accurate and timely information, spokesperson added.

title: പതങ്കയത്ത് മലവെള്ളപ്പാച്ചിൽ; വിനോദസഞ്ചാരികളെ രക്ഷിക്കാൻ ശ്രമിക്കുന്നതിനിടെ ഗൈഡ് ഒഴുക്കിൽപ്പെട്ടു
CM Vijay | ‘ప్ర‌భుత్వ లాంఛ‌నాల‌తో భాగ్య‌రాజ్ అంత్య‌క్రియ‌లు’.. సీఎం విజయ్‌ ఆదేశాలు
description: CM Vijay |  ప్రముఖ దర్శకుడు, నటుడు భాగ్యరాజ్ (Bhagyaraj) అంత్యక్రియలను పూర్తి ప్రభుత్వ లాంఛనాలతో నిర్వహించాలని సీఎం విజయ్‌ (CM Vijay) సంబంధిత అధికారులను ఆదేశించారు. భారతీయ సినిమాకు భాగ్యరాజ్ చేసిన సేవలకు గుర్తింపుగా ఈ నిర్ణయం తీసుకున్నట్లు సీఎం ప్రకటించారు. ఈ సందర్భంగా ముఖ్యమంత్రి ఒక సంతాప సందేశాన్ని విడుదల చేశారు.
content:
CM Vijay : ప్రముఖ దర్శకుడు, నటుడు భాగ్యరాజ్ (Bhagyaraj) అంత్యక్రియలను పూర్తి ప్రభుత్వ లాంఛనాలతో నిర్వహించాలని సీఎం విజయ్‌ (CM Vijay) సంబంధిత అధికారులను ఆదేశించారు. భారతీయ సినిమాకు భాగ్యరాజ్ చేసిన సేవలకు గుర్తింపుగా ఈ నిర్ణయం తీసుకున్నట్లు సీఎం ప్రకటించారు. ఈ సందర్భంగా ముఖ్యమంత్రి ఒక సంతాప సందేశాన్ని విడుదల చేశారు. భాగ్యరాజ్ మరణం తమిళ చిత్ర పరిశ్రమకు, రాష్ట్ర సాంస్కృతిక రంగానికి తీరని లోటని పేర్కొన్నారు. దర్శకుడిగా, నటుడిగా, కథా రచయితగా సంగీత దర్శకుడిగా బహుముఖ ప్రజ్ఞ కనబరిచిన అరుదైన ప్రతిభాశాలి భాగ్యరాజ్‌ అని కొనియాడారు.
భాగ్యరాజ్‌ తన విలక్షణమైన కథన శైలి, సహజమైన హాస్యం, గ్రామీణ నేపథ్యాలను వాస్తవికంగా చూపిన విధానంతో తమిళ సినిమాలో తనకంటూ ఒక ప్రత్యేక స్థానాన్ని సంపాదించుకున్నారని గుర్తుచేశారు. ఆయన సినిమాలు కేవలం వినోదాన్ని పంచడమే కాకుండా, మానవ విలువలు, సామాజిక అంశాలను ప్రతిబింబించాయని సీఎం విజయ్ వివరించారు. ప్రముఖ దర్శకుడు భారతీరాజా వద్ద సహాయకుడిగా సినీ జీవితాన్ని ప్రారంభించిన భాగ్యరాజ్, 1979లో ‘సువారిల్లత చిత్రంగళ్’ చిత్రంతో దర్శకుడిగా పరిచయమయ్యారు. తర్వాత ఎన్నో విజయవంతమైన చిత్రాలకు దర్శకత్వం వహించి, తమిళ ప్రేక్షకుల హృదయాల్లో చిరస్థాయిగా నిలిచిపోయారు. భాగ్యరాజ్ మృతి పట్ల సినీ, రాజకీయ ప్రముఖులు సంతాపం తెలుపుతున్నారు.

title: ভাৰতৰ ৫৭% লোকে ব্যৱহাৰ কৰে AI Tool...
description:
কৃত্ৰিম বুদ্ধিমত্তাই জীৱনত বহু কামত সহায় কৰে। কিন্তু ইয়াৰ অত্যাধিক ব্যৱহাৰৰ ফলত কি কি প্ৰভাৱ পৰে সেই বিষয়ে জানে নে? বাস্তৱ জীৱনৰ পৰা আঁতৰি AI সৃষ্ট জগতখনত সোমাই পৰি বহু লোক ইয়াৰ আসক্তিত পৰিছে। বহুতৰ বাবে কঠিন হৈ পৰিছে দুয়োখন জগতৰ মাজত পাৰ্থক্য বুজি পোৱাত। AIৰ ওপৰত অত্যাধিক আৱেগিক নিৰ্ভৰশীলতা আৰু নিয়ন্ত্ৰণহীন ব্যৱহাৰে বিভিন্নজনৰ সামাজিক সম্পৰ্ক, মানসিক স্বাস্থ্য, দৈনন্দিন জীৱনৰ ওপৰতো পেলাইছে গভীৰ প্ৰভাৱ। এই সন্দৰ্ভত অসমীয়া প্ৰতিদিন ডিজিটেলৰ ৰাজৰ্ষি চহৰীয়াৰ এক প্ৰতিবেদন।

কিশোৰ কালত ল’ৰা-ছোৱালীয়ে হাতত বল-বেট লৈ বা আন খেলা সামগ্ৰী লৈ খেলিবলৈ ওলাই গৈছিল। খেলিবলৈ ওলায় যোৱা সময়তে লগ পাইছিল সমনীয়া বন্ধু-বান্ধৱীক। আৰু তেওঁলোকৰ মাজত হৈছিল বিভিন্ন কথা-বতৰা। কিন্তু বৰ্তমান সময়ত পৰিস্থিতি সম্পূৰ্ণ পৃথক।
আচলতে আজিৰ যুগত কৃত্ৰিম বুদ্ধিমত্তা, ইন্টাৰনেট আদিৰ সা-সুবিধাবোৰ বৃদ্ধি পোৱাৰ পাছত হ্ৰাস পাবলৈ ধৰিছে মানুহৰ জীৱনত বন্ধু-বান্ধৱ। নিজৰ মনৰ কথা, অনুভৱবোৰ আদান-প্ৰদান কৰিবলৈ বৰ্তমান সময়ত যেন মানুহৰ তেনে বন্ধু-বান্ধৱ নোহোৱা হৈ পৰিছে। আৰু তাৰ কাৰণ হৈছে AIৰ অত্যাধিক ব্যৱহাৰ। 
এনে এক ঘটনা সংঘটিত হৈছে ২৮বছৰীয়া এজন যুৱকৰ ক্ষেত্ৰত। মাইক নামৰ এজন যুৱকে বিগত ছয় মাহ ধৰি Artificial Intelligence Addicts Anonymous চমুকৈ AIAA নামৰ এটা গোটৰ সহায়ত এই আসক্তিৰ পৰা ওলাই অহাৰ চেষ্টা কৰি আছে। AIAA হৈছে এনে এক সংগঠন, যিয়ে কৃত্ৰিম বুদ্ধিমত্তা বা AIৰ আসক্তি বা অত্যাধিক ব্যৱহাৰৰ সমস্যাত ভোগা লোকসকলক এই আসক্তিৰ পৰা আঁতৰাই বা ওলাই অনাত সহায় কৰে। 
মাইকে কয়- "মই প্ৰতিদিনে প্ৰায় ১৪ ঘণ্টা ধৰি ChatGPTৰ সৈতে কথা পাতিছিলোঁ। গা ধোৱা এৰি দিছিলো, সময়মতে খোৱাও বন্ধ হৈ গৈছিল। মোৰ প্ৰেয়সীয়ে মোক এৰি গুচি গ’ল। আনকি মই চাকৰিও হেৰুৱালোঁ। মোক সঁচাকৈ অনুভৱ হ’বলৈ ধৰিছিল যে AIয়ে মোৰ প্ৰতি চিন্তা কৰে। মই AIৰ প্ৰেমত পৰিছিলোঁ। যেতিয়া মোৰ জীৱন সম্পূৰ্ণৰূপে ধ্বংস হৈ গ’ল, তেতিয়াহে বুজিলোঁ যে- মই কোনো মানুহৰ সৈতে নহয়, এটা কম্পিউটাৰ প্ৰ’গ্ৰামৰ সৈতে কথা পাতি আছিলোঁ।"
AIAAৰ মতে, AIৰ আসক্তি হঠাতে সৃষ্টি নহয়। আৰম্ভণিতে এজন ব্যক্তি AI সহকাৰী হিচাপে ChatGPTৰ সৈতে পৰিচয় হয়। লাহে লাহে সেই Chatbot এজন ঘনিষ্ঠ বন্ধু হৈ পৰে। ব্যৱহাৰকাৰীয়ে ভাবে যে, AIয়ে তেওঁৰ সকলো কথা বুজি পায়। কিন্তু এদিন হঠাতে অনুভৱ হয় যে, তেওঁ ১২ ঘণ্টা ধৰি ChatGPTৰ দৰে Chatbotৰ সৈতে কথা পাতি আছে আৰু বহুদিন ধৰি কোনো বাস্তৱ পৃথিৱীৰ মানুহৰ সৈতে ভালদৰে কথা-বতৰা হোৱা নাই।
কিছুমান মানুহ AIৰ সৈতে ইমানেই গভীৰ সম্পৰ্ক গঢ়ি তোলে যে তেওঁলোকে কাৰ্যালয়লৈ যোৱাও বন্ধ কৰি দিয়ে। আসক্তি বাঢ়ি যোৱাৰ লগে লগে বাস্তৱ জগত আৰু AI সৃষ্ট জগতৰ মাজৰ পাৰ্থক্য বুজাটোও কঠিন হৈ পৰে।
উল্লেখ্য যে, বিভিন্ন প্ৰতিবেদন অনুসৰি বৰ্তমান সময়ত AIৰ আসক্তি দ্ৰুতগতিত বৃদ্ধি পাইছে। কিছুমান ক্ষেত্ৰত AIৰ ওপৰত অত্যধিক নিৰ্ভৰশীলতা আৰু আসক্তিৰ ফলতেই আত্মহনন বা আত্মক্ষতিৰ দৰে ঘটনাও সংঘটিত হোৱা বুলি অভিযোগ উত্থাপিত হৈছে। এই কাৰণতে বহু পৰিয়ালে OpenAI, Google Geminiৰ নিৰ্মাতা সংস্থা আৰু Character.AIৰ বিৰুদ্ধে বৃহৎ আইনী গোচৰ ৰুজু কৰিছে। 
ৰাষ্ট্ৰীয় সংবাদমাধ্যমৰ বাতৰি অনুসৰি, শেহতীয়া এক সমীক্ষাত প্ৰকাশ পাইছে যে- ভাৰতৰ ৫৭ শতাংশ যুৱক-যুৱতীয়ে আৱেগিক সমৰ্থনৰ বাবে AI Tool ব্যৱহাৰ কৰে। কেৱল যুৱক-যুৱতী নহয়, বিভিন্ন বয়সৰ লোকেও এতিয়া নিজৰ সমস্যা, উদ্বেগ আৰু অনুভূতিবোৰ AI Chatbotৰ সৈতে ভাগ-বতৰা কৰিবলৈ আৰম্ভ কৰিছে।
ইফালে, OpenAI আৰু MIT Media Labৰ এক গৱেষণাত দেখা গৈছে যে- বয়স অধিক হোৱা লোকসকলৰ AI Chatbotৰ ওপৰত আৱেগিকভাৱে নিৰ্ভৰশীল হোৱাৰ সম্ভাৱনা তুলনামূলকভাৱে বেছি। গৱেষণাত এইটোও পোৱা গৈছে যে, যিসকল লোক অধিক নিঃসঙ্গতাত ভোগে, তেওঁলোকে দৈনিক অধিক সময় ChatGPT ব্যৱহাৰ কৰে। ফলস্বৰূপে তেওঁলোকৰ বাস্তৱ জীৱনত মানুহৰ সৈতে যোগাযোগ আৰু সামাজিক সম্পৰ্ক কমি আহে।
বিশেষজ্ঞসকলৰ মতে AIৰ আসক্তি মূলতঃ ইণ্টাৰনেট আসক্তিৰেই এক নতুন ৰূপ। এই বিষয়ত ১৯৯৮চনত প্ৰথম বিস্তৃত গৱেষণা কৰিছিল মনোবিজ্ঞানী ড° কিমবেৰলী এছ য়াঙে। তেওঁ ইণ্টাৰনেট আসক্তিৰ বিভিন্ন লক্ষণ আৰু প্ৰভাৱৰ বিষয়ে বিশদভাৱে ব্যাখ্যা কৰিছিল।
AIAA-ৰ উপৰিও Internet and Technology Addicts Anonymous (ITAA) নামৰ আন এটা সংগঠনে ২০১৭ চনৰ পৰা কাম কৰি আহিছে। বৰ্তমান এই সংগঠনে ChatGPT, Gemini আৰু অন্যান্য AI Chatbotৰ আসক্তি দূৰ কৰাৰ বাবে বিশেষ ১২টা স্তৰৰ পুনৰুদ্ধাৰ  (12-Step Recovery Program) পদক্ষেপ হাতত লৈছে। ইয়াৰ উপৰিও Redditৰ দৰে সামাজিক মাধ্যমত বহু গোপন সহায়ক গোট আছে, য’ত সদস্যসকলে নিজৰ অভিজ্ঞতা আৰু সংগ্ৰামৰ কাহিনী আদান-প্ৰদান কৰি ইজনে সিজনক উৎসাহ যোগায়।
ITAAৰ মতে, AIৰ আসক্তি শিশু, কিশোৰ-কিশোৰী, যুৱক-যুৱতী, কৰ্মজীৱী ব্যক্তি, অভিভাৱক আৰু বৃদ্ধ-বৃদ্ধা সকলো বয়সৰ মানুহৰ ক্ষেত্ৰতে দেখা দিব পাৰে। সংগঠনটোৰ দাবী অনুসৰি, তেওঁলোকৰ সহায়ক গোটসমূহত পৃথিৱীৰ বিভিন্ন দেশৰ বিভিন্ন বয়স, পেছা আৰু সম্প্ৰদায়ৰ লোক জড়িত হৈ আছে। প্ৰতিদিনে অনলাইন সভাৰ জৰিয়তে সদস্যসকলে নিজৰ অভিজ্ঞতা, সমস্যা, সংগ্ৰাম আৰু পুনৰুদ্ধাৰৰ যাত্ৰাৰ বিষয়ে আলোচনা কৰে।
AIয়ে জীৱন সহজ কৰি তুলিলেও বিশেষজ্ঞসকলে সতৰ্ক কৰি দিছে যে- ইয়াৰ ওপৰত অত্যাধিক আৱেগিক নিৰ্ভৰশীলতা আৰু নিয়ন্ত্ৰণহীন ব্যৱহাৰে সামাজিক সম্পৰ্ক, মানসিক স্বাস্থ্য আৰু দৈনন্দিন জীৱনৰ ওপৰত গভীৰ প্ৰভাৱ পেলাব পাৰে। সেয়েহে AIৰ সুবিধা গ্ৰহণ কৰাৰ লগতে ইয়াৰ ব্যৱহাৰত সংযম আৰু সজাগতা ৰক্ষা কৰাটোও সমানেই জৰুৰী।

title: ‘ఓటరు జాబితా సవరణ పారదర్శకంగా చేపట్టాలి’
description: ప్రతిష్టాత్మకంగా చేపట్టిన ప్రత్యేక ఓటరు జాబితా సవరణ ప్రక్రియ పారదర్శకంగా జరగాలని, ప్రజలకు ఈ సర్వే ప్రక్రియ అందుబాటులో ఉండేలా అధికారులు చూడాలని ఎమ్మెల్యే పాయం వెంకటేశ్వర్లు అన్నారు. శనివారం బూర్గంప‌హాడ్‌ మండల పరిధిలోని సారపాక సుందరయ్యనగర్‌లో..
content:
– ఎమ్మెల్యే పాయం వెంక‌టేశ్వ‌ర్లు
బూర్గంపహాడ్, జూన్ 27 : ప్రతిష్టాత్మకంగా చేపట్టిన ప్రత్యేక ఓటరు జాబితా సవరణ ప్రక్రియ పారదర్శకంగా జరగాలని, ప్రజలకు ఈ సర్వే ప్రక్రియ అందుబాటులో ఉండేలా అధికారులు చూడాలని ఎమ్మెల్యే పాయం వెంకటేశ్వర్లు అన్నారు. శనివారం బూర్గంప‌హాడ్‌ మండల పరిధిలోని సారపాక సుందరయ్యనగర్‌లో జరిగిన సర్ కార్యక్రమంలో ఆయన పాల్గొని ఓటర్లకు ఓటరు జాబితా సవరణ ప్రక్రియపై అవగాహన కల్పించారు. ప్రతి అర్హుడైన ఓటరు పేరు జాబితాలో నమోదయ్యేలా అధికారులు ప్రత్యేక దృష్టి సారించాలని, ప్రజలు తమ ఓటరు వివరాలు పరిశీలించి అవసరమైన సవరణలు చేసుకోవాలని సూచించారు. ప్రజాస్వామ్య బలోపేతానికి ఓటరు జాబితా సవరణ కార్యక్రమం ఎంతో కీలకమని ఎమ్మెల్యే అన్నారు. ప్రతి అర్హుడి ఓటు హక్కు పరిరక్షణే ప్రజాస్వామ్యానికి బలమైన పునాదిగా పేర్కొన్నారు. ఈ కార్యక్రమంలో తాసీల్దార్ కేఆర్కే ప్రసాద్, బీఎల్వేలు, నాయకులు భజన సతీష్, ప్రసాద్, ఇంగువ రమేష్, వారాల వేణు, పూలపెల్లి సుధాకర్రెడ్డి, ఎడమకంటి సుధాకర్‌రెడ్డి పాల్గొన్నారు.

title: ഒരൊറ്റ യെസ് മതി; സർക്കാർതല വാസ്കാലുർ സർജറികളുടെ ഭാവി മാറിമറിയാൻ
బీజేపీ తదుపరి ఫోకస్ తెలంగాణే: రాంచందర్ రావు
description: Ramchander Rao: పశ్చిమ బెంగాల్‌లో మమతా బెనర్జీ నేతృత్వంలోని తృణమూల్ కాంగ్రెస్ కంచుకోటను బద్దలు కొట్టి బీజేపీ ఘన విజయం సాధించడంతో దేశవ్యాప్తంగా ఆ పార్టీ శ్రేణుల్లో...
content:
Ramchander Rao: పశ్చిమ బెంగాల్‌లో మమతా బెనర్జీ నేతృత్వంలోని తృణమూల్ కాంగ్రెస్ కంచుకోటను బద్దలు కొట్టి బీజేపీ ఘన విజయం సాధించడంతో దేశవ్యాప్తంగా ఆ పార్టీ శ్రేణుల్లో సరికొత్త ఉత్సాహం వ్యక్తమవుతోంది. ఈ గెలుపు జోష్ తెలంగాణ బీజేపీ నాయకులు, కార్యకర్తల్లోనూ స్పష్టంగా కనిపిస్తోంది. ఈ క్రమంలోనే తెలంగాణలో పార్టీని అధికారంలోకి తీసుకురావడమే తమ తదుపరి లక్ష్యమని రాష్ట్ర బీజేపీ అధ్యక్షుడు రాంచందర్ రావు స్పష్టం చేశారు.







Read also: Ajith Reddy: హైదరాబాద్ మెట్రో రైల్ అదనపు ఎండీగా అజిత్ రెడ్డి నియామకం







హైదరాబాద్ నుంచే విజయ యాత్ర.. కార్పొరేషన్ ఎన్నికలపై నజర్



రాష్ట్ర రాజధాని హైదరాబాద్ వేదికగానే తెలంగాణలో విజయఢంకా మోగిస్తామని రాంచందర్ రావు ధీమా వ్యక్తం చేశారు. రాబోయే నగర కార్పొరేషన్ ఎన్నికల్లో అన్ని స్థానాలను కైవసం చేసుకుంటామని ప్రకటించారు. తెలంగాణలో కాంగ్రెస్, బీఆర్ఎస్, ఎంఐఎం పార్టీలు లోపాయికారీగా చేతులు కలిపినా, కలిసికట్టుగా వచ్చినా బీజేపీని అడ్డుకోవడం ఎవరి తరం కాదని ఆయన సవాల్ విసిరారు. పార్టీ వ్యూహాలను పదును పెట్టేందుకు బీజేపీ జాతీయ అధ్యక్షుడు నితిన్ నబీన్ హైదరాబాద్‌కు వస్తున్నట్లు ఆయన వెల్లడించారు.



Ramchander Rao: వరంగల్‌లో బూత్ స్థాయి కార్యకర్తల మహాసభ



మరోవైపు, వరంగల్‌లో పర్యటించిన రాజ్యసభ సభ్యుడు డాక్టర్ కె. లక్ష్మణ్ మాట్లాడుతూ.. ప్రస్తుతం బీజేపీ జాతీయ నాయకత్వం పూర్తి దృష్టిని తెలంగాణపైనే కేంద్రీకరించిందని పేర్కొన్నారు. ఈ నెల 29న నితిన్ నబీన్ వరంగల్‌లో పర్యటించనున్నారని, అక్కడ ఉన్న ఆర్ట్స్ అండ్ సైన్స్ కాలేజీ మైదానంలో నిర్వహించే బూత్ స్థాయి కార్యకర్తల విస్తృత స్థాయి సదస్సులో పాల్గొని దిశా నిర్దేశం చేస్తారని తెలిపారు.



ప్రస్తుత కాంగ్రెస్ ప్రభుత్వంపై విమర్శలు గుప్పిస్తూ.. అసెంబ్లీ ఎన్నికల్లో బీజేపీని కాదని కాంగ్రెస్‌కు ఓటేసిన ప్రజలు ఇప్పుడు తీవ్ర ఇబ్బందులు పడుతున్నారని, వారి పరిస్థితి పెనం మీద నుంచి పొయ్యిలో పడినట్లు తయారైందని లక్ష్మణ్ ఎద్దేవా చేశారు.

title: Karnataka | కారులో మహిళను పొడిచిన యువకుడు.. నాటు బాంబు పేలి అదే కారులో సజీవ దహనం
description: Karnataka : కర్ణాటకలో దారుణ ఘటన జరిగింది. కారులో ఒక మహిళను కత్తితో పొడిచిన ఒక యువకుడు.. అనంతరం అదే కారులో నాటు బాంబు పేలి సజీవదహనమయ్యాడు. బాధిత యువతి, కారు డ్రైవర్ ప్రస్తుతం ఆస్పత్రిలో చికిత్స పొందుతున్నారు.
content:
Karnataka : కర్ణాటకలో దారుణ ఘటన జరిగింది. కారులో ఒక మహిళను కత్తితో పొడిచిన ఒక యువకుడు.. అనంతరం అదే కారులో నాటు బాంబు పేలి సజీవదహనమయ్యాడు. బాధిత యువతి, కారు డ్రైవర్ ప్రస్తుతం ఆస్పత్రిలో చికిత్స పొందుతున్నారు. ఈ ఘటన కర్ణాటకలోని తుమకూరు జిల్లాలో శనివారం జరిగింది. పోలీసులు, బాధితులు తెలిపిన వివరాల ప్రకారం.. నాగేంద్ర (30) అనే వ్యక్తి బెంగళూరులో శనివారం ఒక కారు బుక్ చేసుకున్నాడు. అనంతరం తన సన్నిహితురాలైన రమ్యా ఉల్లాస్ (23)ను కారులో ఎక్కించుకున్నాడు.
రమ్య స్వస్థలం ఉత్తర కర్ణాటక జిల్లా. ఆమె బెంగళూరులోని సంజయ్ గాంధీ ఆస్పత్రిలో టెక్నీషియన్‌గా పని చేస్తోంది. నాగేంద్ర, రమ్య ఉల్లాస్ కలిసి కారులో అంకోలా వెళ్తున్నారు. కారు వెనుక సీట్లో కూర్చున్న ఇద్దరి మధ్యా కొంత దూరం వెళ్లిన తర్వాత వాగ్వాదం చోటు చేసుకుంది. ఇది ఘర్షణకు దారి తీసింది. ఈ క్రమంలో తుమకూరు జిల్లా సమీపంలోకి చేరుకోగానే రమ్యపై నాగేంద్ర కత్తితో దాడి చేశాడు. ఇదే సమయంలో ఒక నాటు బాంబుతో కూడా దాడి చేసేందుకు ప్రయత్నించాడు. దీంతో రమ్య.. వెంటనే డ్రైవర్‌ ప్రవీణ్‌కు విషయం చెప్పి, అప్రమత్తం చేసింది. అతడు తనపై దాడి చేశాడని, నాగేంద్ర వద్ద బాంబు కూడా ఉందని చెప్పింది. అప్పుడే ఆమె కారులోంచి బయటకు కూడా దూకేసింది. డ్రైవర్ కూడా వెంటనే కారును ఆపి పక్కకు దిగిపోయాడు. వెంటనే నాగేంద్ర కార్ డోర్ లాక్ చేసుకున్నాడు. ఆ తర్వాత అతడు తీసుకొచ్చిన నాటు బాంబు ప్రమాదవశాత్తు పేలిందో లేక అతడే పేల్చుకున్నాడో ఇంకా తెలియదు కానీ.. ఆ బాంబు పేలి మంటలు చెలరేగాయి. కారుకు మంటలు అంటుకున్నాయి. నాగేంద్ర అందులోనే సజీవ దహనమయ్యాడు.
ఘటనపై సమాచారం అందుకున్న పోలీసులు, ఫైర్ సిబ్బంది ప్రమాద స్థలానికి చేరుకుని మంటలను ఆర్పేశారు. నాగేంద్ర మృతదేహాన్ని స్వాధీనం చేసుకున్నారు. కారు పేలిన ఘటనలో డ్రైవర్ ప్రవీణ్‌కు కూడా గాయాలయ్యాయి. అతడిని స్థానిక ఆస్పత్రికి తరలించిన అధికారులు చికిత్స అందిస్తున్నారు. కత్తిపోటు గాయాలైన రమ్యను కూడా తుమకూరు జిల్లా ఆస్పత్రిలో చేర్చి చికిత్స అందిస్తున్నారు. ఘటనపై కేసు నమోదు చేసుకున్న పోలీసులు దర్యాప్తు జరుపుతున్నారు. ఫోరెన్సిక్ నిపుణులు కూడా ఘటనా స్థలానికి చేరుకుని ఆధారాలు సేకరిస్తున్నారు. తుమకూరు జిల్లా ఎస్పీ కూడా ప్రమాద స్థలానికి చేరుకుని పరిశీలించారు. ఈ ప్రమాదానికి గల కారణాలతోపాటు నాటు బాంబు ఎలా వచ్చింది అనే దానిపై విచారణ జరుపుతామన్నారు.

title: First Since Royal Exit: Harry, Meghan Accept King's Offer To Stay At Royal Residence During UK Visit
description: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle will visit the UK next month with their kids, stay partly at a royal residence, and attend Invictus Games events amid reconciliation speculation.

title: କାର୍‌କୁ ଧକ୍କା ଦେଇ ଓଲଟିଲା ଟାୟାର ବୋଝେଇ ଟ୍ରକ୍‌, ଡ୍ରାଇଭରଙ୍କ ସମେତ…
description:
ମୋହନା,୨୭ା୬(ମନ୍ମଥ ମିଶ୍ର): କାର୍‌କୁ ଧକ୍କା ଦେଇ ଓଲଟି ପଡ଼ିଛି ଟାୟାର ବୋଝେଇ ଟ୍ରକ୍‌। ଡ୍ରାଇଭରଙ୍କ ସମେତ ୫ ଆହତ ହୋଇଛନ୍ତି। ଗଜପତି ଜିଲା ଅଡ଼ବା ଥାନା ନାଳାଘାଟ ନିକଟ ଭୀମଦଲି ଘାଟିରେ ଘଟିଛି ଏହି ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା। ରାୟଗଡ଼ାରୁ ଗୋଟିଏ ପରିବାର ୪ ଜଣ କାର୍‌ ଯୋଗେ ଦିଗପହଣ୍ଡି ଯାଉଥିବା ବେଳେ ସାମ୍ନା ପଟୁ ଆସୁଥିବା ଟାୟାର ବୋଝେଇ ଟ୍ରକ୍‌ଟି ଭାରସାମ୍ୟ ହରାଇ କାର୍‌କୁ ଧକ୍କା ଦେଇ ରାସ୍ତାରେ ଓଲଟି ପଡ଼ିଛି। ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣାରେ ଉଭୟ ଗାଡ଼ିର ଡ୍ରାଇଭରଙ୍କ ସମେତ […]
The post କାର୍‌କୁ ଧକ୍କା ଦେଇ ଓଲଟିଲା ଟାୟାର ବୋଝେଇ ଟ୍ରକ୍‌, ଡ୍ରାଇଭରଙ୍କ ସମେତ… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ମୋହନା,୨୭ା୬(ମନ୍ମଥ ମିଶ୍ର): କାର୍‌କୁ ଧକ୍କା ଦେଇ ଓଲଟି ପଡ଼ିଛି ଟାୟାର ବୋଝେଇ ଟ୍ରକ୍‌। ଡ୍ରାଇଭରଙ୍କ ସମେତ ୫ ଆହତ ହୋଇଛନ୍ତି। ଗଜପତି ଜିଲା ଅଡ଼ବା ଥାନା ନାଳାଘାଟ ନିକଟ ଭୀମଦଲି ଘାଟିରେ ଘଟିଛି ଏହି ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା। ରାୟଗଡ଼ାରୁ ଗୋଟିଏ ପରିବାର ୪ ଜଣ କାର୍‌ ଯୋଗେ ଦିଗପହଣ୍ଡି ଯାଉଥିବା ବେଳେ ସାମ୍ନା ପଟୁ ଆସୁଥିବା ଟାୟାର ବୋଝେଇ ଟ୍ରକ୍‌ଟି ଭାରସାମ୍ୟ ହରାଇ କାର୍‌କୁ ଧକ୍କା ଦେଇ ରାସ୍ତାରେ ଓଲଟି ପଡ଼ିଛି। ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣାରେ ଉଭୟ ଗାଡ଼ିର ଡ୍ରାଇଭରଙ୍କ ସମେତ କାର୍‌ରେ ଯାତ୍ରା କରୁଥିବା ୩ ଜଣ ଆହତ ହୋଇଛନ୍ତି। ଆହତ ଯାତ୍ରୀଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ ଜଣେ ମହିଳା ଓ ଜଣେ ଶିଶୁ ଥିବା ଜଣାପଡ଼ିଛି। ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ଲୋକେ ଆହତଙ୍କୁ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କରି ବିରିକୋଟ ମେଡିକାଲ ଭର୍ତ୍ତି କରିଥିବାବେଳେ ଖବର ପାଇ ପୋଲିସ ଘଟଣାସ୍ଥଳରେ ପହଞ୍ଚି ତଦନ୍ତ କରୁଛି।

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

title: Venezuela Live Updates: Rescuers Work as Window Narrows to Find Quake Survivors
