title: ACB attaches house, land, gold in DA Case
description:
Srinagar, Jun 27: The Jammu and Kashmir Anti-Corruption Bureau (ACB) on Saturday said it has attached multiple movable and immovable properties, including a residential house, land parcels and gold ornaments, belonging to a former Naazir in the Deputy Commissioner’s Office, Srinagar, in connection with a disproportionate assets case.
In a statement issued to the news agency—Kashmir News Observer (KNO), a spokesperson said the attached assets belong to Imtiyaz Ahmad Bhat of Firdousabad, Batamaloo, who was posted as Naazir in the office of the Deputy Commissioner, Srinagar. The attachments were made in connection with FIR No. 09/2025 registered at Police Station ACB Srinagar.
The attached properties include a single-storey tin-roofed residential house with six marlas and 172 square feet of land at Firdousabad, Batamaloo; land measuring 10 marlas in Nowgam recorded in the name of the accused's daughter; two land parcels measuring four marlas and 136 square feet, and eight marlas and 136 square feet, respectively, in the name of the accused's wife at Nambal, Nowgam; besides gold ornaments weighing approximately 1,266 grams.
The spokesperson said the case was registered on May 22, 2025, following a secret verification into allegations that the accused had accumulated assets disproportionate to his known sources of income.
During the investigation, ACB searched the accused's residence and seized copper utensils, gold ornaments and other luxury items. The accused was arrested in the case and is presently on bail under court orders.
He said the investigation revealed that the public servant had allegedly amassed huge movable and immovable assets disproportionate to his known sources of income. Following approval from the competent authority, two teams headed by DySP-rank officers were constituted to attach the properties.
The spokesperson said the teams carried out the attachment process in Batamaloo and Nowgam after completing all legal formalities. Signboards have been erected at the attached properties, and the public has been advised not to purchase or exchange the attached house or land.—(KNO)

title: Govt should clarify its stand on job outsourcing: Altaf Bukhari
নেতাই পাহৰিলে প্ৰতিশ্ৰুতিঃ বোকাখাতৰ ৰজাবাৰীত গাঁঠিৰ ধন ভাঙি পথ মেৰামতি ৰাইজৰ
description:
ডিজিটেল সংবাদ, বোকাখাতঃ চৰকাৰ আৰু বিভাগীয় কৰ্তৃপক্ষৰ প্ৰতিশ্ৰুতিত আস্থা হেৰুৱাই অৱশেষত নিজৰ পথ নিজেই মেৰামতি কৰিবলৈ ওলাই আহিল বোকাখাত সমজিলাৰ অন্তৰ্গত ৰজাবাৰী গাঁও পঞ্চায়তৰ ৰাইজ। পঞ্চায়তটোৰ ৬ নং ৱাৰ্ডৰ ৰজাবাৰী ভকতচাপৰি গাঁৱৰ এটা শোচনীয় পথৰ বাবে দীৰ্ঘদিন ধৰি চৰম অসুবিধাত ভুগি অহা গাঁৱৰ ৰাইজে গাঁঠিৰ ধন ভাঙি আৰু ৰাজহুৱা শ্ৰমদানেৰে পথটি মেৰামতি কৰি চৰকাৰী অৱহেলাৰ এক উপযুক্ত প্ৰত্যুত্তৰ দিছে।
জানিব পৰা মতে, ভকতচাপৰি গাঁৱৰ এই গুৰুত্বপূৰ্ণ পথটো মেৰামতিৰ অভাৱত বহু পৰিমাণে যাতায়াতৰ অনুপযোগী হৈ পৰিছিল। পথৰ মাজত সৃষ্টি হোৱা বৃহৎ গাঁতৰ বাবে সঘনাই সৰু-বৰ দুৰ্ঘটনা সংঘটিত হৈ আহিছিল। এই বিধ্বস্ত পথটোৰ বাবে বিশেষকৈ বিদ্যালয়লৈ অহা-যোৱা কৰা ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰী আৰু জৰুৰীকালীন অৱস্থাত ৰোগী কঢ়িওৱাৰ ক্ষেত্ৰত গাঁৱৰ ৰাইজে যমৰ যাতনা ভুগিবলগীয়া হৈছিল। স্থানীয় ৰাইজে পথটো মেৰামতিৰ বাবে বিভাগীয় কৰ্তৃপক্ষক বাৰম্বাৰ অনুনয়-বিনয় কৰিছিল যদিও কোনো সুফল নাপালে। 
ইফালে, ক্ষোভিত ৰাইজে অভিযোগ কৰা অনুসৰি, নিৰ্বাচনৰ পূৰ্বে ভোট বিচাৰি স্থানীয় বিধায়ক আৰু মন্ত্ৰীয়ে এই পথেদিয়েই পাৰহৈ গৈছিল। সেই সময়ত পথটো নিৰ্মাণৰ বিভিন্ন প্ৰতিশ্ৰুতিৰ বন্যা বোৱাইছিল যদিও নিৰ্বাচন পাৰ হোৱাৰ পিছতেই জনপ্ৰতিনিধিসকলে পথটোৰ কথা সম্পূৰ্ণৰূপে পাহৰি পেলালে।
ৰজাঘৰীয়াৰ পৰা এনেদৰে বাৰম্বাৰ প্ৰতাৰিত হোৱাৰ পিছত অৱশেষত ৰাইজে নিজেই একগোট হোৱাৰ সিদ্ধান্ত লয় আৰু নিজৰ গাঁঠিৰ ধন সংগ্ৰহ কৰি শিল, বালি ক্ৰয় কৰে আৰু ৰাজহুৱা শ্ৰমদান কাৰ্যসূচী ৰূপায়ণ কৰি পথটোৰ মেৰামতি কৰে। ৰাইজৰ এই একতা আৰু শ্ৰমদানে এতিয়া বিভাগীয় কৰ্তৃপক্ষ আৰু স্থানীয় জনপ্ৰতিনিধিৰ উন্নয়নৰ ফোপোলা স্বৰূপটো উদঙাই দিছে বুলি মত প্ৰকাশ কৰিছে।

title: TET पेपरफुटीमध्ये पोलिसांचा धक्कादायक खुलासा; तब्बल ‘इतक्या’ कोटी रुपयांत पेपरची ठरली किंमत, पण त्या आधीच फुटलं बिंग
description: मुंबई | Mumbaiनीट पेपरफुटीनंतर महाराष्ट्रात खळबळ उडवून देणाऱ्या टीईटी पेपर फुटीचेही आता दिल्ली अन् हरयाणा कनेक्शन समोर आले आहे. उद्या २८ जून रोजी होणाऱ्या टीईटी परीक्षेचा पेपर फुटल्याने ही परीक्षा रद्द करण्यात आली असून पोलिसांनी तीन आरोपींना अटक केली आहे. सहारा विमानतळ परिसरातून या संशयितांना अटक केली असून त्यांच्यावर गुन्हा दाखल करत बेड्या ठोकल्या आहे. […]
content:
मुंबई | Mumbaiनीट पेपरफुटीनंतर महाराष्ट्रात खळबळ उडवून देणाऱ्या टीईटी पेपर फुटीचेही आता दिल्ली अन् हरयाणा कनेक्शन समोर आले आहे. उद्या २८ जून रोजी होणाऱ्या टीईटी परीक्षेचा पेपर फुटल्याने ही परीक्षा रद्द करण्यात आली असून पोलिसांनी तीन आरोपींना अटक केली आहे. सहारा विमानतळ परिसरातून या संशयितांना अटक केली असून त्यांच्यावर गुन्हा दाखल करत बेड्या ठोकल्या आहे. त्यानंतर, अपर पोलीस आयुक्त अशोक दुधे यांनी पत्रकार परिषद घेऊन टीईटी पेपर फुटीसंदर्भात माहिती दिली.



एका पेपरची किंमत दीड कोटी रुपयेटीईटी पेपरफुटीच्या संदर्भाने भिवंडी पोलिसांनी पत्रकार परिषद घेऊन काही धक्कादायक खुलासे केले आहेत. भिवंडी पोलिसांनी तीन आरोपींना अटक केली असून यातील २ आरोपी बिहारमधील आहेत, तर एक आरोपी हरियाणामधला आहे. एका पेपरची किंमत तब्बल दीड कोटी रुपये ठरली होती, असे भिवंडीचे अतिरिक्त पोलीस आयुक्त अशोक दुधे यांनी सांगितले. तसेच पेपरफुटीचा तपास करण्यासाठी विशेष पोलीस पथकाची स्थापना केली असून एसीपींच्या नेतृत्वाखाली ८ पोलीस निरीक्षक आणि इतर कर्मचारी काम करून पेपरफुटीचा तपास करतील, अशीही माहिती अतिरिक्त पोलीस आयुक्त दुधे यांनी दिली.



TET Exam Cancelled: पेपर कसा फुटला ते पुन्हा पेपर कधी होणार?महाराष्ट्र परिक्षा परिषदेची सविस्तर माहिती



मुख्य संशयित अद्याप फरारटीईटी पेपर विक्रीसाठी आरोपी दिल्लीतून आले होते. त्यामध्ये, राजीव शाह (बिहार) (४५), आकाश कुमार (बिहार)(३०) आणि धीरज कुमार (हरियाणा)(२८) अशी आरोपींची नावे आहे. मात्र, याप्रकरणातील मुख्य आरोपी अद्यापही फरार आहे. पोलिसांच्या झडतीत ४ पेपरचे सेट मिळाले असून मोबाईल, डेबिट कार्ड देखील मिळाले आहेत. पोलिसांनी, भारतीय न्याय संहिता कलम ३१८(४) ३१६(५) ६१(२), सह महाराष्ट्र परीक्षाअधिनियम २०२४ या प्रमाणे गुन्हा दाखल केला आहे.



पोलिसांना मिळालेल्या गोपनीय माहितीच्या आधारे आरोपींसाठी ट्रॅप लावण्यात आला होता. आरोपी दिल्लीवरुन पेपर विकण्यासाठी भिंवडीला आले होते, कोणासाठी पेपर विकायला आले होते, कोणाला विकला, कुणी घेतला? या सर्व बाबींचा तपास करण्यात येत आहे. विशेष म्हणजे, आरोपींकडून जे पेपर विकत घेणार होते, ते पुढे जाऊन पैसे घेऊन पुढे विकणार होते, अशी माहिती समोर आल्याचेही पोलीस आयुक्त अशोक दुधे यांनी दिली. उमेदवार- कोचिंग सेंटर, तसेच दुसऱ्या कुणी व्यक्ती पेपर विकत घेणार होते का? हे देखील तपासत आहोत, असे पोलीस अधिकारी दुधे यांनी सांगितले.

दिल्ली-उत्तराखंड में खालिस्तानी आतंकी हमले की धमकी, हाई अलर्ट पर पुलिस
description:
नेशनल डेस्कः खुफिया एजेंसियों ने अगले कुछ दिनों में खालिस्तानी आतंकियों द्वारा संभावित आतंकी हमले की जानकारी मिलने के बाद दिल्ली और उत्तराखंड में हाई अलर्ट जारी किया है। अलर्ट में चेतावनी दी गई है कि खालिस्तानी आतंकी उत्तराखंड और दिल्ली के प्रमुख मंदिरों को निशाना बना सकते हैं। धार्मिक स्थलों के अलावा, सरकारी संस्थानों,.
The post दिल्ली-उत्तराखंड में खालिस्तानी आतंकी हमले की धमकी, हाई अलर्ट पर पुलिस appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
content:
नेशनल डेस्कः खुफिया एजेंसियों ने अगले कुछ दिनों में खालिस्तानी आतंकियों द्वारा संभावित आतंकी हमले की जानकारी मिलने के बाद दिल्ली और उत्तराखंड में हाई अलर्ट जारी किया है। अलर्ट में चेतावनी दी गई है कि खालिस्तानी आतंकी उत्तराखंड और दिल्ली के प्रमुख मंदिरों को निशाना बना सकते हैं। धार्मिक स्थलों के अलावा, सरकारी संस्थानों, रेलवे स्टेशनों और पुलिस प्रतिष्ठानों को भी संभावित लक्ष्यों के रूप में चिह्नित किया गया है।
ये भी पढ़ें :-


उत्तर प्रदेश में 75,000 एकड़ भूमि बैंक, अनुकूल नीतियों का लाभ उठायें निवेशक: CM YOGI

यह अलर्ट अधिकारियों को एक संदिग्ध ईमेल मिलने के बाद जारी किया गया, जिसमें कथित तौर पर कई मंदिरों, सरकारी कार्यालयों और राजनीतिक नेताओं का संभावित लक्ष्यों के रूप में उल्लेख किया गया था। सुरक्षा एजेंसियां ​​ईमेल की सामग्री को गंभीरता से ले रही हैं। अलर्ट के बाद उत्तराखंड पुलिस, खुफिया एजेंसियों और दिल्ली पुलिस ने सुरक्षा बढ़ा दी हैं और संवेदनशील स्थानों पर निगरानी तेज कर दी है।
दिल्ली पुलिस ने ईमेल के स्रोत और प्रमाणिकता का पता लगाने के लिए जांच भी शुरू कर दी है। सुरक्षा एजेंसियां ​​इसकी सामग्री की जांच कर रही हैं और खतरे की विश्वसनीयता का आकलन कर रही हैं। अधिकारियों ने अभी तक खतरे की प्रकृति या तात्कालिकता की पुष्टि नहीं की है, और आगे की जांच जारी है। दोनों राज्यों में एहतियाती उपाय जारी रहने के कारण अधिकारी अलर्ट पर हैं।
पाकिस्तानी आतंकी समूह से संबंध होने पर महिला गिरफ्तार
यह अलर्ट राजस्थान एंटी-टेररिस्ट स्क्वाड (ATS) द्वारा बबीता धाकड़ उर्फ ​​खदीजा नाम की महिला को पाकिस्तान स्थित आतंकी संगठन जैश-ए-मोहम्मद के सदस्यों के साथ कथित तौर पर संपर्क बनाए रखने के आरोप में गिरफ्तार किए जाने के कुछ दिनों बाद आया है। आरोपी महिला, जो मूल रूप से गंगापुर शहर की रहने वाली थी और जयपुर में रह रही थी, को देश विरोधी तत्वों के साथ उसके संबंधों का संकेत देने वाली खुफिया जानकारी के बाद हिरासत में लिया गया।
उसके मोबाइल फोन की प्रारंभिक जांच के दौरान, जांचकर्ताओं को पता चला कि वह दो सिम कार्ड और एक फेसबुक अकाउंट का इस्तेमाल कर रही थी, जिसमें आपत्तिजनक सामग्री के साथ-साथ विदेशी प्रोफाइल के लिंक भी थे। अधिकारियों ने बताया कि उसकी फ्रेंड लिस्ट में कई प्रोफाइल पर झंडे, जैश-ए-मोहम्मद और अन्य चरमपंथी संगठनों से संबंधित प्रचार सामग्री, और हथियारबंद उग्रवादियों जैसी तस्वीरें दिखाई दीं। जांच में यह भी पता चला कि वह व्हाट्सएप के माध्यम से कई पाकिस्तानी और अन्य विदेशी नंबरों के संपर्क में थी। सूत्रों के अनुसार, उसकी संपर्क सूची में पाए गए कुछ पाकिस्तानी नंबरों के आतंकी गुर्गों से जुड़े होने का संदेह है।
सूत्रों ने आगे दावा किया कि पूछताछ के दौरान, आरोपी महिला ने जांचकर्ताओं को बताया कि पाकिस्तान स्थित एक मुफ्ती द्वारा फोन पर मार्गदर्शन मिलने के बाद उसने इस्लाम धर्म अपना लिया था। उन्होंने यह भी आरोप लगाया कि उसके हैंडलर उसे पाकिस्तान भेजने की योजना बना रहे थे। जांच में मिली जानकारी के आधार पर, ATS ने उस पर ‘गैर-कानूनी गतिविधियां (रोकथाम) अधिनियम’ (UAPA) और ‘भारतीय न्याय संहिता’ (BNS) की संबंधित धाराओं के तहत मामला दर्ज किया। उसे अदालत में पेश किया गया, जिसने उसे 27 जून तक ATS की हिरासत में भेज दिया।

title: US-Iran War Latest News: UKMTO says ship struck by ‘unidentified projectile’ in Strait of Hormuz
description: A fresh security incident has been reported in the Strait of Hormuz after a commercial tanker was hit by an unidentified object, according to the UK Maritime Trade Operations (UKMTO).
content: The British military's maritime security agency, United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations (UKMTO), on Saturday reported a fresh security incident in the Strait of Hormuz after a commercial tanker was hit by an unknown object."UKMTO has received a report of an incident within the Strait of Hormuz. The Master of Tanker has reported being struck by an unidentified projectile," it said.Till now, no country or group has taken responsibility for the attack. According to UKMATO, the strike hit the vessel's bridge, causing damage. Fortunately, all crew members on board are safe. The agency also said there has been no environmental impact and urged ships passing through the region to remain alert and instantly report any suspicious activity.Another British maritime security firm, Vanguard Tech, identified the vessel as the Panama-flagged tanker KIKU.US sanctions Indian company, CEO and 6 others over alleged role in Sudan conflict – DetailsCargo ship was targeted in the Strait of HormuzThis incident has taken place just hours after an Iranian drone reportedly targeted a cargo ship in the Strait of Hormuz. The act has raised concerns over the recently agreed ceasefire between the US and Iran.In response to Iran's drone attack, the US military fired strikes on drone shortage facilities as well as coastal radar installations. US Central Command said the operation was launched in response to "unwarranted aggression against commercial shipping by Iranian forces" that "clearly violated the ceasefire."Iran, on the other hand, strongly condemned the offensive action carried out by the US. Its foreign ministry described the strikes as "a blatant violation" of the MOU aimed at ending the conflict. Meanwhile, Iran's Revolutionary Guards claimed responsibility for attacks on US positions in the Gulf. Iran disseminated a strong warning, stating that "if the aggression is repeated, our response will be broader than this."The regional tensions have impacted neighbouring countries. Bahrain said it came under attack from several Iranian drones on Saturday and accused Tehran of "sabotaging peace efforts."Iran also warned Gulf nations against aligning with Washington. Iranian Deputy Foreign Minister Kazem Gharibabadi said safe navigation through the Strait of Hormuz "cannot be guaranteed under ambiguous arrangements, parallel routes or decision-making that does not take Iran's role as a coastal state into account."Despite the resumption of military exchanges, global oil markets have remained relatively calm. Crude prices fell by around 3 per cent on Friday, while Saudi Aramco resumed crude oil loadings at its Ras Tanura terminal, the world's largest oil export facility, after a suspension that lasted nearly four months.US-India trade deal news: 'There's a handful of issues that remain' - What Sergio Gor revealed

title: K Bhagyaraj: ବରିଷ୍ଠ ତାମିଲ ଅଭିନେତା-ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶକ କେ. ଭାଗ୍ୟରାଜଙ୍କ ପରଲୋକ
description:
ମୁମ୍ବାଇ: ତାମିଲ ସିନେମାର ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ ଅଭିନେତା, ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶକ ଏବଂ ସ୍କ୍ରିନରାଇଟର କେ. ଭାଗ୍ୟରାଜଙ୍କ  ଚେନ୍ନାଇରେ ହୃଦଘାତରେ ପରଲୋକ ହୋଇଛି। ତାଙ୍କ ମୃତ୍ୟୁରେ ତାମିଲ ସିନେମା ଜଗତର ଏକ ଦୀର୍ଘ ଯୁଗର ଅନ୍ତ ଘଟିଛି। ଭାଗ୍ୟରାଜ ସର୍ବଦା ମଧ୍ୟବର୍ଗୀୟ ପରିବାର ଜୀବନ, ସାମାଜିକ ସମସ୍ୟା ଏବଂ ଦୈନନ୍ଦିନ ମାନବୀୟ ସମ୍ପର୍କକୁ ନିଜ ଫିଲ୍ମରେ ବହୁତ ସୁନ୍ଦର ଭାବେ ତୋଳି ଧରାଉଥିଲେ। ତାଙ୍କ ଫିଲ୍ମଗୁଡ଼ିକ ସରଳ କିନ୍ତୁ ଗଭୀର କାହାଣୀ ପାଇଁ ବେଶ ପରିଚିତ ଥିଲା। ଏହି ଶୈଳୀ ପାଇଁ ୧୯୮୦ ଏବଂ ୧୯୯୦ ଦଶକରେ ତାମିଲ ସିନେମାକୁ ନୂଆ ପରିଚୟ ମିଳିଥିଲା। ଭାଗ୍ୟରାଜ ତାମିଲ ଫିଲ୍ମ ଇଣ୍ଡଷ୍ଟ୍ରିର ସବୁଠାରୁ ପ୍ରଭାବଶାଳୀ ଲେଖକ-ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶକ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ ଜଣେ ଥିଲେ।
ଭାଗ୍ୟରାଜଙ୍କ କ୍ୟାରିୟରରେ ସେ ୨୫ରୁ ଅଧିକ ଚଳଚ୍ଚିତ୍ର ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶନା ‌ଦେଇଥିବା ବେ‌ଳେ ୭୫ରୁ ଅଧିକ ଫିଲ୍ମରେ ଅଭିନୟ କରିଥିଲେ। ତାଙ୍କର ଲୋକପ୍ରିୟ ଚଳଚ୍ଚିତ୍ରମାନଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ‘ମୁନ୍ଧାନାଇ ମୁଦିଚୁ’, ‘ଅନ୍ଧା ୭ ନାଟକଲ୍’ ଏବଂ ‘ଡାର୍ଲିଂ, ଡାର୍ଲିଂ, ଡାର୍ଲିଂ’ ରହିଛି।। ତାଙ୍କର ସ୍କ୍ରିନପ୍ଲେ ଲେଖନ ଶୈଳୀ ଏତେ ଶକ୍ତିଶାଳୀ ଥିଲା ଯେ ସେ ନିଜେ ଗଳ୍ପ, ସଂଳାପ ଓ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶନକୁ ଏକାସାଥିରେ ନେଇ ଚଳଚ୍ଚିତ୍ର ତିଆରି କରୁଥିଲେ।
ପେଟ୍ରୋଲ ନିଆଁରେ ଜଳି ଜୀବନ ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ସହ ସଂଘର୍ଷ କରୁଥିଲେ ଯୁବତୀ, ଚିକିତ୍ସା ପାଇଁ ମିଳିଲାନି ଶଯ୍ୟା
ତାଙ୍କ ଅବଦାନକୁ ସ୍ୱୀକୃତି ଦେଇ ତାମିଲନାଡୁର ପୂର୍ବତନ ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ତଥା ଲୋକପ୍ରିୟ ଅଭିନେତା ଏମ.ଜି. ରାମଚନ୍ଦ୍ରନ ତାଙ୍କୁ ଇଣ୍ଡଷ୍ଟ୍ରିର ଉତ୍ତରାଧିକାରୀ ଭାବେ ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ଭାବରେ ପ୍ରଶଂସା କରିଥିଲେ। ଏହା ତାଙ୍କ ପ୍ରତିଭାର ଏକ ବଡ଼ ସ୍ୱୀକୃତି ଥିଲା।ଭାଗ୍ୟରାଜ ହିନ୍ଦୀ ସିନେମାରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ନିଜର ଦକ୍ଷତା  ଦେଖାଇଥିଲେ। ସେ ୧୯୮୬ରେ ‘ଆଖିରି ରାସ୍ତା’ ଫିଲ୍ମର ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶନା ଦେଇଥିଲେ, ଯେଉଁଥିରେ ଅମିତାଭ ବଚ୍ଚନ, ଜୟା ପ୍ରଦା, ଶ୍ରୀଦେବୀ ଏବଂ ଅନୁପମ ଖେର ଅଭିନୟ କରିଥିଲେ। ପ୍ରତିଶୋଧ ଆଧାରିତ ଏହି ଫିଲ୍ମ ହିନ୍ଦୀ ସିନେମାରେ ଏକ ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ସ୍ଥାନ ଦଖଲ କରିଥିଲା।
ଭାଗ୍ୟରାଜ କେବଳ ଅଭିନେତା କି ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶକ ନୁହନ୍ତି, ବରଂ ସେ ଜଣେ ପ୍ରଜଯୋକ, ସଙ୍ଗୀତକାର, ଲେଖକ ଏବଂ ରାଜନେତା ଭାବେ ମଧ୍ୟ ସକ୍ରିୟ ଥିଲେ। ତାଙ୍କ ବହୁମୁଖୀ ପ୍ରତିଭା ତାଙ୍କୁ ଭାରତୀୟ ସିନେମାର ଏକ ଅନନ୍ୟ ଶାଶ୍ବତ ଭାବେ ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠିତ କରିଥିଲା।ଭାଗ୍ୟରାଜ ନିଜ ପଛରେ ପତ୍ନୀ ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣିମା ଭାଗ୍ୟରାଜ, ପୁଅ ଶାନ୍ତନୁ ଭାଗ୍ୟରାଜ ଏବଂ କନ୍ୟା ସାରଣ୍ୟା ଭାଗ୍ୟରାଜଙ୍କ ସହ ଏକ ପ୍ରିୟ ପରିବାର ଛାଡ଼ି ଯାଇଛନ୍ତି। ତାଙ୍କ ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ଭାରତୀୟ ସିନେମା ପାଇଁ ଏକ ଅପୂରଣୀୟ କ୍ଷତି।

title: Jyoti Waghmare : संजय राऊत म्हणजे ठाकरे सेनेला लागलेली वाळवी; खासदार डॉ. ज्योती वाघमारेंचा हल्लाबोल
description: पुणे (प्रतिनिधी) संजय राऊत यांची जीभ म्हणजे महाराष्ट्राच्या राजकारणाला लागलेली ‘वाळवी’ आहे. ज्याप्रमाणे वाळवी लाकूड आतून पोखरून काढते, त्याप्रमाणे राऊत आपल्याच पक्षाला (उबाठा गट) संपवत असल्याची टीका शिवसेनेच्या प्रवक्त्या आणि राज्यसभा खासदार डॉ. ज्योती वाघमारे यांनी शनिवारी पत्रकार परिषदेत केली. पत्रकार परिषदेच्या सुऊवातीला डॉ. वाघमारे यांनी लोकशाहीच्या चौथ्या स्तंभाचा आदर राखत त्यांचे सहकारी खासदार संजय […]
content:
पुणे (प्रतिनिधी)



संजय राऊत यांची जीभ म्हणजे महाराष्ट्राच्या राजकारणाला लागलेली ‘वाळवी’ आहे. ज्याप्रमाणे वाळवी लाकूड आतून पोखरून काढते, त्याप्रमाणे राऊत आपल्याच पक्षाला (उबाठा गट) संपवत असल्याची टीका शिवसेनेच्या प्रवक्त्या आणि राज्यसभा खासदार डॉ. ज्योती वाघमारे यांनी शनिवारी पत्रकार परिषदेत केली.



पत्रकार परिषदेच्या सुऊवातीला डॉ. वाघमारे यांनी लोकशाहीच्या चौथ्या स्तंभाचा आदर राखत त्यांचे सहकारी खासदार संजय दिना पाटील यांनी पत्रकारांशी केलेल्या गैरवर्तनाबद्दल पक्षाच्या वतीने दिलगिरी व्यक्त केली. मी स्वत: पत्रकारितेतून करिअरची सुऊवात केली. 2002 च्या सोलापूर दंगलीत आपण धाडसी रिपोर्टिंग केले, असे सांगत संजय राऊत यांच्या भाषेवर त्यांनी आक्षेप नोंदवला.



राऊत यांनी उपमुख्यमंत्री एकनाथ शिंदे यांच्याबाबत ‘प्रेग्नन्सी’ आणि ‘बाळंतपण’ यांसारखे शब्दप्रयोग वापरले. वास्तविक मातृत्व ही एक अत्यंत पवित्र आणि मंगल संकल्पना आहे. तिची अशा प्रकारे राजकीय टवाळकी करणे म्हणजे मवालीपणा आहे. ‘ऑपरेशन तुडवा’ ही मोहीम खरे तर ‘ऑपरेशन उबाठा बुडवा’ आणि ‘काँग्रेस वाढवा’ अशीच आहे. राऊत यांनी पत्रकार परिषदांमध्ये वापरलेल्या बीभत्स भाषेचा निषेध करत त्यांच्याविरोधात राष्ट्रीय महिला आयोगाकडे अधिकृत तक्रार दाखल केल्याची माहितीही त्यांनी दिली.



आदित्य ठाकरे आणि खासदार श्रीकांत शिंदे यांच्या कामाच्या पद्धतीची तुलनाच होऊ शकत नाही. आदित्य ठाकरे ‘युरोप वारी’ आणि ‘प्रिंगल्स-कोल्ड कॉफी’ संस्कृतीचे वाहक आहे. तर तर श्रीकांत शिंदे हे विदर्भ-मराठवाड्याच्या 47-48 अंश तापमानात कायकर्त्यांसोबत ‘वडापाव’ आणि ‘कटिंग चहा’ घेऊन काम करतात. पक्ष सोडून गेलेले लोक ‘खोक्मयांमुळे’ नव्हे, तर पक्षनेतृत्वाने दिलेल्या ‘धोक्मयांमुळे’ आणि अविश्वासामुळे बाहेर पडले आहेत, असा आरोपही त्यांनी केला.



एकनाथ शिंदे यांच्या नेतृत्वाखालील शिवसेना हा सर्वसामान्य कार्यकर्त्यांचा पक्ष आहे. एका साध्या पत्र्याच्या घरातून आलेली, कोणतीही राजकीय पार्श्वभूमी नसलेली महिला आज राज्यसभा खासदार होऊ शकली, हे केवळ शिंदे साहेबांच्या सर्वसमावेशक धोरणामुळेच माझ्याबाबतीत शक्मय झाले. उद्धव ठाकरे यांचा सध्याचा दौरा म्हणजे ‘वरातीमागून घोडे’ असा प्रकार आहे. अडीच वर्षांच्या मुख्यमंत्रिपदाच्या काळात जे ‘मातोश्री’ ते ‘मंत्रालय’ हे काही किलोमीटरचे अंतर कापू शकले नाहीत, ते आता केवळ आपल्या मुलाच्या राजकीय पुनर्वसनासाठी राज्यभर फिरत आहेत, अशी टीकाही त्यांनी केली.

title: This rural Maine factory made 100 million COVID swabs a month. Its CEO says manufacturing’s best days are ahead
description: The CEO of Puritan Medical Products argues that on America's 250th birthday, manufacturing isn't declining — it's an underappreciated growth story.
content:
On the 250th anniversary of America, there is cause for a lot of celebration—and a little concern too. But, now more than ever, we should keep the glass half-full.



We are incredibly fortunate to be Americans. As a lifelong Mainer, hardly the epicenter of American society, I count myself blessed for the economic opportunities that hardworking people can still find to get ahead. Despite our socioeconomic challenges in a changing world, the U.S. economy is still the standard for the rest of the globe. While other countries face political instability, civic unrest, and double-digit unemployment rates, our economy continues to innovate and grow. There are nearly eight million open jobs in the United States—a testament to entrepreneurship and business dynamism.



No business community is more dynamic than manufacturing. From the Industrial Revolution to post-World War II globalization and current debates about tariff rates, manufacturers have consistently found themselves in the spotlight or under scrutiny. And yet, we persevere. Our perseverance as an economic sector is unprecedented, providing the entire economy with the strongest possible backbone.



In so many ways, manufacturing is the U.S. economy. Domestic manufacturers contribute nearly $3 trillion in economic output, accounting for about 10 percent of gross domestic product and employing well over 12 million workers. This is a greater impact than the entire economy of Canada or Russia or South Korea.



Much has been made of manufacturing’s demise in recent decades, but manufacturers remain alive and well. Our “Made in the USA” story is still being written. I know firsthand: My family’s company, Maine-based Puritan Medical Products, became North America’s largest supplier of COVID-19 testing swabs during the pandemic, hiring and training hundreds of workers to produce up to 100 million swabs a month for Americans in need. Today, we are a trusted domestic manufacturer of swabs and single-use specimen collection devices for healthcare, diagnostics, forensics, controlled environments, and environmental sciences. We source American inputs and we make our products in rural Maine, nowhere else.



Puritan’s story is just one of countless examples. From Guilford, Maine to the West Coast, every $1 spent in manufacturing generates nearly $3 in additional economic activity across other sectors. This multiplier effect means jobs, jobs, and jobs, but also something more: A brighter future for workers and their families. It means living the American Dream.



Today, countless millions of people are living their dreams because of manufacturing, despite negative headlines and constant chatter that U.S.-made products have no future. To the contrary, manufacturing firms like Puritan are looking for even more human talent to write our sector’s next chapter. There are currently about 500,000 unfilled manufacturing jobs, many of them in rural states like Maine. Despite the rise of artificial intelligence, we still need human capital from Maine or “from away” (as Mainers say) to write that chapter.



There is always a next chapter. Manufacturing isn’t declining; we are adapting, evolving, and innovating. I don’t see a “hollowed out” Maine. For a company like ours, it means an aggressive expansion of liquid transport systems and entering the industrial disposable market. For another business, it may mean securing our national defense or taking AI development to the next level.



Each passing day brings dozens of headlines about AI investments, but innovation is not confined to Silicon Valley. Our home base of Guilford has a population of barely 1,000, and it doesn’t stop us from serving global customers.



How many other stories like that can be told? Too many to count.



If America is going to survive another 250 years, that won’t happen without manufacturing. The birth of our great nation basically coincides with the dawn of the Industrial Revolution, which came to our shores before the turn of the 18th century. The first permanent cotton-spinning mill was established in Pawtucket, Rhode Island dating back to 1790. This was during George Washington’s first presidential term.



Manufacturing isn’t only the strongest backbone of America’s economy; it is one with American history. Reports of our death are greatly exaggerated. We are just getting started.



The opinions expressed in Fortune.com commentary pieces are solely the views of their authors and do not necessarily reflect the opinions and beliefs of Fortune.
This story was originally featured on Fortune.com

title: Nunar lavender farm emerges as seasonal tourist attraction in Ganderbalmuba
description: The Agriculture Department-run lavender farm at Nunar in Ganderbal, spread over 68 kanals, is emerging as a seasonal attraction, drawing visitors during the blooming period. The farm produces over 65 quintals of lavender flowers annually and recently hosted a Lavender Festival attended by Chief Minister Omar Abdullah. Officials said the expansion of lavender cultivation, improved distillation facilities and growing farmer participation under the CSIR Aroma Mission are contributing to the sector's growth, while also enhancing the area's tourism appeal.

title: Ashok Vaswani, Kotak Mahindra Bank MD & CEO, to step down on December 31 – His education, career and other details
description: Vaswani, who has led the bank since January 1, 2024, will not seek reappointment. The board has initiated the process to identify and appoint a new MD & CEO.
content: Kotak Mahindra Bank on Saturday has announced that its Managing Director and CEO, Ashok Vaswani, will step down at the end of his current term on December 31, 2026. Vaswani, who has led the bank since January 1, 2024, will not seek reappointment. The board has initiated the process to identify and appoint a new MD & CEO."The Board has, at its meeting held today, respected his decision and has initiated the process for the appointment of a new Managing Director & CEO. The process will be completed within applicable regulatory timelines," the company has said in an exchange filing.Who is Ashok Vaswani?Ashok Vaswani is a seasoned banker with over 35 years of global experience across Asia, Europe, the Middle East, and the United States. He joined Kotak Mahindra Bank as MD & CEO in January 2024, succeeding the leadership transition following Uday Kotak’s tenure.Vaswani holds a Bachelor of Commerce (BCom) degree with a focus on Economics and Accountancy from Sydenham College of Commerce and Economics, University of Mumbai. He is also a qualified Chartered Accountant (CA) from the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) and a Company Secretary (CS) from the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI). He has completed executive education at Stanford Graduate School of Business.His education, career and other detailsVaswani spent nearly two decades at Citigroup, where he held various leadership roles and was instrumental in building the consumer banking business in India.He later joined Barclays, rising to the position of Chief Digital Officer. At Barclays, he led a major transformation, shifting the bank from analog to digital operations. This involved redesigning technology architecture, modernizing customer journeys, and implementing data-led operations.In his message to stakeholders in the bank’s FY2023-24 annual report, Vaswani emphasised his core philosophy.“In all my 35 years of working experience, one lesson stands out, if you get it right by the customer, everything else will fall into place," he said.A Kotak Mahindra Bank spokesperson said the Board’s decision reflects standard succession planning for the end of Vaswani’s three-year term. The bank expressed gratitude for his contributions to strengthening its digital capabilities and customer focus during his leadership.

title: राम मंदिर चढ़ावा चोरी मामले में बड़ा अपडेट, टिन्नू यादव के हॉस्टल से इतने लाख रुपये बरामद
description:
Ram Temple Donation Theft: राम मंदिर में चढ़ावे की चोरी के मामले में पुलिस जांच लगातार आगे बढ़ रही है। इस मामले में गिरफ्तार आरोपी टिन्नू यादव के हॉस्टल के कमरे से करीब 20 लाख रुपये नकद बरामद किए गए हैं। पुलिस का कहना है कि यह रकम आरोपी की निशानदेही पर मिली है। जानकारी.
The post राम मंदिर चढ़ावा चोरी मामले में बड़ा अपडेट, टिन्नू यादव के हॉस्टल से इतने लाख रुपये बरामद appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
content:
Ram Temple Donation Theft: राम मंदिर में चढ़ावे की चोरी के मामले में पुलिस जांच लगातार आगे बढ़ रही है। इस मामले में गिरफ्तार आरोपी टिन्नू यादव के हॉस्टल के कमरे से करीब 20 लाख रुपये नकद बरामद किए गए हैं। पुलिस का कहना है कि यह रकम आरोपी की निशानदेही पर मिली है।
जानकारी के मुताबिक, गुरुवार देर रात टिन्नू यादव को गिरफ्तार किया गया था। इसके बाद शुक्रवार सुबह पुलिस उसे साथ लेकर दुर्गापुरी कॉलोनी स्थित उसके हॉस्टल पहुंची। यहां दो कमरों की तलाशी ली गई, जहां से करीब 20 लाख रुपये बरामद हुए। तलाशी के दौरान चार पुलिसकर्मी मौके पर मौजूद रहे।
23 लाख रुपये बरामद किए जा चुके- पुलिस 
पुलिस के अनुसार, इस मामले में अब तक टिन्नू यादव और उसके भतीजे मनीष यादव के पास से कुल करीब 23 लाख रुपये बरामद किए जा चुके हैं। इनमें 20 लाख रुपये हॉस्टल से मिले, जबकि बाकी रकम अन्य स्थानों से बरामद की गई है। फिलहाल पुलिस दोनों आरोपियों से पूछताछ कर रही है और मामले की गहराई से जांच जारी है।
एफआईआर में कई लोगों के नाम शामिल
रामजन्मभूमि थाने में यह एफआईआर श्री राम जन्मभूमि तीर्थ क्षेत्र ट्रस्ट के सदस्य कृष्ण मोहन की शिकायत पर दर्ज की गई है। शिकायत में आरोप लगाया गया है कि मंदिर में चढ़ावे की गिनती के दौरान कुछ लोगों ने मिलकर नकदी और आभूषणों की चोरी की साजिश रची और उसे अंजाम दिया। एफआईआर में अविनाश शुक्ला, अनुकल्प मिश्रा, लवकुश मिश्रा, मनीष कुमार यादव, करुणेश पांडे, रमाशंकर मिश्रा, सुभाष श्रीवास्तव और राम शंकर यादव उर्फ टिन्नू यादव समेत कुछ अन्य अज्ञात लोगों को भी आरोपी बनाया गया है। पुलिस सभी आरोपों की जांच कर रही है और सबूत जुटाने में लगी है।
सुरक्षा व्यवस्था भी जांच के घेरे में
जांच अब केवल चोरी तक सीमित नहीं है। इस मामले की जांच कर रही एसआईटी मंदिर की सुरक्षा और निगरानी व्यवस्था की भी पड़ताल कर रही है। सूत्रों के मुताबिक, मंदिर के वायरलेस विभाग के रेडियो मेंटेनेंस ऑफिसर (RMO) अर्जुन देव की भूमिका भी जांच के दायरे में है। उनके पास मंदिर के वायरलेस सिस्टम, सीसीटीवी कैमरों और चढ़ावे की गिनती वाले कक्ष की निगरानी की जिम्मेदारी थी। जांच एजेंसियां यह पता लगाने की कोशिश कर रही हैं कि सुरक्षा व्यवस्था में कोई लापरवाही हुई थी या नहीं, और कहीं किसी अधिकारी ने अपनी जिम्मेदारी निभाने में चूक तो नहीं की। मामले की जांच अभी जारी है और आने वाले दिनों में और भी अहम खुलासे हो सकते हैं।
The post राम मंदिर चढ़ावा चोरी मामले में बड़ा अपडेट, टिन्नू यादव के हॉस्टल से इतने लाख रुपये बरामद appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.

প্ৰথমবাৰলৈ ৩গৰাকী ভাৰতীয় কিশোৰে লাভ কৰিলে ‘আৰ্থ প্ৰাইজ’...
description:
ভাৰতৰ বিভিন্ন প্ৰান্তত এতিয়াও বিশুদ্ধ খোৱাপানীৰ অভাৱ দেখিবলৈ পোৱা যায়। বহুতে এতিয়াও পুখুৰী, জুৰি আদিৰ পৰা পানী খাই জীৱন অতিবাহিত কৰিবলগীয়া হৈছে। এই সমস্যাৰ সমাধান বিচাৰি অভিনৱ পদক্ষেপ গ্ৰহণ কৰিছে আমাৰ দেশৰে তিনিগৰাকী কিশোৰে। আৰু এই উদ্ভাৱনা কৰি তেওঁলোকে লাভ কৰিছে ‘আৰ্থ প্ৰাইজ’। আৰু এই বঁটা লাভ কৰা তেওঁলোকে প্ৰথম ভাৰতীয়। এই সন্দৰ্ভত অসমীয়া প্ৰতিদিন ডিজিটেলৰ ৰাজৰ্ষি চহৰীয়াৰ এক প্ৰতিবেদন।

ভাৰতৰ যুৱ প্ৰজন্মই ইচ্ছা কৰিলে সকলো কৰিব পাৰে। আমাৰ দেশৰ বহু স্থানত এতিয়াও বিশুদ্ধ খোৱাপানীৰ বাবে হাহাকাৰ কৰা দেখা যায়। কোনোৱে যদি ৪-৫ কিলোমিটাৰ দূৰলৈ খোজকাঢ়ি পানী আনিবলগীয়া হয়, আন কোনোৱে আকৌ পাহাৰ বগাই যাবলগীয়া হয়। তদুপৰি এই পানী সম্পূৰ্ণৰূপে বিশুদ্ধও নহয়।
কিন্তু ১৬ বছৰীয়া কিশোৰ-কিশোৰীৰ তিনিজনীয়া এটা দলে এই সমস্যাৰ সমাধান বিচাৰি উলিয়াবলৈ এক অভিনৱ পদক্ষেপ গ্ৰহণ কৰিছে। আব্যানা মেহটা, আৰিয়ানা আগৰৱালা আৰু বিবান চাৱছাৰিয়াই শেহতীয়াকৈ পানীৰ পৰা মাইক্ৰ’প্লাষ্টিক আঁতৰোৱাৰ এক অতি কম ব্যয়বহুল পদ্ধতি উদ্ভাৱনা কৰিছে। 
এই উদ্ভাৱনীৰ পাছতে তেওঁলোকে লাভ কৰে ‘আৰ্থ প্ৰাইজ ২০২৬’। চলিত বৰ্ষৰ ২৯ মে’ত জেনেভাত অনুষ্ঠিত ‘আৰ্থ প্ৰাইজ’ বঁটা প্ৰদান অনুষ্ঠানত তেওঁলোকক গ্ল’বেল বিজয়ী ঘোষণা কৰা হয়। ২৩ হাজাৰতকৈ অধিক লোকে অংশগ্ৰহণ কৰা জনমতৰ জৰিয়তে সাঁতটা আঞ্চলিক ফাইনেলিষ্টৰ মাজৰ পৰা তেওঁলোকৰ উদ্ভাৱন ‘প্লাছ-ষ্টিক’ক বিজয়ী হিচাপে নিৰ্বাচিত কৰা হয়। এই সফলতাৰ জৰিয়তে তেওঁলোক ‘আৰ্থ প্ৰাইজ’ জয়ী প্ৰথম ভাৰতীয় দল হিচাপে ইতিহাস ৰচিলে।
‘প্লাছ-ষ্টিক’ কি?
আৰ্থ প্ৰাইজ বিজয়ী প্ৰকল্পটো IIT গুৱাহাটী সহযোগত বিকশিত কৰা হৈছে। ‘টেটলাৰ এছিয়া’ৰ তথ্য অনুসৰি, প্লাছ-ষ্টিকে ইতিমধ্যে ৮,০০০ৰো অধিক ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰী আৰু শিক্ষকক স্পৰ্শ কৰিছে। প্লাছ-ষ্টিক হৈছে তেঁতেলীৰ গুটিৰ অপচয় অংশৰ পৰা তৈয়াৰ কৰা এক বিশেষ গুড়ি, যিয়ে পানীত থকা মাইক্ৰ’প্লাষ্টিক কণিকাবোৰক একেলগে জোঁট বান্ধিবলৈ সহায় কৰে।
বিশেষকৈ যিসকল লোকৰ খোৱাপানী বিশুদ্ধকৰণ কৰাৰ ব্যৱস্থা বা সুবিধা নাই, তেওঁলোকৰ বাবে এই পদ্ধতি উদ্ভাৱন কৰা হৈছে। ইয়াৰ আটাইতকৈ ডাঙৰ সুবিধা হৈছে- ইয়াৰ বাবে বিদ্যুতৰ প্ৰয়োজন নহয়। উল্লেখ্য যে, তিনিজন কিশোৰে এটা শিশুক ডাঙৰ প্লাষ্টিকৰ পাত্ৰৰ পৰা পোনপটীয়াকৈ পানী খোৱা দেখা পাই এই ধাৰণাটো লাভ কৰিছিল। 
তেওঁলোকৰ মতে, দূষিত পানীত এই গুড়ি মিহলাই দিলে ই মাইক্ৰ’প্লাষ্টিক কণিকাবোৰক আকৰ্ষণ কৰে আৰু সিহঁতক ডাঙৰ ডাঙৰ থুপত পৰিণত কৰে। তাৰপাছত এই থুপবোৰ চুম্বকৰ সহায়ত সহজে আঁতৰাব পাৰি। তেঁতেলীৰ গুটিত স্বাভাৱিকভাৱে থকা আঠাৰ দৰে পলিছেকাৰাইড আৰু আন বন্ধনকাৰী যৌগসমূহে পানীত থকা এই কণিকাবোৰক একেলগে সংযুক্ত কৰাত সহায় কৰে।
মাইক্ৰ’প্লাষ্টিক কিয় বিশ্বজুৰি চিন্তাৰ বিষয়?
মাইক্ৰ’প্লাষ্টিক হৈছে ৫ মিলিমিটাৰতকৈও সৰু আকাৰৰ অতি ক্ষুদ্ৰ প্লাষ্টিক কণা, যিবোৰ ডাঙৰ প্লাষ্টিক সামগ্ৰীৰ ভাঙন, কৃত্ৰিম কাপোৰ, ঔদ্যোগিক অপচয় আৰু পেকেজিং সামগ্ৰীৰ পৰা সৃষ্টি হয়। UNICEFৰ ২০২৫ চনৰ আগষ্ট মাহৰ প্ৰতিবেদন অনুসৰি, বিশ্বজুৰি প্ৰায় ২.১ বিলিয়ন লোক এতিয়াও বিশুদ্ধ খোৱাপানীৰ সুবিধাৰ পৰা বঞ্চিত। সাম্প্ৰতিক বৈজ্ঞানিক গৱেষণাত খোৱাপানী, সামুদ্ৰিক খাদ্য, মানৱ ৰক্ত আৰু মগজুৰ কোষতো মাইক্ৰ’প্লাষ্টিকৰ উপস্থিতি ধৰা পৰিছে।
ইফালে, ‘আৰ্থ প্ৰাইজ ২০২৬’ লাভ কৰাৰ পাছত আৱ্যানা, আৰিয়ানা আৰু বিবানে তেওঁলোকৰ উদ্ভাৱন অধিক বিস্তৃতভাৱে প্ৰয়োগ কৰাৰ লগতে ভাৰতৰ গ্ৰাম্য অঞ্চলসমূহলৈ এই ব্যৱস্থা সম্প্ৰসাৰণ কৰাৰ পৰিকল্পনা কৰিছে।
‘আৰ্থ প্ৰাইজ’ কি?
‘আৰ্থ প্ৰাইজ’ক বিশ্বৰ সৰ্ববৃহৎ পৰিৱেশ বিষয়ক প্ৰতিযোগিতা আৰু ১৩ৰ পৰা ১৯ বছৰ বয়সীয়া কিশোৰ-কিশোৰীৰ বাবে এক ‘আইডিয়া ইনকিউবেটৰ’ হিচাপে গণ্য কৰা হয়। জলবায়ু পৰিৱৰ্তনবিৰোধী ২০১৯ চনৰ ‘স্কুল ষ্ট্ৰাইক ফৰ ক্লাইমেট’ আন্দোলনৰ সময়ত ছুইজাৰলেণ্ডৰ জেনেভাস্থিত আৰ্থ ফাউণ্ডেশ্যনে এই কাৰ্যসূচী আৰম্ভ কৰিছিল।
ইয়াৰ মূল লক্ষ্য হৈছে- পৰিৱেশ সংৰক্ষণ আৰু বহনক্ষম উন্নয়নৰ ক্ষেত্ৰত যুৱ প্ৰজন্মৰ উদ্ভাৱনী চিন্তাক উৎসাহিত কৰা। পৰামৰ্শদান, শিক্ষামূলক সম্পদ আৰু আৰ্থিক সহায়ৰ জৰিয়তে এই অনুষ্ঠানটোৱে যুৱ উদ্ভাৱকসকলক সমৰ্থন আগবঢ়ায়।
২০২৬ বৰ্ষটো এই বঁটাৰ পঞ্চম বছৰ। আয়োজকসকলৰ দাবী অনুসৰি, এতিয়ালৈকে ১৬৯খন দেশ আৰু ২১ হাজাৰতকৈ অধিক ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীয়ে এই কাৰ্যসূচীৰ সুবিধা লাভ কৰিছে। এছিয়া অঞ্চলৰ বিজয়ী হিচাপে এই তিনিজন ভাৰতীয় ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীয়ে ১২,৫০০ মাৰ্কিন ডলাৰৰ পুঁজি লাভ কৰিছে, যিয়ে তেওঁলোকৰ প্ৰকল্পটোক আগবঢ়াই নিয়াত সহায় কৰিব। লগতে তেওঁলোকে আন্তঃৰাষ্ট্ৰীয় পৰ্যায়ত পৰামৰ্শ আৰু প্ৰচাৰৰ সুযোগো লাভ কৰিব।
আৰ্থ ফাউণ্ডেশ্যনৰ প্ৰতিষ্ঠাপক পিটাৰ মেকগেৰীয়ে কয় যে- এই উদ্ভাৱন ঠিক সেই ধৰণৰ চিন্তা যাক আগবঢ়াই নিয়াৰ বাবেই আৰ্থ প্ৰাইজৰ সৃষ্টি কৰা হৈছিল। আনহাতে, আৱ্যানা, আৰিয়ানা আৰু বিবানৰ এই সাফল্যই কেৱল সমাজক সহায় কৰিব পৰা এক উদ্ভাৱনৰ জন্ম দিয়াই নহয়, দেশৰ যুৱ প্ৰজন্মক সমস্যাবোৰ কেৱল লক্ষ্য কৰাতেই সীমাবদ্ধ নাথাকি, সেইবোৰৰ সমাধান বিচাৰি পদক্ষেপ গ্ৰহণ কৰিবলৈও অনুপ্ৰাণিত কৰিছে।

छत पर तुलसी का पौधा रखना सही या गलत? जानें किन गलतियों से बढ़ सकता है वास्तु दोष
description:
भारतीय संस्कृति में तुलसी के पौधे को बेहद पवित्र माना जाता है। मान्यता है कि घर में तुलसी लगाने से सुख-समृद्धि, सकारात्मक ऊर्जा और धार्मिक वातावरण बना रहता है।
The post छत पर तुलसी का पौधा रखना सही या गलत? जानें किन गलतियों से बढ़ सकता है वास्तु दोष appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
content:
Tulsi Plant Vastu Tips: भारतीय संस्कृति में तुलसी के पौधे को बेहद पवित्र माना जाता है। मान्यता है कि घर में तुलसी लगाने से सुख-समृद्धि, सकारात्मक ऊर्जा और धार्मिक वातावरण बना रहता है। लेकिन आज के समय में अधिकांश लोग फ्लैट या छोटे मकानों में रहते हैं, जहां आंगन की सुविधा नहीं होती। ऐसे में लोग छत पर ही तुलसी का पौधा लगाना पसंद करते हैं। हालांकि, सवाल यह है कि क्या छत पर तुलसी रखना शुभ होता है?
धार्मिक मान्यताओं और वास्तु शास्त्र के अनुसार, छत पर तुलसी का पौधा रखना गलत नहीं माना जाता, लेकिन इसके लिए कुछ विशेष नियमों का पालन करना जरूरी है। यदि इन बातों की अनदेखी की जाए तो शुभ फल मिलने की बजाय नकारात्मक प्रभाव देखने को मिल सकते हैं।
Tulsi Plant Vastu Tips
1. तुलसी के आसपास गंदगी न रहने दें
तुलसी के पौधे को पवित्रता का प्रतीक माना जाता है। यदि पौधे के आसपास धूल, कचरा, सूखी पत्तियां या पक्षियों की गंदगी जमा रहती है, तो इसे शुभ नहीं माना जाता। नियमित सफाई करने से सकारात्मक ऊर्जा बनी रहती है और पौधा भी स्वस्थ रहता है।
2. सही दिशा का रखें ध्यान
वास्तु शास्त्र के अनुसार तुलसी का पौधा उत्तर, उत्तर-पूर्व (ईशान कोण) या पूर्व दिशा में रखना अधिक शुभ माना जाता है। वहीं दक्षिण या पश्चिम दिशा में रखने से बचने की सलाह दी जाती है। सही दिशा में रखा गया पौधा घर के वातावरण को सकारात्मक बनाए रखने में सहायक माना जाता है।
3. पौधे की नियमित देखभाल करें
कई लोग तुलसी का पौधा लगाने के बाद उसकी देखभाल पर ध्यान नहीं देते। समय पर पानी न देना, पौधे का सूख जाना या लंबे समय तक उपेक्षित रहना शुभ नहीं माना जाता। इसलिए पौधे की नियमित सिंचाई करें और सूखी पत्तियों को समय-समय पर हटाते रहें।
यदि छत पर ही रखना हो तो अपनाएं ये उपाय
तुलसी के पौधे को सीधे फर्श पर रखने की बजाय स्टैंड या छोटे चबूतरे पर रखें।
तेज धूप और बारिश से बचाने के लिए हल्की छाया की व्यवस्था करें।
नियमित रूप से पौधे की सफाई और देखभाल करें।
धार्मिक मान्यताओं का पालन करने वाले लोग शाम के समय तुलसी के पास दीपक भी जला सकते हैं।
ये भी पढ़ें…

Heatwave In Europe: यूरोप में भीषण गर्मी का प्रकोप, तोड़े पिछले कई रिकॉर्ड

ध्यान रखें
तुलसी से जुड़े कई नियम धार्मिक और पारंपरिक मान्यताओं पर आधारित हैं। इनके पक्ष में वैज्ञानिक प्रमाण सीमित हैं। इसलिए इन्हें आस्था और व्यक्तिगत विश्वास के संदर्भ में ही देखा जाना चाहिए। पौधे की उचित देखभाल और स्वच्छता किसी भी स्थिति में उसके स्वस्थ विकास के लिए लाभदायक होती है।
The post छत पर तुलसी का पौधा रखना सही या गलत? जानें किन गलतियों से बढ़ सकता है वास्तु दोष appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.

title: Here's why Welcome To The Jungle is trending beyond Akshay Kumar: Pankaj Dheer's final screen appearance and Feroz Khan, Puneet Issar, Sudesh Berry's Mahabharat reunion
description: Welcome To The Jungle is grabbing attention for more than Akshay Kumar. The comedy reunites Mahabharat stars Pankaj Dheer, Feroz Khan, Puneet Issar and Sudesh Berry, while also marking Pankaj Dheer's emotional final screen appearance.
content: When Welcome To The Jungle arrived in cinemas on June 26, 2026, audiences expected a laugh riot packed with Akshay Kumar's trademark comic timing and one of the biggest ensemble casts seen in recent Bollywood history. What many moviegoers did not expect, however, was an emotional trip down memory lane. As the film unfolded, eagle-eyed fans quickly spotted several familiar faces from BR Chopra's iconic television epic Mahabharat, a series that defined Indian television in the late 1980s and continues to enjoy cult status even today. Social media was soon flooded with posts celebrating the unexpected reunion of actors who once portrayed some of the greatest warriors from the Indian epic. For many viewers, the nostalgia became just as memorable as the comedy itself. The film also carries an emotional significance as it features the final screen appearance of veteran actor Pankaj Dheer, making the experience especially poignant for long-time fans. Why are Mahabharat fans talking about Welcome To The Jungle? The comedy entertainer has an unexpected link with BR Chopra's legendary Mahabharat. Four actors associated with the celebrated television series feature in the film, creating a nostalgic moment for viewers who grew up watching the epic every Sunday on Doordarshan. The reunion includes Feroz Khan, best remembered as Arjun, Pankaj Dheer, who immortalised Karna, Puneet Issar, who played Duryodhana, and Sudesh Berry, who essayed the role of Vichitravirya. Their presence together has become one of the biggest talking points surrounding the film's release.  Did you know? BR Chopra's Mahabharat, first telecast between 1988 and 1990, remains one of Indian television's most celebrated mythological dramas. Several of its actors became synonymous with the characters they portrayed, a legacy that continues nearly four decades later. Who is Feroz Khan and why is his appearance special? Feroz Khan, earlier credited as Firoz Khan, became a household name after portraying Arjun in Mahabharat. Although television brought him nationwide recognition, he also built a steady film career with appearances in Karan Arjun, Jodi No. 1, Rishtey and Yamla Pagla Deewana 2. Interestingly, Welcome To The Jungle marks his third collaboration with Akshay Kumar. The duo had previously shared screen space in Zaalim and Barood, making this another reunion for fans. How does the film pay tribute to Pankaj Dheer? For many viewers, Pankaj Dheer's appearance carries the deepest emotional weight. The veteran actor, who famously portrayed Karna in Mahabharat, passed away in October 2025. His role in Welcome To The Jungle has now become his final screen appearance. Following the success of Mahabharat, Dheer balanced television and cinema with ease. He was widely appreciated in Chandrakanta and also appeared in films such as Soldier and Baadshah. His performances earned him a loyal fan following across generations. His son, Nikitin Dheer, has also carved a successful career in Bollywood and South Indian cinema. Where have you seen Puneet Issar before? Puneet Issar's towering portrayal of Duryodhana remains one of the defining performances of BR Chopra's Mahabharat. Beyond television, Issar has enjoyed a long career across Hindi cinema, appearing in films including Chandramukhi, Ram Jaane, Border, Refugee, Krrish, Bachna Ae Haseeno, Ready and The Kashmir Files. Many film lovers also remember him as the director of Salman Khan's Garv, adding another dimension to his long career in the industry. Which other Mahabharat actor appears in the film? Apart from Arjun, Karna and Duryodhana, the film also features Sudesh Berry, who played Vichitravirya in BR Chopra's Mahabharat. Berry rose to prominence with Ghayal, while his portrayal of Mathura Das in Border made him a familiar face across the country. He continues to appear in television projects and has remained selective about his film roles. Most recently, he made a guest appearance in Krishnavataram Part 1: The Heart. Is there another mythological connection hidden in the cast? Yes, and fans of classic television will appreciate this one. Vindu Dara Singh also features in Welcome To The Jungle. He is the son of wrestling legend and actor Dara Singh, who made a memorable guest appearance as Hanuman in BR Chopra's Mahabharat. Before that, Dara Singh had already achieved iconic status by playing Hanuman in Ramanand Sagar's Ramayan, making this another nostalgic link for audiences. Who else stars in Welcome To The Jungle? The film boasts one of the largest ensemble casts in recent Hindi cinema. Alongside Akshay Kumar, the movie features: Suniel Shetty, Disha Patani, Jacqueline Fernandez, Arshad Warsi, Jackie Shroff, Paresh Rawal, Raveena Tandon, Lara Dutta, Farida Jalal, Johnny Lever, Shreyas Talpade, Tusshar Kapoor, Rajpal Yadav, Krushna Abhishek, Kiku Sharda and Daler Mehndi. Aftab Shivdasani, Mukesh Tiwari, Yashpal Sharma, Kiran Kumar, Zakir Hussain, Urvashi Rautela, Hemant Pandey, Brijendra Kala, Jeetu Verma, Vrihi Kodvara, Aditya Singh, Bhagya Bhanushali and Vindu Dara Singh also feature in the comedy. Why is this reunion striking a chord with audiences? Hindi cinema often celebrates nostalgia, but Welcome To The Jungle manages to do it in an unexpected way. Instead of simply assembling a star-studded cast, the film quietly reunites actors who once brought the pages of the Mahabharat to life for millions of Indians. For older viewers, spotting Arjun, Karna, Duryodhana and Vichitravirya together on the big screen is a reminder of an era when mythological dramas united families every weekend. For younger audiences, it offers an opportunity to discover the remarkable legacy these actors created long before the age of streaming platforms. Adding to the emotion is the fact that the film preserves Pankaj Dheer's final performance on screen, making Welcome To The Jungle more than just a comedy. It has unexpectedly become a heartfelt tribute to one of Indian television's most memorable stars.

title: NIA chargesheets three more in Red Fort blast case, total accused reaches 13
description:
New Delhi , June 27 : The National Investigation Agency (NIA) has filed a supplementary chargesheet against three more persons in the November 2025 Red Fort blast case, including an absconding doctor who has been identified as one of the alleged masterminds of the attack that killed 11 people.
The supplementary chargesheet, filed before the NIA Special Court at Patiala House Courts, names Zameer Ahmad Ahanger, Tufail Ahmad Bhat and Muzafar Ahmad alias Faraz alias Zafar, all residents of Jammu and Kashmir. With this, the total number of accused chargesheeted in the case has increased to 13, including the deceased main accused, Dr Umer Un Nabi.
According to the NIA, absconding accused Muzafar Ahmad is a paediatrician by profession and the elder brother of co-accused Dr Adeel Ahmed Rather. The agency has described him as a founding member of AGuH Interim, which it claims is an offshoot of Al-Qaeda.
The investigation has found that Muzafar was among the main conspirators behind the November 10, 2025, vehicle-borne improvised explosive device (VBIED) blast. The NIA alleged that he planned the attack along with Dr Umer Un Nabi, Muzammil, Dr Adeel Ahmed Rather and Mufti Irfan.
The agency further claimed that Muzafar attended a secret meeting held at Eidgah in Srinagar in June 2022, where the AGuH Interim module was formed. It also alleged that he helped manufacture, test and store TATP-based improvised explosive devices at a secret facility allegedly operated from Al-Falah University in Faridabad.
A non-bailable warrant has been issued against Muzafar, who remains absconding, and efforts are continuing to trace and arrest him.
The NIA has also alleged that Zameer Ahmad Ahanger worked as an Overground Worker (OGW) for the terror module. According to the agency, he remained in contact with handlers and acted as a courier for arms, ammunition and cash.
Tufail Ahmad Bhat, a former Overground Worker of the banned Lashkar-e-Taiba (LeT), allegedly supplied weapons to the group. The agency claimed that he arranged an AK-47 rifle, a Krinkov rifle, a pistol, magazines and live ammunition through dead drops and delivered them to Dr Umer Un Nabi for Rs 3 lakh.
Zameer and Tufail have been charged under various provisions of the Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act and the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS). In addition to these offences, Muzafar has also been charged under the Explosive Substances Act and the Prevention of Damage to Public Property (PDPP) Act.
The NIA said the investigation has linked the accused through forensic examination, geo-location mapping of conspiracy sites and analysis of financial transactions. The investigation into the case is still underway. (ANI

title: Apple and Audi alumni have made a luxe EV based on the moon buggy
description: The Amble One is a street-legal $25,000 electric buggy designed for luxury resorts.
content:
It seems to be the week for cheap EVs. Right after the production model of the Slate electric truck was revealed, complete with a bump in range, a new European entrant in electric mobility is launching out of stealth mode today and plans to bring its own affordable yet stylish rides to market.
Amble's founders worked at Audi and Ford, started Cowboy ebikes, and cofounded Forpeople, the creative agency that works for, among others, Nio EVs, Arc’teryx, and Herman Miller. Indeed, Amble's design lead, Julian Hoenig, worked on the infamously canceled Apple car, which goes some way to explaining how this, the $25,000 Amble One, looks like it could have driven straight out of Cupertino, despite hailing from Lisbon, Portugal.
The Amble One is a street-legal, stripped-down electric buggy designed for the kind of places where a normal car feels out of place. Coastal paths, private estates, and those dusty tracks between luxury hotel villas and the sea. Think of it as if Apple decided it was going to design a golf cart, then took the project even further.Read full article

title: CrudeOil: ଭାରତକୁ ଏକ ବ୍ୟାରେଲ ଅଶୋଧିତ ତୈଳ ବିକ୍ରି କରି କେତେ ଲାଭ ପାଏ ଇରାନ, ଜାଣିଛନ୍ତି କି?
description:
ନୂଆଦିଲ୍ଲୀ: ଇରାନ ଏବଂ ଆମେରିକା ମଧ୍ୟରେ ସଂଘର୍ଷ ଏବେ ଶେଷ ହୋଇଛି | ଏହି ସଂଘର୍ଷ ଯାହା ମାସ ମାସ ଧରି ବିଶ୍ୱ ଶକ୍ତି ବଜାରକୁ ବାଧାପ୍ରାପ୍ତ କରିଥିଲା। ଉତ୍ତେଜନା ସମୟରେ, ହର୍ମୁଜ୍ ପ୍ରଣାଳୀ ସମ୍ପର୍କରେ ଚିନ୍ତା ଏବଂ ଅଶୋଧିତ ତୈଳ ପରିବହନ ଉପରେ କଟକଣା ଭାରତ ସମେତ ପ୍ରମୁଖ ତୈଳ ଆମଦାନୀକାରୀ ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରଗୁଡ଼ିକ ପାଇଁ ଅନିଶ୍ଚିତତା ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରିଥିଲା। ପରିସ୍ଥିତି ଏବେ ସ୍ଥିର ହେବା ସହିତ, ପୁଣି ଥରେ ଇରାନ ତୈଳ ରପ୍ତାନିର ଅର୍ଥନୀତିକୁ ନେଇ ଚର୍ଚ୍ଚା ଜୋର ଧରିଛି । ଆସନ୍ତୁ ଆଜି ଆମେ ଆପଣଙ୍କୁ କହିବୁ ଯେ ଭାରତ ଭଳି ଦେଶଗୁଡ଼ିକୁ ବିକ୍ରି ହେଉଥିବା ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ବ୍ୟାରେଲରୁ ଇରାନ କେତେ ଲାଭ ପାଏ। ରିପୋର୍ଟ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଉତ୍ପାଦନ ଏବଂ ପରିବହନ ଖର୍ଚ୍ଚ ହିସାବ କରିବା ପରେ, ଇରାନ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ବଜାରରେ ବିକ୍ରି ହେଉଥିବା ପ୍ରତି ବ୍ୟାରେଲ ଅଶୋଧିତ ତୈଳ ଉପରେ ପ୍ରାୟ ୫୦ ଡଲାରରୁ ୭୦ ଡଲାରର ଲାଭ ପାଏ। ଇରାନର ଦୃଢ଼ ରୋଜଗାରର ମୁଖ୍ୟ କାରଣ ହେଉଛି ଏହାର କମ୍ ଉତ୍ପାଦନ ଖର୍ଚ୍ଚ | ଦେଶରେ ବିପୁଳ ତୈଳ ଭଣ୍ଡାର ରହିଛି ଯାହା ସହଜରେ ପହଞ୍ଚିବା ସମ୍ଭବ।
ଏହା ଅନେକ ଅନ୍ୟ ତୈଳ ଉତ୍ପାଦନକାରୀ ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ର ତୁଳନାରେ ଯଥେଷ୍ଟ କମ୍ ମୂଲ୍ୟରେ ଅଶୋଧିତ ତୈଳ ନିଷ୍କାସନ କରିଥାଏ। ରିପୋର୍ଟଗୁଡ଼ିକ ସୂଚିତ କରେ ଯେ ଇରାନରେ ଏକ ବ୍ୟାରେଲ ତୈଳ ଉତ୍ପାଦନର ହାରାହାରି ଖର୍ଚ୍ଚ ୧୦ ଡଲାରରୁ ୨୦ ଡଲାର ମଧ୍ୟରେ ହୋଇଥାଏ। ଏକ ମାନକ ବ୍ୟାରେଲରେ ୧୫୯ ଲିଟର ଅଶୋଧିତ ତୈଳ ଥାଏ। ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନର ଅନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ବଜାରରେ, ଅଶୋଧିତ ତୈଳ ମୂଲ୍ୟ ସାଧାରଣତଃ ପ୍ରତି ବ୍ୟାରେଲ ୬୯ ଡଲାରରୁ ୭୫ ଡଲାର ମଧ୍ୟରେ ରହିଛି | ଯଦି ଇରାନ ପ୍ରାୟ ଏକ ବ୍ୟାରେଲ ପାଇଁ ୧୫ ଡଲାର ଖର୍ଚ୍ଚ କରେ ଏବଂ ଏହାକୁ ପ୍ରାୟ ୭୦ ଡଲାରରେ ବିକ୍ରୟ କରେ, ତେବେ ଫଳସ୍ୱରୂପ ପାର୍ଥକ୍ୟ ଏକ ଯଥେଷ୍ଟ ମାର୍ଜିନ୍ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରେ। ଉତ୍ପାଦନ ଏବଂ ପରିବହନ ଖର୍ଚ୍ଚକୁ ହ୍ରାସ କରିବା ପରେ, ଇରାନର ଲାଭ ସାଧାରଣତଃ ପ୍ରତି ବ୍ୟାରେଲ ପିଛା ୫୦ ରୁ ୭୦ ଡଲାର ମଧ୍ୟରେ ରହିଥାଏ।
ଆହୁରି ପଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ: Suniel Shetty: 'ମୋଦୀଙ୍କ ନାମରେ ଦିନ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରୁଛି ୧୫ ମାସର ନାତୁଣୀ; ସୁନୀଲ ସେଟ୍ଟୀ
ଅନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ପ୍ରତିବନ୍ଧକ ସମୟରେ, ଇରାନ କ୍ରେତାମାନଙ୍କୁ ଆକର୍ଷିତ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରାୟତଃ ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ରିହାତି ପ୍ରଦାନ କରୁଥିଲା। ଭାରତ ଏବଂ ଚୀନ ଭଳି ଦେଶଗୁଡ଼ିକ ପ୍ରଚଳିତ ବଜାର ହାରଠାରୁ କମ୍ ମୂଲ୍ୟରେ ଇରାନୀ ଅଶୋଧିତ ତୈଳ କ୍ରୟ କରିପାରିଥିବା ଜଣାପଡ଼ିଛି। ଏହି ରିହାତି କେତେକ ସମୟରେ ପ୍ରତି ବ୍ୟାରେଲ ୫ ଡଲାରରୁ ୧୦ ଡଲାର ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ପହଞ୍ଚିଥିଲା।

title: The 30-year fixed mortgage was supposed to be predictable. Two costs quietly broke that promise
description: A new survey shows 40% of homeowners said they’ve considered moving because their property taxes have gotten so high.
content:
Potential homebuyers tend to agonize over two things: mortgage rates and home prices. But that’s not where the burden of homeownership ends. It’s really just the beginning.



Buyers will lock in a rate, sign at closing, and assume the hard part of buying a house is over, but many things can go wrong, and there are many hidden homeownership costs that not everyone stops to consider. 



For example, a recent survey of 2,500 U.S. homeowners from Ownwell, a property tax appeal service, found 76% say their property taxes in recent years have run higher than they budgeted for—up 10 percentage points from just a year earlier. Nearly two-thirds said they were surprised or shocked by their most recent tax bill, and 9 in 10 said they’re concerned about the long-term financial hit of rising property taxes. And even more startling is 40% said they had considered moving specifically because of them.



“Taxes have quietly joined insurance as one of the biggest affordability shocks after closing, especially in states with high property taxes like New York, Massachusetts, and Texas,” Ownwell CEO Colton Pace told Fortune. 



These new stats point to an affordability problem the usual housing conversation misses. While it’s more accessible (albeit sometimes painful) to monitor mortgage rates and home prices, recurring expenses like taxes, insurance, maintenance, and other line items that nobody mentions at the closing table are quietly reshaping what it actually costs to keep a home.



“The fixed-rate mortgage was supposed to be the one predictable cost in your life,” Pace said. “Rising insurance and property taxes have quietly broken that promise.”



The unpredictability of homeownership



A 30-year fixed mortgage is the rare household bill that doesn’t change month-over-month or year-over-year—but the taxes and insurance bundled into the monthly payment do. Every year, taxes and insurance can change a county-by-county schedule or at renewal, respectively. 



“Homeowners aren’t tracking two separate bills,” Pace said. “They’re waiting for an escrow letter or a county notice of value to tell them their payment just changed.”



The math behind those notices has gotten harder to predict. The average sales price of new homes rose roughly 23% on average over the past five years, according to Federal Reserve data, and tax assessments followed. Property taxes reset annually and hinge on factors—local housing markets, county and city budgets, and the tax rates that flow from them—that even economists struggle to forecast, Pace said. That means homeowners can get hit with an unexpected amount.



What agents tell buyers they’re missing



Real estate agents see the same blind spots in their clients.



“Buyers seem to be more focused on the mortgage rate and the price of the home, and forget about the other expenses that could be more a month than their mortgage,” Kori Sassower, principal agent of The Kori Sassower Team at Compass, told Fortune. Sassower is dually licensed in New York and Connecticut. 



Taxes are the biggest of those variables, she said, and they can vary greatly from one town, village, or city to the next. But the cost that catches buyers off guard most is maintenance, which can include seasonal HVAC servicing, pest control, tree trimming, power washing, gutter cleaning, and stone repointing. Property taxes, in her experience, are “the number 1 driver that makes people sell their homes.”



For condo buyers, monthly association fees are another expense that can increase over time, Miltiadis Kastanis, a Miami-based real estate agent with Compass, told Fortune.



“Good advisors prepare buyers for these costs upfront, but there’s always a learning curve once someone becomes a homeowner because the true cost of ownership extends well beyond the monthly mortgage payment,” Kastanis said.



The hidden costs of homeownership



The hidden costs of owning a single-family home—property taxes, insurance, utilities, internet, and maintenance—now cost more than $21,000 per year nationally, according to Bankrate’s 2025 study. Maintenance alone accounts for $8,808 of that, the single largest piece. 



The most common regret among homeowners who had one was that upkeep and other hidden costs ran more expensive than they’d expected, according to the Bankrate survey. 



And while Michelle Griffith, a New York City-based real estate agent with Douglas Elliman, said NYC buyers are generally more aware of property taxes and other monthly costs, what tends to surprise them more are less obvious expenses like assessments, maintenance fees, furnishings, and the costs of maintaining a larger residence.



“Buyers relocating from rentals also underestimate how quickly everyday ownership expenses add up, particularly in luxury buildings where the expectation is to maintain a certain standard of living,” she told Fortune. 



Insurance comes with its own separate shock. The average annual home insurance premium jumped 12% in 2025 and is on track to rise another 4%, to about $3,057, by the end of 2026, according to Insurify. Premiums have climbed 46% since 2021—roughly three times the pace of inflation. The pain is concentrated in disaster-exposed states: Florida’s typical premium is approaching $8,500, and California is expected to see the steepest increases in 2026 following the Los Angeles wildfires.



So for a generation that already waited longer and saved harder to buy a home, the down payment and the rate get a buyer through the door. Everything after closing determines whether they can afford to stay.



“Recurring expenses may not make a home unaffordable on paper, but they can meaningfully impact a homeowner’s monthly budget and lifestyle,” Kastanis said.




This story was originally featured on Fortune.com

title: Highest senior citizen FD rates up to 8.05%
जिस बलूच एक्टिविस्ट को पाकिस्तान में मिली उम्र कैद की सजा, वो नोबेल शांति पुरस्कार के लिए नॉमिनेट
description: क्वेटा, हाल ही में पाकिस्तानी अदालत ने बलूच एक्टिविस्ट महरंग बलोच को उम्र कैद की सजा सुनाई। पूरी दुनिया में इस ज्यादती के खिलाफ आवाज बुलंद की जा रही है। इस कार्यकर्ता को दूसरी बार प्रतिष्ठित नोबेल शांति पुरस्कार के लिए नॉमिनेट किया गया है।
content:
क्वेटा, हाल ही में पाकिस्तानी अदालत ने बलूच एक्टिविस्ट महरंग बलोच को उम्र कैद की सजा सुनाई। पूरी दुनिया में इस ज्यादती के खिलाफ आवाज बुलंद की जा रही है। इस कार्यकर्ता को दूसरी बार प्रतिष्ठित नोबेल शांति पुरस्कार के लिए नॉमिनेट किया गया है।  
मानवाधिकार संगठन बलूच यकजेहती कमेटी (बीवाईसी) ने इसकी घोषणा की। 
यह घोषणा शुक्रवार देर रात ऐसे समय में की गई, जब कुछ ही दिन पहले पाकिस्तान की एक आतंकवाद निरोधी अदालत ने फ्रंटियर कॉर्प्स के एक अधिकारी की हत्या से जुड़े मामले में महरंग बलोच सहित चार कार्यकर्ताओं को आजीवन कारावास की सजा सुनाई थी। इस फैसले की अंतरराष्ट्रीय स्तर पर व्यापक आलोचना हुई थी। 
बीवाईसी ने एक बयान में कहा, "यह नामांकन जनवरी 2026 में हुआ था, लेकिन संगठन की नीति के तहत इसे उस समय सार्वजनिक नहीं किया गया। आज इस तथ्य को सार्वजनिक करना इसलिए आवश्यक है, क्योंकि जिस व्यक्ति को पाकिस्तान सरकार ने आतंकवाद के झूठे और निराधार आरोपों के जरिए दंडित करने की कोशिश की, उसी व्यक्ति को दुनिया अब शांति, न्याय और मानवाधिकारों के संघर्ष के प्रतीक के रूप में पहचान रही है।" 
संगठन ने कहा कि महरंग बलोच का दूसरी बार नोबेल शांति पुरस्कार के लिए नामित होना इस बात का प्रमाण है कि बीवाईसी का संघर्ष पूरी तरह शांतिपूर्ण, लोकतांत्रिक और मानवाधिकारों के सिद्धांतों पर आधारित है। वहीं, संगठन के नेताओं के खिलाफ राज्य की कार्रवाई राजनीतिक प्रतिशोध और दमन को दर्शाती है। 
बीवाईसी ने आरोप लगाया कि बलूचिस्तान में जबरन गुमशुदगी, न्यायेतर हत्याओं और सैन्य अभियानों के खिलाफ आवाज उठाने वाले कई बलूच नेताओं के खिलाफ मनगढ़ंत एफआईआर, बेबुनियाद आरोप और अपारदर्शी न्यायिक प्रक्रिया के तहत मुकदमे चलाए जा रहे हैं। 
संगठन का दावा है कि महरंग बलोच और अन्य नेताओं की गिरफ्तारी के बाद बलूचिस्तान में जबरन गुमशुदगी, न्यायेतर हत्याओं और सैन्य अभियानों में और तेजी आई है, जिसका असर आम बलूच नागरिकों के जीवन पर पड़ रहा है। 
बीवाईसी ने अंतरराष्ट्रीय समुदाय, मानवाधिकार संगठनों और लोकतांत्रिक ताकतों से बलूचिस्तान की स्थिति पर प्रभावी आवाज उठाने तथा महरंग बलोच सहित अन्य बलूच नेताओं के मौलिक अधिकारों की रक्षा के लिए सक्रिय भूमिका निभाने की अपील की। 
वहीं, एक अन्य मानवाधिकार संगठन बलूच वॉयस फॉर जस्टिस (बीवीजे) ने कहा कि महरंग बलोच का दूसरी बार नोबेल शांति पुरस्कार के लिए नामित होना अत्यंत महत्वपूर्ण है। 
बीवीजे ने कहा, "जब पाकिस्तान सरकार राजनीतिक रूप से प्रेरित मुकदमों के जरिए उन्हें आजीवन कारावास की सजा दे रही है, तब अंतरराष्ट्रीय समुदाय उनके मानवाधिकारों और न्याय के प्रति शांतिपूर्ण समर्पण को मान्यता दे रहा है।" 
संगठन ने कहा कि यह नामांकन बलूचिस्तान की मानवाधिकार स्थिति पर अंतरराष्ट्रीय स्तर पर और अधिक सक्रिय हस्तक्षेप को प्रोत्साहित करना चाहिए। साथ ही मानवाधिकार रक्षकों की सुरक्षा, शांतिपूर्ण गतिविधियों के कारण जेल में बंद लोगों की रिहाई और दंडमुक्ति की संस्कृति को समाप्त करने के लिए ठोस कदम उठाए जाने चाहिए।

title: My 85-year-old Jeep is perfect for driving to the shops
description:
Ready for action: Simple and reliable Jeep is easy to work on and appreciate

"We always get the first car parking space at Asda!" jokes Ian Watson about his Willys Jeep, which he has owned for 10 years.
"With the machine gun mounts - I have a couple of 30-calibre guns at home that fit them - it looks pretty serious." I hope he removes the - fake? - hand grenade attached to the dashboard when he and wife Viv pop into the supermarket.
Ian's Jeep is an early example - a 1941 'Slat Grille' (when Ford also began producing jeeps for the war effort, it swapped the grille for a simpler piece of pressed steel to speed up production).

"It was shipped out to the South Pacific just two days after Pearl Harbour," says Ian. "After the war, the Americans abandoned much of their equipment, and this Jeep remained in the Philippines. Eventually, it was run into the ground, but a museum in Manila, recognising its value as an early model, bought and restored it. When the museum closed, all the exhibits were sold off on eBay, which is how I came to buy it. It was more or less in its current condition and cost me £17,000, but today an early 'slat grille' Jeep goes for around £34,000, so I haven't done badly."
Ian's Jeep is powered by the Willys 'Go Devil' engine that most Jeeps used. It's a 2.2-litre inline four-cylinder flathead, or sidevalve, motor. "It leaks oil like a sieve, and because it was used in a hot country, it has a second radiator to keep it cool," he says.

"It makes only around 60hp but just a little more than 100lb ft at 2000rpm, so it pulls well from idle. In fact, it feels a bit like a tractor! It's certainly as slow as one, with 45mph the fastest I've had out of it. Not that I'd want to go much faster. The brakes are hydraulic but aren't very good. It has cart springs at the back, too, so you do get thrown about. You have to hang on; I'm conscious I might fall out, so we've fitted door straps. Soldiers back in the war were a lot smaller and could cling on more easily than a big fella like me."
Ian's Jeep has a three-speed manual gearbox and, being permanent four-wheel drive, a transfer box with high and low ranges. The handbrake works on the driveshaft and, says Ian, holds the vehicle securely. He adds: "A Jeep is a reasonably simple thing. I can do most jobs on it, but those I can't I farm out to a Jeep specialist in Milford, near Godalming. Spare parts are easy to come by. Because so many Jeeps were made, it's possible to get almost any bit that you need. It might be original too, although there are many new parts now coming out of India."

Ian and Viv do around 500 miles a year in their Jeep. "Because it's quite slow, it can be frustrating for those drivers following us, but people do love to see it about. When we first bought it, a lot of veterans would come up and reminisce, but they've passed on now. I keep it in my garage, one half of which has military memorabilia associated with it. The other side, where I park my 1968 Mini Moke, has 1960s memorabilia."

title: 2 killed, 4 injured as vehicle falls into gorge in J-K's Doda
description:
Jammu, Jun 27: Two elderly persons were killed and four were injured after their vehicle veered off the road and plunged into a deep gorge in Doda district on Saturday, officials said.
The incident took place near Basti village in Bhaderwah when the driver lost control of the vehicle at a blind curve, they said.
The six rescued were identified as Imam Din, 65, Zaytoon Bibi, 60, Bashir Mohammad, 50, Masoom Bi, 45, Badar Din, 38, and 12-year-old Yaseen.
Zaytoon was declared dead, while Imam died during treatment, the officials said.

title: ରାଶିଫଳ: ରବିବାର, ଜୁନ୍ ୨୮ ତାରିଖ – Daily Horoscope
description:
ମେଷ ଅନୁକୂଳ ଗ୍ରହ ସମ୍ପର୍କରୁ ଶାରୀରିକ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ ଓ ପାରିବାରିକ ସ୍ଥିତିରେ ଆଂଶିକ ଉନ୍ନତି ଦେଖାଦେବ। ଅର୍ଥ ସମ୍ଭନ୍ଧୀୟ କୈାଣସି କଥା ବନ୍ଧୁଙ୍କ ନିକଟରୁ ଶୁଣିବାକୁ ପାଇ ଉଲ୍ଲସିତ ହୋଇପାରନ୍ତି। ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ଦିଗକୁ ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟରଖି ଗୋପନୀୟ ଆଲୋଚନା ସମସ୍ୟାରେ ଛନ୍ଦି ହୋଇଯିବେ। ସତର୍କତାର ସହ କାମ ନ କଲେ ଫସିଯିବେ। ବୃଷ ତିନୋଟି ଗ୍ରହ ଭାଗ୍ୟସ୍ଥାନକୁ ଦେଖୁଥିବାରୁ ଏକାଧାରରେ ଅର୍ଥଲାଭ ସାଙ୍ଗକୁ ସନ୍ତାନମାନଙ୍କ ଗୈାରବରେ ଗୈାରବାନ୍ବିତ ହୋଇପାରନ୍ତି। କୈାଣସି ପଡୋଶିନୀ କିମ୍ବା ସହକର୍ମୀଙ୍କ ସହ ମତାନ୍ତରଜନିତ ସମସ୍ୟା […]
The post ରାଶିଫଳ: ରବିବାର, ଜୁନ୍ ୨୮ ତାରିଖ – Daily Horoscope appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ମେଷ

ଅନୁକୂଳ ଗ୍ରହ ସମ୍ପର୍କରୁ ଶାରୀରିକ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ ଓ ପାରିବାରିକ ସ୍ଥିତିରେ ଆଂଶିକ ଉନ୍ନତି ଦେଖାଦେବ। ଅର୍ଥ ସମ୍ଭନ୍ଧୀୟ କୈାଣସି କଥା ବନ୍ଧୁଙ୍କ ନିକଟରୁ ଶୁଣିବାକୁ ପାଇ ଉଲ୍ଲସିତ ହୋଇପାରନ୍ତି। ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ଦିଗକୁ ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟରଖି ଗୋପନୀୟ ଆଲୋଚନା ସମସ୍ୟାରେ ଛନ୍ଦି ହୋଇଯିବେ। ସତର୍କତାର ସହ କାମ ନ କଲେ ଫସିଯିବେ।


ବୃଷ

ତିନୋଟି ଗ୍ରହ ଭାଗ୍ୟସ୍ଥାନକୁ ଦେଖୁଥିବାରୁ ଏକାଧାରରେ ଅର୍ଥଲାଭ ସାଙ୍ଗକୁ ସନ୍ତାନମାନଙ୍କ ଗୈାରବରେ ଗୈାରବାନ୍ବିତ ହୋଇପାରନ୍ତି। କୈାଣସି ପଡୋଶିନୀ କିମ୍ବା ସହକର୍ମୀଙ୍କ ସହ ମତାନ୍ତରଜନିତ ସମସ୍ୟା ବୃଦ୍ଧିର ସମ୍ଭାବନା ରହିଛି। ସାମାଜିକ ସ୍ତରରେ ସାହିତ୍ୟ, କଳା, ବୈଷୟିକ କ୍ଷେତ୍ରରୁ ପ୍ରଶଂସିତ ହେବାର ଆଶା ରହିଛି।


ମିଥୁନ

କର୍ମଭାବକୁ ବୃହସ୍ପତିଙ୍କ ଶୁଭ ଦୃଷ୍ଟିରୁ କାମ ସହଜ ଓ ସୁବିଧାରେ ସମ୍ପନ୍ନ କରିବାର ମାର୍ଗ ଉନ୍ମୁକ୍ତ କରିବ। ଆକସ୍ମିକ ଭାବରେ ଅନ୍ୟଦ୍ୱାରା ପ୍ରେରିତ ହୋଇ ଦୂରସ୍ଥାନକୁ ଯାତ୍ରା କରିବାକୁ ପଡିପାରେ। ଚତୁର୍ଥସ୍ଥାନରେ କେତୁଙ୍କ ସ୍ଥିତିଜନିତ ପାରିବାରିକ କ୍ଷେତ୍ରରେ ଅଶାନ୍ତ ପରିସ୍ଥିତି ସୃଷ୍ଟି ହୋଇପାରେ।


କର୍କଟ

ବୃହସ୍ପତି ଓ ଶୁକ୍ରଙ୍କ ସହ ବୁଧ ସଂଯୋଗରୁ ଉଦାରତା ଓ ସହନଶୀଳତା ଗୁଣରୁ ସମସ୍ତଙ୍କର ଆଦରଣୀୟ ହୋଇ ପ୍ରଶଂସିତ ହେବେ। ତଥାପି ପାରିବାରିକ କ୍ଷେତ୍ରରେ ସାମୟିକ ଭାବପ୍ରବଣତା କିମ୍ବା ଅନ୍ୟମନସ୍କତା କାରଣରୁ କେତେକ ଭୁଲ କରିପାରନ୍ତି। କରଜଦାତାଙ୍କ ଚାପ ବୃଦ୍ଧି ପାଇବା କାରଣରୁ ସାମୟିକ ଦୁଶ୍ଚିନ୍ତା ବୃଦ୍ଧି ପାଇବାର ଆଶଙ୍କା ରହିଛି ।


ସି˚ହ

ମଙ୍ଗଳ ଭାଗ୍ୟସ୍ଥାନରେ ଥିବାରୁ ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ କାମକୁ ଦକ୍ଷତାର ସହ ସମ୍ପାଦନ କରିବାରେ ପ୍ରେରଣା ଯୋଗାଇବ। ଆବଶ୍ୟକତା ପୂରଣ ସକାଶେ କରଜ କରିପାରନ୍ତି। ଅସୁବିଧାଜନକ ସ୍ଥିତିରେ ଗୁରୁଜନଙ୍କ ସାନ୍ତ୍ବନାବାଣୀ ମନରେ ଆଶ୍ୱସ୍ତି ଆଣିବାର ସୂଚନା ରହିଛି। ସାମାଜିକ ସ୍ତରରେ ଗଠନମୂଳକ ପ୍ରସ୍ତାବ ଦେଇ ପ୍ରଶଂସିତ ହେବେ।


କନ୍ୟା

ଶନି ଦୃଷ୍ଟ ଚନ୍ଦ୍ରଜନିତ ମନ ଭିତରର ଅକୁହା କଥାକୁ ପ୍ରକାଶ ନ କରି ଅନ୍ୟମାନଙ୍କ କାମରେ ନିଜକୁ ମଜ୍ଜାଇ ରଖିପାରନ୍ତି। ପରିବାରର ଛୋଟ ଘଟଣା ପ୍ରତି ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱ ଦେଲେ ଅଶାନ୍ତି ସୃଷ୍ଟି ହେବ । ଅନ୍ୟମାନଙ୍କୁ ଖୁସିରେ ରଖିବାକୁ ଚେଷ୍ଟାକରି ପ୍ରଶଂସିତ ହେବେ। ପ୍ଲଟିଙ୍ଗ୍‌ କାରବାରର ଝମେଲା ସାଙ୍ଗକୁ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟସମସ୍ୟା ଅଶାନ୍ତିକୁ ବୃଦ୍ଧି କରିବ।


ତୁଳା

ଆଜି କାର୍ଯ୍ୟବ୍ୟସ୍ତତା ଓ ମାନସିକ ଚାପ ବୃଦ୍ଧି ପାଇବାରୁ ମନ ଅଶାନ୍ତ ରହିବ। କର୍ମଭାବସ୍ଥ ଶୁଭଗ୍ରହଜନିତ ଅଟକି ରହିଥିବା ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ସମସ୍ୟାର ସମାଧାନ ହୋଇଯିବ। ସୁଯୋଗ ଆପଣା ଛାଏଁ ପାଖରେ ଆସି ଜୁଟିବ ଓ ଆଶା ନିଶ୍ଚିତ ପୂରଣ ହୋଇଯିବ। ନିଜ ଲୋକମାନଙ୍କ ଅନାଦର ଭାବ ମନକୁ ସାମୟିକ ବ୍ୟଥିତ କରିପାରେ।


ବିଛା

ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ କ୍ଷେତ୍ରରେ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଦ୍ୱନ୍ଦ୍ୱ ଲାଗି ରହିବାରୁ ଠିକ୍‌ ନିଷ୍ପତ୍ତି ନେବା ସହଜସାଧ୍ୟ ହେବନାହିଁ। ଅସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ କାମକୁ ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣାଙ୍ଗ କରିବେ। ଅର୍ଥନୈତିକ, ପ୍ରଶାସନିକ, ସାମାଜିକ ଓ ରାଜନୈତିକ ସ୍ଥିତି ମଧ୍ୟମ ପ୍ରକାର ରହିବ। ଚନ୍ଦ୍ର ଏବଂ ଭାଗ୍ୟସ୍ଥ ଗ୍ରହ ପ୍ରଭାବରୁ ସାହିତ୍ୟ, ସାମ୍ବାଦିକତା ଏବଂ ବାଣିଜ୍ୟ କ୍ଷେତ୍ରରେ ପ୍ରତିବନ୍ଧକ ଦୂରେଇଯିବ।


ଧନୁ

ପାରିବାରିକ ସମସ୍ୟା ସମାଧାନର ରାସ୍ତା ଖୋଜି ପାଇବେ। ସହକର୍ମୀଙ୍କ ପରୋକ୍ଷ ଶତ୍ରୁତା କାରଣରୁ ଅଫିସ୍‌ରେ ଭୁଲ୍‌ ବୁଝାମଣା ହେତୁ ସମସ୍ୟା ବଢିପାରେ। କାମ ହାସଲ ସକାଶେ ବନ୍ଧୁଙ୍କ ପ୍ରତିଶ୍ରୁତି ଉପରେ ଭରସା କରିପାରିବେ ନାହିଁ। ଚନ୍ଦ୍ର ଏବଂ ବୃହସ୍ପତିଙ୍କ କ୍ଷେତ୍ର ବିନିମୟ ହେତୁ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ ସମସ୍ୟା ମନକୁ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳିତ କରିପାରେ।


ମକର

ଗୁରୁକ୍ଷେତ୍ରସ୍ଥ ତୃତୀୟ ଶନିଙ୍କ ସ୍ଥିତିଜନିତ ଅଧିକାଂଶ ସମୟ ବନ୍ଧୁଙ୍କ ମେଳରେ ରହିବାର ସୁଯୋଗ ପାଇବେ। ପିଲାଙ୍କ ସହ ଖୁସିଗପ କରିବାର ମଉକା ଜୁଟିବ। ପ୍ରକାଶନ, ସଂଗଠନ, ରାଜନୀତି, ପ୍ରତିଦ୍ୱନ୍ଦ୍ୱିତା ତଥା ପ୍ରଶାସନିକ କ୍ଷେତ୍ରରେ ଦ୍ୱନ୍ଦ୍ୱ ଦୂର ହେବ। ବ୍ୟବସାୟିକ ସଫଳତା ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ସନ୍ତୋଷଜନକ ହେବନାହିଁ।


କୁମ୍ଭ

ପରିବାର ସଦସ୍ୟଙ୍କ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ମନକୁ ନ ପାଇଲେ ମଧ୍ୟ କିଛି କରିବାର ଉପାୟ ପାଇବେ ନାହିଁ। ଅସୁବିଧା ନ ହେଲେ ମଧ୍ୟ କେତେକ କାମ ଅଧାରେ ଅଟକି ଯିବା କାରଣରୁ ମାନସିକ ସ୍ତରରେ ଅଶାନ୍ତି ଅନୁଭବ କରିବେ। କର୍ମାଧିପ ନିଜ ଭାବକୁ ଅବଲୋକନ କରୁଥିବାରୁ ଆଜି ଆପଣଙ୍କର କୈାଣସି କାମ ଅଟକି ରହିବନାହିଁ।


ମୀନ

ସମସ୍ୟା ରହିଥିଲେ ମଧ୍ୟ ଦଶମଭାବସ୍ଥ ଚନ୍ଦ୍ର ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ପରିସ୍ଥିତିକୁ ନିୟନ୍ତ୍ରଣ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ରଖିବାରେ ସମର୍ଥ ହେବେ। ପରିବାରର ଖର୍ଚ୍ଚ ପରିମାଣ କ୍ରମଶଃ ବଢିବା କାରଣରୁ ବ୍ୟସ୍ତତା ବୃଦ୍ଧି ପାଇବ। କର୍ମକ୍ଷେତ୍ରରେ ଅନ୍ୟମନସ୍କତା କାରଣରୁ କେତେକ ଭୁଲ୍‌ କରିପାରନ୍ତି। ଶୁକ୍ରଙ୍କ ସୁପ୍ରଭାବରୁ ସାହିତ୍ୟ, ସଙ୍ଗୀତ କ୍ଷେତ୍ରରେ ଆଦୃତ ହେବେ।

title: भूकंप के बाद पनामा ने वेनेजुएला में भेजी मानवीय सहायता
description: पनामा सिटी, लगातार दो बार तेज भूकंप आने के बाद भारी तबाही से निपटने में पनामा ने वेनेजुएला की बड़ी मदद की है।
content:
पनामा सिटी, लगातार दो बार तेज भूकंप आने के बाद भारी तबाही से निपटने में पनामा ने वेनेजुएला की बड़ी मदद की है। राष्ट्रपति जोस राउल मुलिनो की ओर से साझा जानकारी के अनुसार, पनामा ने वेनेजुएला के लिए 18 टन मानवीय सहायता ले जाने वाली पहली उड़ान पूरी कर ली है। पनामा दक्षिण अमेरिकी देश में एक विशेष खोज और बचाव दल भेजने की भी तैयारी कर रहा है। 
मुलिनो ने शुक्रवार (स्थानीय समय) को सोशल मीडिया प्लेटफॉर्म एक्स पर एक पोस्ट में कहा, "पनामा की एकजुटता की वजह से, डोनेशन इकट्ठा किया जा रहा है और 18 टन मदद के साथ पहली उड़ान पूरी हो गई है।" 
न्यूज एजेंसी सिन्हुआ के अनुसार, मांगी गई सप्लाई में खराब न होने वाला खाना, बोतलबंद पानी, पर्सनल हाइजीन का सामान, बेसिक मेडिकल सप्लाई, टॉर्च, बैटरी और प्रभावित परिवारों के लिए दूसरी इमरजेंसी सप्लाई शामिल हैं। 
इसके अलावा, पनामा नेशनल सिविल प्रोटेक्शन सिस्टम के डायरेक्टर उमर स्मिथ ने कहा कि वह एक स्पेशलाइज्ड सर्च और रेस्क्यू टीम को तैनात करने की तैयारी कर रहा है, जिसका नेतृत्व नेशनल सिविल प्रोटेक्शन सिस्टम करेगा। 
स्मिथ ने बताया कि टीम में सर्च ऑपरेशन के लिए करीब 60 लोग और चार ट्रेंड कुत्ते शामिल हैं। उन्होंने कहा कि टीम के पास लोगों को ढूंढने में मदद करने के लिए ड्रोन और थर्मल-कैपेबल उपकरण होंगे। साथ ही केमिकल, बायोलॉजिकल, रेडियोलॉजिकल और न्यूक्लियर हालात को संभालने के लिए प्रशिक्षित लोग भी होंगे। 
स्थानीय मीडिया के अनुसार, ऑपरेशन शुरू में सात दिन चलेगा, हालांकि वेनेजुएला के हालात के हिसाब से सर्च का समय बढ़ाया जा सकता है। अगर जरूरत पड़ी तो और बचावकर्मियों को ले जाने वाला दूसरा एयरक्राफ्ट भेजा जाएगा। 
इस बीच, बुधवार को आए भयानक भूकंप के बाद पीड़ितों की मदद करने और शुरुआती रिकवरी की कोशिशों में मदद करने के लिए एक दर्जन से ज्यादा देशों से तकनीकी और मानवीय मदद वेनेजुएला पहुंचना शुरू हो गई है। 
गुरुवार से भारत, डोमिनिकन रिपब्लिक, अल साल्वाडोर, कोलंबिया, मेक्सिको, चिली, इक्वाडोर, स्पेन, जर्मनी, स्विट्जरलैंड और कतर जैसे देशों के साथ-साथ यूएन सिस्टम से भी बचाव दल और खास सामान वेनेजुएला पहुंच चुके हैं। 
ताजा आधिकारिक रिपोर्ट के अनुसार, बुधवार को आए भूकंप में कम से कम 920 लोग मारे गए और 3,360 से ज्यादा घायल हुए। इससे देश के सेंट्रल कोस्ट पर इंफ्रास्ट्रक्चर को बहुत नुकसान हुआ।

title: Tower crash calls Beijing’s air security into question
description: FT research identifies owner of vehicle under investigation at flight school linked to impact

title: TET 2026 Exam: ପ୍ରଶ୍ନପତ୍ର ଲିକ୍‌ ପରେ ମହାରାଷ୍ଟ୍ର ଶିକ୍ଷକ ଯୋଗ୍ୟତା ପରୀକ୍ଷା ସ୍ଥଗିତ
description:
ମୁମ୍ବାଇ: ପୁଣି ଥରେ ଦେଶରେ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନପତ୍ର ଲିକ୍‌ ଅଭିଯୋଗ ଆସିଛି। ଏଥର ମହାରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରରେ ଶିକ୍ଷକ ଯୋଗ୍ୟତା ପରୀକ୍ଷା (ଟିଇଟି) ପ୍ରଶ୍ନପତ୍ର ଲିକ୍‌ ହୋଇଥିବା ଜଣାପଡ଼ିବା ପରେ ପରୀକ୍ଷାକୁ ସ୍ଥଗିତ ରଖାଯାଇଛି। ଟିଇଟି ପରୀକ୍ଷା ରବିବାର (ଜୁନ୍‌ ୨୮ ତାରିଖରେ) ଅନୁଷ୍ଠିତ ହେବାକୁ ଥିଲା। ତେ‌ବେ ପରୀକ୍ଷାର ୨୪ ଘଣ୍ଟା ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଥାଣେରୁ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନପତ୍ର ଲିକ୍‌ ହୋଇଥିବା ଜଣାପଡ଼ିଛି। ରିପୋର୍ଟ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ପୁଲିସକୁ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନପତ୍ର ଲିକ୍‌ ସମ୍ପର୍କରେ ସୂଚନା ମିଳିବା ପରେ ଥାଣେର ଭିୱାଣ୍ଡିରେ ଏକ ଅପରେସନ ପରେ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନପତ୍ର ଜବତ କରାଯାଇଛି। ଏହି ମାମଲାରେ କିଛି ଲୋକଙ୍କୁ ଗିରଫ କରାଯାଇଛି। କିନ୍ତୁ ସେମାନଙ୍କ ପରିଚୟ ପ୍ରକାଶ କରାଯାଇନାହିଁ।
ଆହୁରି ପଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ: ପୁଲିସ ଭ୍ୟାନ୍‌ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣାଗ୍ରସ୍ତ; ୨ଡ଼ିଏସପିଙ୍କ ସମେତ ତିନି ଜଣ ଗୁରୁତର
ଶନିବାର ଜାରି ହୋଇଥିବା ଏକ ଆଧିକାରିକ ବିବୃତିରେ ମହାରାଷ୍ଟ୍ର ରାଜ୍ୟ ପରୀକ୍ଷା ପରିଷଦ କହିଛି ଯେ, ରାଜ୍ୟର ୧୦୨୮ଟି କେନ୍ଦ୍ରରେ ଜୁନ୍ ୨୮ ତାରିଖରେ ଅନୁଷ୍ଠିତ ହେବାକୁ ଥିବା ଟିିଇଟି ୨୦୨୬ ପରୀକ୍ଷା ପ୍ରଶ୍ନପତ୍ର ଲିକ୍‌ ସମ୍ପର୍କରେ ଜଣାପଡ଼ିବା ପରେ ଏହାକୁ ସ୍ଥଗିତ ରଖାଯାଇଛି। ପରିଷଦ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ ଶନିବାର ପ୍ରତ୍ୟୁଷରେ ଗୋପନୀୟ ସୂଚନା ଉପରେ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ କରି ଭିୱାଣ୍ଡି ପୁଲିସ ଏକ ସ୍ଥାନରେ ଚଢାଉ କରିଥିଲା ​​ଯେଉଁଠାରେ କିଛି ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଙ୍କଠାରୁ ସିଲ୍ ହୋଇଥିବା ପ୍ରଶ୍ନପତ୍ରର ପୃଷ୍ଠାଗୁଡ଼ିକ ମିଳିଥିଲା। ପରୀକ୍ଷା ପରିଷଦ ପରେ ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ କରିଥିଲା ଯେ, ଜବତ ହୋଇଥିବା କାଗଜ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନପତ୍ରରେ ରହିଥିବା ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ସହିତ ସମାନତା ରହିଛି। ଫଳରେ ପରୀକ୍ଷାର ସ୍ବଚ୍ଛତାକୁ ନେଇ ଚିନ୍ତା ପ୍ରକାଶ ପାଇଥିଲା। ତଦନ୍ତ ସମାପ୍ତ ହେବା ଓ ପରିସ୍ଥିତିର ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ମୂଲ୍ୟାୟନ ହେବା ପରେ ନୂତନ ପରୀକ୍ଷା ତାରିଖ ଘୋଷଣା କରାଯିବ।ରାଜ୍ୟ ଶିକ୍ଷା ବିଭାଗ ଖୁବ୍‌ଶୀଘ୍ର ଏହି ଘଟଣାର ସବିଶେଷ ତଥ୍ୟ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରି ପ୍ରେସ୍‌ ନୋଟ ଜାରି କରିବ। ସରକାରଙ୍କ ନିଷ୍ପତ୍ତି ହେବା ପରେ ପରୀକ୍ଷା ସମ୍ପର୍କିତ ସଂଶୋଧିତ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ରମ ଘୋଷଣା କରାଯିବା ବୋଲି ଆଶା କରାଯାଇଛି। ପ୍ରଶ୍ନପତ୍ର କେମିତି ଲିକ୍‌ ହେଲା ଓ ଏହି ରାକେଟରେ ଆଉ କେଉଁମାନଙ୍କ ସମ୍ପୃକ୍ତି ରହିଛି ପୁଲିସ ସେସବୁର ତଦନ୍ତ କରୁଛି।
ସମଗ୍ର ରାଜ୍ୟରେ ପାଖାପାଖି ୪ ଲକ୍ଷ ୨୮ ହଜାର ପ୍ରାର୍ଥୀ ପରୀକ୍ଷା ଦେବାପାଇଁ ପଞ୍ଜୀକରଣ କରିଥିଲେ। ଏମାନଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ୨ ଲକ୍ଷ ୨୬ ହଜାର ୨୬୩ ଏପରି ପରୀକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ ଥିଲେ, ଯେଉଁମାନେ ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଶିକ୍ଷକ ଚାକିରି କରୁଛନ୍ତି। ସେମାନେ ଶିକ୍ଷକ ଯୋଗ୍ୟତା ସାର୍ଟିଫକେଟ ପାଇବା ପାଇଁ ପରୀକ୍ଷା ଦେଉଥିଲେ। ତେବେ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନପତ୍ର ଲିକ୍‌ ହେବା ପରେ ଅନେକ ପ୍ରାର୍ଥୀଙ୍କ ଜୀବନ ଅନ୍ଧକାରକୁ ‌ଠେଲି ହୋଇଯାଇଛ। ଏହାପୂର୍ବରୁ ୨୦୨୫ରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ଶିକ୍ଷକ ଯୋଗ୍ୟତା ପରୀକ୍ଷା ମଧ୍ୟ ଲିକ୍‌ ହୋଇଥିଲା।
ଆହୁରି ପଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ: 'ମୋଦୀଙ୍କ ନାମରେ ଦିନ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରୁଛି ୧୫ ମାସର ନାତୁଣୀ; ସୁନୀଲ ସେଟ୍ଟୀ

title: One in 10 Gen Zers want their boss to be replaced by AI—they’re already being polite to ChatGPT just in case
description: Amid AI job-loss fears, Gen Z has one role they hope gets replaced: their boss. And 69% are already being polite to ChatGPT, just in case.
content:
Amid the frenzy that AI will result in mass job losses, there’s one role Gen Zers are secretly hoping the bots will replace: their boss. And 69% are already being polite to ChatGPT just in case.



A 2025 study from essay writing service EduBirdie highlights that one in 10 Gen Z workers are pining for a robot boss. 



While wishing for the demise of a manager is nothing new, what’s eye-opening is the reasons why they think the likes of ChatGPT and Gemini would make for a better manager. For one, they ironically think it’d be more human. 



Most of the Gen Zers said that AI will be a nicer, fairer, and more neutral boss. 



While some think a virtual manager would be a lot smarter than the current human one they have, others predict they’d be able to manipulate AI management easily.



Worryingly, some respondents reported that an AI boss “won’t hit on me” and would be “less scary.”



And whether or not workers are actually destined to report into robots any time soon, 70% of the 2,000 young Americans surveyed are already hedging their bets—one ‘please’ at a time. 



What does this mean for managers?



Despite Gen Z’s wishes, managers are more likely to be replaced by peers who use AI, as opposed to AI itself. A separate 2025 survey highlighted the vast majority of bosses predict they’ll lose their jobs within a year if they don’t master AI skills. 



But they may be more at risk of losing bright young talent if they don’t start managing like humans. 



“Gen Z’s desire to replace their human boss with AI is a red flag for their managers,” Avery Morgan, chief human resources officer at EduBirdie tells Fortune. “This points to burned-out, disengaged leaders failing to meet basic human needs.”



Rather than being wowed by AI’s capability or how a virtual boss could bring about more flexibility to workplaces, Morgan stresses that workers wanting this bosses to be replaced signals “they’re dealing with unfairness, confusion, and toxicity at work.” All of which are on the rise with return to office mandates.



But there’s good news: Brushing up on soft skills may be a double whammy solution to avoid getting replaced by AI and losing Gen Z staff. 



“I don’t believe AI can replace professional managers who bring emotional intelligence, empathy, ethical judgment, and creative problem-solving to the table,” Morgan says. “The irony is that the aspects of management that make us most distinctly human are precisely what’s missing when employees prefer machines.” 



Gen Z: Get support or leave



Morgan’s advice for managers is to create environment where employees feel safe enough to give you feedback—like, that they wish you were a robot—to your face, or at the very least, through anonymous surveys. 



“You don’t need to be everyone’s best friend, but you do need to be approachable, transparent, consistent, and ethical,” she says. “Respect personal boundaries, keep conversations professional, and be fair in your decisions. If you make a mistake, own it and apologize.”



For Gen Z, stuck under a toxic or unprofessional manager, Morgan suggests going to HR or a senior leader. 



“If your work anxiety is tied to one person and something feels off, it probably is,” she says, adding to factually document any bad behaviour, such as instances of when they’ve crossed personal boundaries.



“Write down dates and details, save emails, messages, or anything else that supports your case,” Morgan adds. “Toxicity often hides behind fake smiles and ‘we’re like family’ claims, but don’t let that keep you stuck.



“If there’s no support in place, leave. No title, salary, or opportunity is worth your mental health.”



A version of this story originally published on Fortune.com on May 14, 2025



Read more on AI’s impact on work from Fortune’s Orianna Rosa Royle: 




Teen boys are choosing AI girlfriends over real ones for ‘maximum control, zero rejection’—experts say it could make them unemployable



10 a.m. could be your new start time, thanks to AI. Billionaire Mark Cuban says companies will cut the workday by an hour—and you’ll still get paid the same



Workers are using AI to sneak out for spin classes and skip lunch meetings—and new research shows they’re clawing back 30 minutes a day
